name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Don't Miss Out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_miss_out&n=1)
---
Friend -- On November 12th, I'll be hosting a discussion on my experience prosecuting Saddam Hussein at Elmhurst Brewing Company starting at 11:30am—[you're invited to attend](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/saddam_hussein_presentation_with_paul_schimpf?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_miss_out&n=2)! I served as the lead American attorney advisor to the Iraqi prosecutors in the trial of Hussein. Under my guidance, the Iraqi prosecutors were able to induce a remarkable courtroom confession where Saddam admitted culpability in the massacre of hundreds of Iraqi civilians. At our event next week, I'll be sharing some behind-the-scenes details and accounts from the experience. | [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/saddam_hussein_presentation_with_paul_schimpf?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_miss_out&n=3 "RSVP HERE") [RSVP HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/saddam_hussein_presentation_with_paul_schimpf?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_miss_out&n=3)
---
S/F,
Paul Schimpf

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Let’s talk about what happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The Build Back Better Act contains the majority of the president's agenda. We must keep going and ensure these promises are delivered.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211108-2636-header&t=1&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)
We had an absolutely _wild_ infrastructure vote Friday night.
**Here’s what happened:**
**_For months, Congress has been negotiating two bills that together make up the President’s agenda: the bipartisan infrastructure bill and the Build Back Better Act._** Together, they would make major investments in our country’s physical and human infrastructure — the former to our roads and bridges, and the latter to childcare, eldercare, climate action, paid family leave, lowering prescription drug prices, and much more.
**_The agreement from the start was that the bills would pass together._** Progressives felt strongly that the President’s entire agenda needed to pass in order for Democrats to deliver on long-held promises, most notably acting on climate change. Working with movement leaders, we made clear months ago, ‘no climate, no deal.’ That means if conservative Democrats wouldn't step up to support the Build Back Better Act, they couldn't count on our vote for their infrastructure bill.
**_But on Friday, a vote on the bipartisan infrastructure bill was scheduled _without_ the Build Back Better Act. So in order to hold the line and stand our ground for the climate, Alexandria and the Squad voted ‘no’ on the bipartisan infrastructure bill, just as they said they would from day one.1_**
[Add your name here to thank Alexandria for holding her ground and together we can finish the job and pass the Build Back Better Act.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/thank-aoc-holding-line-bbb/?refcode=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&source=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=2&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/thank-aoc-holding-line-bbb/?refcode=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&source=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=3&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)**
The pressure around this vote was unreal. Lobbyists and corporations have been fighting with everything they have for months to decouple the Build Back Better Act from the infrastructure bill. Alexandria even got the CEO at Exxon to admit in a public hearing he’s been in direct conversations with legislators around the climate provisions in this bill. But Alexandria doesn’t take a dime from lobbyists or CEOs. She answers to you. That’s why she stood up for us, and that’s why we need your help now.
As you likely heard, the infrastructure bill still passed into law. House leadership got several Republicans to support the bill and countered the Squad’s ‘no’ votes. **_So, what now?_**
The President says he’s still committed to passing the Build Back Better Act. **And it’s absolutely critical that he and everyone else who made that promise keeps their word.**
[Now is the critical moment to ramp up pressure for the Build Back Better Act. We need you to stand with Alexandria and commit to helping us get Build Back Better over the line.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/thank-aoc-holding-line-bbb/?refcode=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&source=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=4&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)
The Build Back Better Act contains the majority of the president's agenda — including not just climate action but also paid leave, expanded Medicare, universal pre-k and lower costs for insulin and other prescription drugs. We must keep going and ensure these promises are delivered.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [Common Dreams](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10134?t=5&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=6&refcode2=2636_2526796_oLoRYi&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211108-2636-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=7&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2636%2E2526796%2EoLoRYi)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The attention I've already been receiving make it clear the Democrats are terrified of my Senate candidacy. |
---

body:
| | | Team, We’re a year out from the 2022 election. We’ve been meeting constituents for months already, and we’re getting ready to do more events, knock on more doors, and run more ads next year. **[_Before we do, will you endorse Mckayla’s campaign for Congress? Having you officially sign on as an early endorser will show just how strong our grassroots support is._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8iuYHqJdhOvP2i06P81kDHb8ZidDyVxPK_nvIHOCUNcEZSUFTFt6FLAPU-3MBlzheOxfHdKKv-K0-B9E378AzyXi7s2wo8H_7tFMleQXWDz6zH2vxdZi9lLlcxefCeiINuYREvaOtx17e2f67m3WZw-AT1GNqbs5vu2g0QGJkeDjRs87PnB38yzq9YONyoL-22Q/3gv/MJ4HOuNZSkqZ5KA7M7_4FA/h0/9oTE1Wx6wXOT0DVDfY5HZiixEFoPp6EmTWGpFXFiYt0)** There’s a lot happening in politics right now. After a disastrous night in Virginia, Congressional Democrats passed an infrastructure bill and sent that to Joe Biden’s desk to sign. They still haven’t passed the Build Back Better plan to invest $500 billion in fighting climate change, enact universal preschool for 3- and 4-year olds, and improve Medicare. This should be just the start. Ultimately, what we need is single-payer universal healthcare through Medicare-for-All, a transformational Green New Deal that tackles the climate crisis, an end to mass incarceration, and a democracy that is not corrupted by corporate money. That’s what we’re fighting for. **[_We need to act now to build back in a way that centers justice in our society. That’s why Mckayla’s running for Congress. Will you sign on as an official endorser right now?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8iuYHqJdhOvP2i06P81kDHb-5mHN-aTS9X7COQeRv1bHe90-ELZWfd6gawY5rTuapQTrm_7HpgW9TzLUxspvWj_nFV0lu-ipXSI-RyCUbjMFIW5krVIkRiuxFVwWit9xl9dSrFIAiTCQFDMv1ja-t5NqTokkAF8d42VRuOOQ3kehV4TIaC3nz6otKlfw20Hxm8g/3gv/MJ4HOuNZSkqZ5KA7M7_4FA/h1/FHc6_wodV8uq6egmBqH9tVvYWn3wct_Vw5WYPaWszAo)** It’s the support of people like you that has powered our movement so far. Thanks for being on this journey with us. Team Mckayla

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: One year from today, where will we be?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We have exactly one year until Election Day 2022. The results of the next
statewide elections in Texas will be determined by the work we do in the
next 365 days — starting today.

How many volunteers will we recruit? How many Texas voters can we reach?
You are one of the people who gets to decide the answers to these
questions. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48765?refcode=ema20211108-161828&t=1001&akid=161828%2E444211%2E3vPV2P ]Chip in your
first contribution to
Powered by People to help us kickstart the next year with as much
grassroots power as possible.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48765?refcode=ema20211108-161828&amount=3&t=1020&akid=161828%2E444211%2E3vPV2P ]Contribute $3

Since 2019, Powered by People volunteers have organized over 20,000
volunteers, made over 76 million voter contact attempts, and registered
over 250,000 likely Democratic voters. And every single part of that was
fueled by grassroots donors chipping in $5, $10, or $25 to emails just
like this one.

Remember, the Texas GOP wants nothing more than for us to surrender to
their power grab — it’s why they passed one of the most restrictive voter
suppression bills in the nation. It’s on us to make their biggest fear
come true and spend the next 365 days laying the groundwork for flipping
Texas blue.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48765?refcode=ema20211108-161828&t=1021&akid=161828%2E444211%2E3vPV2P ]Will you make a donation right now to fuel our on-the-ground programs
to reach and turn out voters in every Texas county? We have one year to
create the change we want to see in Texas — and your donation will make
the biggest impact on the year ahead if you make it right now.

No contribution is too small to make a difference to a grassroots movement
like ours. Dollar by dollar, voter by voter, we are building a movement
powerful enough to overcome right-wing extremism in Texas.

Let’s get to work,

Kate Roberts

clean_body: [1]Powered By People We have exactly one year until Election Day 2022. The results of the next statewide elections in Texas will be determined by the work we do in the next 365 days — starting today. How many volunteers will we recruit? How many Texas voters can we reach? You are one of the people who gets to decide the answers to these questions. [ ]Chip in your first contribution to Powered by People to help us kickstart the next year with as much grassroots power as possible. [ ]Contribute $3 Since 2019, Powered by People volunteers have organized over 20,000 volunteers, made over 76 million voter contact attempts, and registered over 250,000 likely Democratic voters. And every single part of that was fueled by grassroots donors chipping in $5, $10, or $25 to emails just like this one. Remember, the Texas GOP wants nothing more than for us to surrender to their power grab — it’s why they passed one of the most restrictive voter suppression bills in the nation. It’s on us to make their biggest fear come true and spend the next 365 days laying the groundwork for flipping Texas blue. [ ]Will you make a donation right now to fuel our on-the-ground programs to reach and turn out voters in every Texas county? We have one year to create the change we want to see in Texas — and your donation will make the biggest impact on the year ahead if you make it right now. No contribution is too small to make a difference to a grassroots movement like ours. Dollar by dollar, voter by voter, we are building a movement powerful enough to overcome right-wing extremism in Texas. Let’s get to work, Kate Roberts Powered by People [ ]Donate »

| | SAVE THIS DATE...
November 8, 2022 That’s right, we are exactly one year away from the general election and victory for the 3rd Congressional District with our win! Will you be celebrating with me come that day?
---
| [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/adNq1c4Vv/c?w=FOAuwljlO6XYB7WTvsxPzXCFLA3wDYBjSvxw52hlynE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3NhdmV0aGVkYXRlMDM_cmVmY29kZT1TYXZldGVkYXRlZW1haWwmYW1vdW50PTEwMCIsInIiOiI4ZTIxZTlmOS0wNjY4LTQ3ZTgtNzlmMy00MDgyNDA2YjRjNTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)

| | We are going to win in one year and when we do, I want all of you there.Sure, that’s brazen.Yes, it’s confident.Absolutely, it's a big statement.Am I wrong? No. We came together and will bring more into the fold. We share common values and ideals for government, policy and action. We share a real drive for building this campaign and it’s messages. Speaking of messages. You do know I have people helping me craft these messages, don’t you? They often say, give them more material to work with like personal anecdotes or something funny. (laughter echoes from writers room) “No, we say stop giving us funny stuff, we already have enough to work with.” (raucous laughter erupts) But they never tell me to show them more confidence.That I have in an endless supply.Here’s an example. If you look at this poll, recently released by the Trafalgar Group, a well-known conservative pollster, you will see that we are at number 2. If the primary election were today, we would be advancing to the general election in one year. Second place puts us ahead of the incumbent and well within striking distance of the leader. While this is an early poll, it indicates that my name and our message is reaching people, right now. But we need to reach even more voters in the 3rd District. We can and will, with your help today.While this poll is a good sign, we are still low on name recognition for me. That problem is both bad and easy to fix. Voter outreach is the one guaranteed solution to getting my name and our issues in front of your fellow voters. However, voter outreach costs money.
* Printed materials such as letterhead, envelopes and stickers.
* Preparation of the mailings and postage to get the materials to the voters.
* Advertisements

It all comes at a cost but you can help me with that if you [DONATE](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/adNq1c4Vv/c?w=E3bo4I5C2xthE-f0EhJ_bsvDja9fuDQzEGS1hhERwjY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3NhdmV0aGVkYXRlMDM_cmVmY29kZT1TYXZldGVkYXRlZW1haWwmYW1vdW50PTEwMCIsInIiOiJlNGU0MDU2NC01MzRjLTRkZjAtY2JjNi0wMGMzMDYzYzVhN2MiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) whatever you can afford. $22 for 2022 keeps popping into my head every time we create one of these emails. You can also encourage friends and family to do the same TODAY, because tomorrow comes both too soon and too late. If you share this email widely, we grow our reach and bring more to the fold in support and dollars. It’s that simple. It's also that difficult. So help make it easier. Help me furnish voters with the information they need about me, about our campaign and how we are going to #FlipWA03 together. Thank you.

name: DEMOCRATS DELIVER (via DCCC)
subject: we’re THRILLED!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Confirm your support for the INCREDIBLE Infrastructure Bill >>
| | | [QUICKLY: Confirm your support for the INCREDIBLE Infrastructure Bill >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---

We're THRILLED!

**Our Democrats just passed one of the BIGGEST investments in America 's future that our country has ever seen.**

This once-in-a-generation legislation will:

_\--**UPGRADE** airports and waterways,
\-- **EXPAND** broadband access,
\-- **CONFRONT** the climate crisis,
\-- and **MODERNIZE** our country's crumbling infrastructure._

We can't believe our eyes \-- we're SO proud of the work of all our House Democrats.

But now, we need to know if our grassroots team feels the same way!

**[So, we're calling for 12,000 of our best grassroots supporters to let us know how they feel about this historic infrastructure plan. Will you confirm your support now?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| | **POLL: CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT FOR THE INFRASTRUCTURE BILL >>

RESPONSE: PENDING
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SUPPORTER ID: #5907903**
---
[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Make no mistake: **The Republicans tried to derail our efforts at every turn.**

But through it all, our Democratic leaders held firm and kept up the fight on behalf of every single American.

**Now, we need to know that this grassroots team is behind this historic achievement. **

**[Please: Can we count on you to submit your feedback before midnight tonight?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)**

[ADD YOUR NAME: Confirm your support for our infrastructure bill >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe6m6~)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45908551&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDkwOTY0NwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45908551&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDkwOTY0NwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I got another fine from Nancy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58716797:JZo5E92jN:m:1:3103520637:09A46ED668A9BF276A466F5291AA30FE:r "Headline") Peter, I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58716797:JZo5E92jN:m:1:3103520637:09A46ED668A9BF276A466F5291AA30FE:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58716797:JZo5E92jN:m:1:3103520637:09A46ED668A9BF276A466F5291AA30FE:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58716797:JZo5E92jN:m:1:3103520637:09A46ED668A9BF276A466F5291AA30FE:r "I need to
know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58716797:JZo5E92jN:m:1:3103520637:09A46ED668A9BF276A466F5291AA30FE:r "Not when I have patriots like
you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58716797:JZo5E92jN:m:1:3103520637:09A46ED668A9BF276A466F5291AA30FE:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

| [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=13 "FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU") [FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=13)
---
* * *
**Third Congressional District GOP Office**
WI-03 Congressional Candidate Derrick Van Orden fired up the crowd at the grand opening of the Third Congressional District GOP office.
**Rock County GOP Conversations with Black Conservatives Event**
The Rock County GOP hosted a Conversations with Black Conservatives event discussing issues of importance to the Black community and all Wisconsinites.
**St. Croix County GOP Election Integrity Meeting**
St. Croix County Republicans joined together for an Election Integrity Meeting with speakers discussing the importance of signing up to become a poll worker. (You can sign up on our website **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R_kNr4x5AW03jFWL_9dJJI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=14)**!)
**Monroe County GOP Conservative Breakfast**
Over 60 patriots joined Monroe County Republicans for their twice monthly Conservative Breakfast Club. Local conservative activists gathered to discuss issues and strategize to Defend America.
**Marathon County GOP Monthly Meeting**
Over 100 local conservatives gathered to hear from WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow and Rep. Pat Snyder and receive an update on election integrity at the Marathon County GOP’s monthly meeting.
**Marathon County Gun Show**
Many enthusiastic conservatives visited the Marathon County GOP’s booth at their local gun show!**
**
**Washington County GOP Team Meeting**
Washington County GOP team leaders met with RNC Victory program staff to plan ahead as Republicans prepare the largest field program in state history.
**Washington County GOP Phone Bank**
Washington County volunteers made phone calls to support recall election candidates.
**Sheboygan County GOP Meet the Candidates Night**
Sheboygan County Republicans heard from prospective candidates hoping to spread the Republican message at their Meet the Candidates Night.
**Waukesha County GOP Pints & Politics**
Governor Scott Walker and WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow fired up the crowd at the Waukesha County GOP Pints & Politics event in Okauchee.
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=15) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=16).
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=17) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=18) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=19) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_11_08_v3&n=20)

name: Mia Mason
subject: Maryland LGBTQ DLC Council Meeting on Zoom at 7pm Tonight
body:
Maryland Welcomes All Dear Friends, You are invited to a Maryland LGBTQ DLC Council Meeting on Zoom with your host Mia Mason. She is the 2020 Democr
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=439905.1575.1.ef2e1b58a960e303092030671f99ab70) |
---
# Maryland Welcomes All
---
Dear Friends, You are invited to a Maryland LGBTQ DLC Council Meeting on Zoom with your host Mia Mason. She is the 2020 Democratic Nominee from Maryland District One who ran against Rep. Andy Harris (R-GOP). She is also the First Transgender Veteran to win a Congressional Primary in the entire United States. Maryland is extremely proud of her efforts; however, we need to talk about the upcoming issues that will directly affect our LGBTQIA+ communities in 2022. It's time to hear your thoughts about the issues that didn't pass in the past four years. We're looking to take your ideas directly to pen to paper, ASAP. Which why we're also looking for volunteers like you! The more help we get now will allow us all plenty of time to prepare or present our bills, speak to our elected leaders in Annapolis or Washington, D.C. Plus, it will give us plenty of time to review any legal challenges and address those concerns to our elected or newly elected officials. We also need a big ask of our LGBTQ Community to step up and run for office in 2022 or plan to run in 2024. We're wanting a full rainbow of Candidates throughout the state of Maryland from 2022 onward! Lastly, we need your support in each in town, city, or county to represent and help promote any upcoming LGBTQIA+ events for 2022! If you have an upcoming or newsletter please send these to Mia at [LGBTQ@MDdems.org](mailto:LGBTQ@MDdems.org)or text her at 410-946-2766. Here is how to join our upcoming event tonight! Register in advance for this meeting: [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZEsfuuhrzIqGdHTx-dv1w20vlbdbl4KGr0L ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=439905.1576.1.857c6f73f3d5bef6314ca22651dfb513) When: Nov 9, 2021 07:00 PM Eastern Time (U.S. and Canada) After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting. Warm Regards, Mia Mason
She/Her
2020 Democratic Nomination for MD-01
LGBTQ Maryland DLC Chair
@Mia4md miadmason.us
410-94-MASON 410-946-2766
---
---
| | [ RSVP Now ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=439905.1577.1.53c9ebeb494d17bbc1aa7848e67ed924)

name: Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down
subject: ALERT - U.S. Senate 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
I've been in tough fights before. This is the next one, and I need your help.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720425:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---
Peter,

I'm Mike Durant, and I'm officially announcing my run for the U.S. Senate seat in Alabama.

As a Black Hawk helicopter pilot, I put it all on the line for our country. Because I believe in America and all she stands for.**My next fight isn't in the jungles of Panama, the deserts of Iraq or the streets of Mogadishu. It's right here at home, and it starts with taking on the Career Politicians who never had a real job and are taking our country in the wrong direction.**

I can't sit on the sidelines anymore. I'm sick of watching Biden and the Career Politicians in Washington dismantle all the progress President Trump made. As a Pro-Trump conservative, a veteran, a businessman, a father, and a patriot, it's time for me to do everything in my power to save the American Dream that I've risked everything to defend.**_Watch My Announcement Video Below_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720425:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)

"Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying, "Whom shall I send? And who will go for us?"

And I said, "Here am I. Send me!"
Isaiah 6:8

** I'm asking the good people of Alabama to make me their Senator and give me a chance to represent our great state. I promise to support the policies of President Trump, to take on China, cut taxes, and strengthen our military. I'll take on the Career Politicians pushing vaccine mandates and fight to secure our southern border from the chaos unleashed by Joe Biden and his liberal mob.

**Joe Biden starts making bad decisions from the moment he wakes up in the morning, and I'm running for US Senate to get rid of the Career Politicians who didn't serve their country and never held a real job.

Securing the Border, opposing vaccine mandates, and taking on the Big Tech companies trying to silence conservatives are just a few of the items on my agenda. I will always put America First, like President Trump did.** So, will you join me? Will you join my campaign against the Career Politicians?

| [**JOIN MY CAMPAIGN HERE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720425:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---

**_[Chip in whatever you can right below to ensure we have a true conservative and someone who's not afraid of a fight representing our great state of Alabama.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720425:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)_**

[**$25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720426:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---
[**$50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720427:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---
[**$100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720428:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---
[**$250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720429:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---
[**$500**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720430:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
---

We can't allow President Biden's poor decision-making to cripple our country any longer, and we can't trust Career Politicians to stand up to him. We've got to save it before it's too late and we must get back to President Trump's America First agenda. I hope you'll join me in that fight.

Thank you and God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720425:JCNwG926N:m:1:3253819041:30131B8A9815168C13A61D91F6FD3526:r)
Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down

clean_body: I've been in tough fights before. This is the next one, and I need your help. | Peter, I'm Mike Durant, and I'm officially announcing my run for the U.S. Senate seat in Alabama. As a Black Hawk helicopter pilot, I put it all on the line for our country. Because I believe in America and all she stands for.My next fight isn't in the jungles of Panama, the deserts of Iraq or the streets of Mogadishu. It's right here at home, and it starts with taking on the Career Politicians who never had a real job and are taking our country in the wrong direction. I can't sit on the sidelines anymore. I'm sick of watching Biden and the Career Politicians in Washington dismantle all the progress President Trump made. As a Pro-Trump conservative, a veteran, a businessman, a father, and a patriot, it's time for me to do everything in my power to save the American Dream that I've risked everything to defend.Watch My Announcement Video Below "Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying, "Whom shall I send? And who will go for us?" And I said, "Here am I. Send me!" Isaiah 6:8 I'm asking the good people of Alabama to make me their Senator and give me a chance to represent our great state. I promise to support the policies of President Trump, to take on China, cut taxes, and strengthen our military. I'll take on the Career Politicians pushing vaccine mandates and fight to secure our southern border from the chaos unleashed by Joe Biden and his liberal mob. Joe Biden starts making bad decisions from the moment he wakes up in the morning, and I'm running for US Senate to get rid of the Career Politicians who didn't serve their country and never held a real job. Securing the Border, opposing vaccine mandates, and taking on the Big Tech companies trying to silence conservatives are just a few of the items on my agenda. I will always put America First, like President Trump did. So, will you join me? Will you join my campaign against the Career Politicians? | We can't allow President Biden's poor decision-making to cripple our country any longer, and we can't trust Career Politicians to stand up to him. We've got to save it before it's too late and we must get back to President Trump's America First agenda. I hope you'll join me in that fight. Thank you and God Bless, Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need your help to keep my seat in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)

**[Your donation,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59113811:sRzK6mHNE:m:1:2247059263:5F133A9361AC7236AA66680184C7FF83:r)

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Winsome Sears, VA Lt. Governor
subject: I'm Democrats' worst nightmare:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Patriot,

You may have seen me in the news this past week, or even on Sean Hannity's show.

**The reason why I 'm suddenly showing up everywhere is simple: [I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia -- living proof that everything the Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720383:JTLSG92NN:m:1:3299561967:05F3EAFADA9E940C698E17BBD6DADA5A:r "I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia — living proof that everything the
Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.")**

_I 'm a Jamaican immigrant who legally immigrated to the United States and became a citizen of this country because I wanted the American Dream for myself _--_**and I did just that.** I'm a small-business owner and a U.S. Marine. _

And now, as the first black woman elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, I'm thrilled to start working alongside strong, conservative leaders putting our country FIRST again.

The Left has put American citizens on the back burner for far too long.

**[It's time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help me do just that.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58720383:JTLSG92NN:m:1:3299561967:05F3EAFADA9E940C698E17BBD6DADA5A:r "It’s time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help
me do just that.")**

I'm confident that with your help, we'll continue to chip away at the Left's control in our country and save our states.

subject: Big Bird is a Big Problem.
body:

BIG BIRD IS A BIG PROBLEM

Why do lefties use social media to target our children with their political messaging? It is because they know that they can get away with reaching the maximum audience with minimal pushback.

At [CaucusRoom.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17157%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KP0%2bExHBwdj2XBfnHjBA2g&sysid=1), members are free to discuss ideas, hold real conversations and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook and other platforms.

Parents, neighbors, friends, colleagues and conservatives around the country use [CaucusRoom.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17157%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KP0%2bExHBwdj2XBfnHjBA2g&sysid=1) every day to cut through the noise and vitriol of the left and establish an authentic online community. And at CaucusRoom, you will **never** see content targeting children with political rhetoric.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znevufnfkte1haqceleqch10ooleec1ll36rn4d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imaor3cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc91qon8l20opeckmv12qhdmu1fhqtqift5ddrv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imaor3cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoruu9eehaeag5acf19lhpke8qt0fvq1nars5rug_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imaor3cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

|
---
_Friend ーhave you seen the latest attack on the American people from the Biden administration?_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc1f1masjnokgo296ksfisfrinoi3fqruft47vd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)

[**DEFEAT THE BIDEN MANDATES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjue17qn9uh9t1ia328ihlv0r0ivrgsje4ud08e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)
_Let’s be clear what this is..._

_**_An attack against American small businesses!_**_
_ _
_Amidst a_ __supply chain crisis__ _and a _labor shortage__ _,___Joe Biden wants to use OHSA to enforce an unconstitutional mandate that forces expensive testing on small businesses._ _

**_If the small business declines, they will be forced out of business by fines EXCEEDING $100,000!_**

_Friend, Biden and this administration have proven time and time again they have made middle-class Americans and small businesses their enemy. _

_It’s time to fight back. _

**_Today we are less than 1 YEAR AWAY from Election Day!_**

**_We need to recreate what happened last Tuesday and keep this_**** _RED WAVE_**** _going until November 8th, 2022ー_** _[**are you ready to save small businesses and defeat these tyrannical mandates?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6sf7k5m5pgtjtighbmi63mq4g6e9bm33itvd4u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)_
[**DEFEAT THE BIDEN MANDATES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqf5nupofs9nqcp54hhna8mjlnp427u54q6ejm7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)
_Let me tell you why I'm fighting so hard to defend my home of Long Island._

Long Island has always been my home. My family’s deep roots on Long Island stretch from Bayshore to Patchogue. My family has been deeply invested in our amazing community for decades:

_My grandfather and great uncle owned local grocery stores. _
_My uncle operates our local deli. _
_My father runs a small law firm in Sayville, NY. _

Now, as the Congressman for New York’s 2nd district, I faithfully represent my home of Long Island in Congress and always put the needs of the people of New York FIRST!
** **
It’s truly a disgrace what the Democrats have done to the State of New York. New York City and Long Island’s success is due to the **_entrepreneurial spirit_** , **_hard work_** _,_ and **_grit_** of the people of this state and, these are the very ideals Democrats wish to destroy and replace with socialism.
** **
And now that Democrats are in control of the White House and Congress, it’s more important than ever that we start energizing conservatives all around this great nation.
[**🇺🇸****DEFEND LONG ISLAND****🇺🇸**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z61kds158fdu9ctict5s8i70jcgc51l0fe30r86g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)
**2022 will be one of the most contentious election fights in history. MILLIONS are going to be spent by Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden to solidify their majority in Congress. **
** **
But with your help, I’m not going to let that happen.
** **
**[Friend, can I count on your support in my mission to Defend Long Island with a small donation of just $20.22?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkftive3nm8mhsvbk3jcepg0ah5f6pon9v3ik9d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)**
** **
Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrfec0r6ebh3korlpfjk0ni83v9df1pjer602s38_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5imapr4c3h2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3v8a58cfrbshafta9u91sjuc316pn3pb2kl4jjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5im9oj4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6lq6fh3bfkh9ftqjm066kh7id40epu9ovj5cjso_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5im9oj4c5h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpj73pqn1noq5ug6bkm43go7qf1thikhh8b5pk58_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5im9oj4c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zunb3bp7torc583ncqtejbe724em2d7utsr5ljv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5im9oj4c5h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8gokls7gsicvs29n73hs5mqe2octtfiacesahgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf4opgeipr8s3l6ppr8ttlmpqn8dthm1gr4tb2m6o66o71csrrfcr0edi69p5ksup238h1e8he4933cphm2pb4s9i62oh5u)

It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down
subject: ALERT - U.S. Senate 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
I've been in tough fights before. This is the next one, and I need your help.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722216:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---
Peter,

I'm Mike Durant, and I'm officially announcing my run for the U.S. Senate seat in Alabama.

As a Black Hawk helicopter pilot, I put it all on the line for our country. Because I believe in America and all she stands for.**My next fight isn 't in the jungles of Panama, the deserts of Iraq or the streets of Mogadishu. It's right here at home, and it starts with taking on the Career Politicians who never had a real job and are taking our country in the wrong direction.**

I can't sit on the sidelines anymore. I'm sick of watching Biden and the Career Politicians in Washington dismantle all the progress President Trump made. As a Pro-Trump conservative, a veteran, a businessman, a father, and a patriot, it's time for me to do everything in my power to save the American Dream that I've risked everything to defend.
**_Watch My Announcement Video Below_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722216:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)

"Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying, "Whom shall I send? And who will go for us?"

And I said, "Here am I. Send me!"
Isaiah 6:8

** I'm asking the good people of Alabama to make me their Senator and give me a chance to represent our great state. I promise to support the policies of President Trump, to take on China, cut taxes, and strengthen our military. I'll take on the Career Politicians pushing vaccine mandates and fight to secure our southern border from the chaos unleashed by Joe Biden and his liberal mob.

**Joe Biden starts making bad decisions from the moment he wakes up in the morning, and I 'm running for US Senate to get rid of the Career Politicians who didn't serve their country and never held a real job.

Securing the Border, opposing vaccine mandates, and taking on the Big Tech companies trying to silence conservatives are just a few of the items on my agenda. I will always put America First, like President Trump did.** So, will you join me? Will you join my campaign against the Career Politicians?

| [**JOIN MY CAMPAIGN HERE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722216:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---

**_[Chip in whatever you can right below to ensure we have a true conservative and someone who's not afraid of a fight representing our great state of Alabama.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722216:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)_**

[**$25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722217:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---
[**$50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722218:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---
[**$100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722219:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---
[**$250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722220:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---
[**$500**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722221:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
---

We can't allow President Biden's poor decision-making to cripple our country any longer, and we can't trust Career Politicians to stand up to him. We've got to save it before it's too late and we must get back to President Trump's America First agenda. I hope you'll join me in that fight.

Thank you and God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58722216:JDZMK92N2:m:1:3298722022:9EB9A48AA871DD4FA5597CABAACA8D22:r)
Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down

PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
Not authorized by any other candidate.
---

DURANT FOR SENATE
PO Box 11548
Huntsville, AL 35814

In case you weren’t paying attention, Senator Ted Cruz recently called out the lefties on Twitter for using Sesame Street characters Big Bird and Elmo to encourage young children to get vaccinated.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: My re-election campaign needs your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58721860:6m_bh92NV:m:1:3253819041:FCA099CB0BC69451771EE0515012D3D2:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: The Next Step is in YOUR HANDS
body:
2 Weekends Left to Sign
| | | |
---
|
---
November 9, 2021
Since I announced my campaign in July to be your next Governor of Massachusetts, I have heard time and again from voters on the campaign trail is that they feel our government, at every level, is not listening to them. Massive federal spending means that families are feeling the pinch as the cost of goods and gas keep rising. Moms and Dads feel that the school system is not listening to their input about what their kids are being taught. And parents are frightened about government overriding the health decisions they want to have for their own precious children.
But the biggest fear our citizens have, by far, is that our government is no longer providing secure elections. The most sacred right we have as Americans in a representative democracy - one person, one vote - is in jeopardy.
Fortunately, in Massachusetts, you have the opportunity to help change course immediately. In addition to the work being done in the campaign to become your next Governor, I am supporting three citizens' petitions on the November 2022 state ballot, all of which we are in the final 2 weeks of the signature-collection phase:
1. Require ID to Vote ([ID to Vote ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ckkun-y_YZztJOyRncIZubIUbT_7JmiSGLsHOYL2QsQugYgacJpp4u100-GdkKsnU68Q1YyMUX9xwiUIjy9FlOqvGsjhTTDBbubgIKtzj1fM94TWrBkOjsYociDcpxyvZYO6O3M4gYttwQg_CnzIiA==&c=CRrNFSgJ-HxMYrc4LjGPyBvO3XBTtTXYfGmicMcfTRcnqpGVJrK-4A==&ch=aebVhRxeiIslK-DYN5EyEs5TJyxtq7XSM4f0Qb-qfE9wnqUyvJYC9w==)) 2. Reject the TCI Gas Tax ([Stop TCI Gas Tax ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ckkun-y_YZztJOyRncIZubIUbT_7JmiSGLsHOYL2QsQugYgacJpp4u100-GdkKsn7qKHeMnF5XChVvLTMp8KYyLXKfAfMnl_TOXjRg9JkdLD6ekOIXOIXigEqaR4yX4OJvweXd8nr0HMg2LwgGgr6A==&c=CRrNFSgJ-HxMYrc4LjGPyBvO3XBTtTXYfGmicMcfTRcnqpGVJrK-4A==&ch=aebVhRxeiIslK-DYN5EyEs5TJyxtq7XSM4f0Qb-qfE9wnqUyvJYC9w==)) 3. Provide health care to babies born alive. ([Newborn Protection ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ckkun-y_YZztJOyRncIZubIUbT_7JmiSGLsHOYL2QsQugYgacJpp4u100-GdkKsnkcqzXNZxYXEMliXrwb0RF5AvhUkTAn-CLhG8ec7rwvuLFw7Sa0bNFQgCcJNUmIoDIY58obRuw6p5RKlfDS_z_jARCMRw4knC&c=CRrNFSgJ-HxMYrc4LjGPyBvO3XBTtTXYfGmicMcfTRcnqpGVJrK-4A==&ch=aebVhRxeiIslK-DYN5EyEs5TJyxtq7XSM4f0Qb-qfE9wnqUyvJYC9w==))
We only have two weekends left to get enough signatures on each question to qualify it for next year's ballot - The future is in YOUR HANDS! Please donate a few hours of your time to get involved and help! Not only can you sign the ballot initiatives, but you can also collect signatures of your friends and neighbors.
More information about how to take action is on each of the websites listed above, including how to download the petition forms. You can print, sign the and take them in directly to your Town Clerk. Every signature counts!
Thank you for caring about Massachusetts' hard working families as much as I do... Together, we can re-empower the individual and defend our God-given right to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness!
---
|

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
[Diehl for Massachusetts ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ckkun-y_YZztJOyRncIZubIUbT_7JmiSGLsHOYL2QsQugYgacJpp4isYIB7--mjNblB_u_OtKCa0BEBblB6sXfPCfBuvjdavrbaK0I8cEv9pBnehiQdib7PfCRdytoGTgDVGAOEhpMx-UsJHt9HSmomQn-YX32hRNsK0orrpvKSRwa91iMzBxA==&c=CRrNFSgJ-HxMYrc4LjGPyBvO3XBTtTXYfGmicMcfTRcnqpGVJrK-4A==&ch=aebVhRxeiIslK-DYN5EyEs5TJyxtq7XSM4f0Qb-qfE9wnqUyvJYC9w==)

More information about how to take action is on each of the websites listed above, including how to download the petition forms. You can print, sign the and take them in directly to your Town Clerk. Every signature counts! Thank you for caring about Massachusetts' hard working families as much as I do... Together, we can re-empower the individual and defend our God-given right to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness! | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with |

subject: They Called Me 'The Black Mouth Of White Supremacy'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The radical liberals are losing their minds that the first Woman elected to the office of Lt. Governor is a Black Republican.

Their derangement has gone so far that **THEY WANT TO CALL ME A RACIST!**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723205:JbWCD92NX:m:1:3298722022:0A8823B15F94E864EB3E630FC62D48A3:r)
---

The radical liberals can say whatever they want, but it's obvious they are afraid that a Black Republican Woman will destroy their narrative that America and the Republican Party are fundamentally Racist.

---
| | [HELP STATE REPUBLICANS SHOW THE LIBERALS WHAT THE GOP IS REALLY ABOUT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723205:JbWCD92NX:m:1:3298722022:0A8823B15F94E864EB3E630FC62D48A3:r)
---

Our ticket was the most diverse in Virginia history, and we brought a sweeping Republican victory to Virginia, but we can't stop now.

We all have to stand together and show the left that we will not sit idly by as they spread their lies and call us racists.

**[I'm asking you to please stand with state Republicans and reject the left's lies about us. A donation of just $11, $22, or even $55 would be an enormous help in spreading our message.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723205:JbWCD92NX:m:1:3298722022:0A8823B15F94E864EB3E630FC62D48A3:r "I'm asking you to

spreading our message.")**

I know you won't stand by as they call you and me racists.

Thank you for all your support,

Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Anti-democratic PA lawmaker of the month goes to: Scott Perry.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We would like to present the most shameful Pennsylvanian of the month.

It's Congressman Scott Perry -- the winner of the Marjorie Taylor Greene Award.

This truly horrendous human being has all of the makings of a Pennsylvania MTG. He's a full-time idiot, Trump brown-noser, and subverter of justice. And he's laser-focused on helping his fellow insurrectionists destroy our democracy, like when he objected to the legitimate Pennsylvania Electoral College votes the day after the Jan. 6 uprising.

When STEVE BANNON -- another odious Trump cohort -- recently refused last month to comply with a congressional subpoena in the Jan. 6 investigation, Perry went out of his way to NOT vote him in criminal contempt of Congress.

The reason why is simple: PERRY was the only legislator who was actually NAMED in the subpoena.

As part of this inquiry into the attempted overthrow of our country, Perry was asked to hand over his phone records and online activity. Likely guilty as hell, he objected.

Doesn't get much worse than Scott Perry... Well, maybe with Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Help us fight and win to protect our democracy by working to mobilize voters to rid our government of people like Scott Perry and MTG. Donate today so that we can ramp up our organizing efforts to make PA a progressive state.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-progressives-in-pa?refcode=110921 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-progressives-in-pa?refcode=110921]Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

| | | Hey, it's Ed Durr, grandfather, truck driver, and the Republican who just defeated the most powerful Democrat in New Jersey on Tuesday.

Listen, I'm no political insider, just an everyday, blue collar American who was fed up with the Radical Left's big government policies and decided to do something about it. **[Will you step up too?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723480:6CF8i92yN:m:1:3299561967:1676746979E578AF1C7A9B03845BFFB0:r "Will you step up too?")**

When I launched my campaign, I didn't have experts or fancy polling, all I had was $153 and the belief that everyday Americans like you and I can still make a difference.
**STAND WITH ED DURR**
---
| | | [CHIP IN $15.30](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723480:6CF8i92yN:m:1:3299561967:1676746979E578AF1C7A9B03845BFFB0:r "Generic Button")
---

**[And my election proved that when grassroots patriots like us stand up and fight for what we believe in, there is nothing we can't accomplish! But our work isn't done yet. accomplish! But our work isn’t done yet. Here’s why: ")**

As long as Nancy Pelosi and her socialist pals in the Squad are running Washington D.C., our conservative values like the 2nd amendment and fiscal responsibility are in serious danger.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking you to step up and join our grassroots movement to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi by chipping in $15.30 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723480:6CF8i92yN:m:1:3299561967:1676746979E578AF1C7A9B03845BFFB0:r "That’s why I’m humbly asking you to step up and join our grassroots movement to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi by
chipping in $15.30 today. ")**
**STAND WITH ED**

| | | [CHIP IN $15.30](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723480:6CF8i92yN:m:1:3299561967:1676746979E578AF1C7A9B03845BFFB0:r "Generic
Button")
---

Because, if we are going to put an end to the radical policies coming from Washington, it'll take all of us to rise up and fight for our conservative values.

I hope my win showed you the power that grassroots patriots like you and I can have when we decide to get involved. **[So I hope you decide to join me in the fight. Humbly,

Ed Durr

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Red Wave Is Coming
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Welcome to the most important six months of our
political lives. Everyone in Washington is talking about the big
2021 Republican win in Virginia and the 2022 midterms a year from
now. But we can't take our eye off the ball. The real
battleground right now is not the general election next November,
but the Republican primaries this coming spring and summer. Just
watch: more and more House Democrats will start retiring. They
know their seats are lost, and their majority is over. They see
the Red Wave on the horizon. But at House Freedom Fund, we aren't
interested in the color of the wave, only how strong it is. We
don't want another weak Republican majority of corporate yes-men
and Swamp creatures. We want conservative fighters!
The issues that won for Glenn Youngkin in Virginia
- Covid hysteria, Critical Race Theory, trans extremism, election
integrity - are the issues the American people really care about.

That's why the House Freedom Fund is recruiting,
vetting, and endorsing candidates who are ready to lead on all of
them. Make no mistake: Republicans will almost certainly win back
Congress in 2022. The only choice before us is: What kind of
Republicans will we send to Washington? One thing we all know:
RINOs won't rescue America. That's why the fight right now is in
Republican primaries. The winners of those primaries will
determine who really controls Congress heading into 2024, the
most important election of our lifetimes. With a true, fighting,
conservative majority, Congress can:

✅ Find out what REALLY happened in the 2020
election, and on January 6;

✅ Tell the truth about Biden's failure on the
Southern border;

✅ End funding of Critical Race Theory insanity in
federal agencies and contractors;

✅ Subpoena the Justice Department and FBI about
their targeting of parents protesting corrupt school boards; and,

✅ STOP Joe Biden's destructive agenda dead in its
tracks.

Join this fight by making a split contribution to
our priority House candidates today!
Building a conservative majority in Congress is
HFF's only mission for the next six months. We don't need more
establishment cowards. We need 50 more Jim Jordans, Marjorie
Taylor Greenes, Lauren Boeberts, Byron Donalds, and Yvette
Harrells. We need leaders who are ready for the war the Left is
about to launch against conservatives, parents, and patriots
around the country. We cannot win the battles of the next six
months without you. Please support HFF and our candidates today,
and turn the 2021 Virginia victory into a 2022 nationwide
blowout!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for everything you to do help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

FREEDOM CAUCUS
CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

subject: They Called Me 'The Black Mouth Of White Supremacy'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The radical liberals are losing their minds that the first Woman elected to the office of Lt. Governor is a Black Republican.

Their derangement has gone so far that **THEY WANT TO CALL ME A RACIST!**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723184:6t3N392QN:m:1:3253819041:DBBF65B689E4499DB0FB45A1E417AE9C:r)
---

The radical liberals can say whatever they want, but it's obvious they are afraid that a Black Republican Woman will destroy their narrative that America and the Republican Party are fundamentally Racist.

---
| | [HELP STATE REPUBLICANS SHOW THE LIBERALS WHAT THE GOP IS REALLY ABOUT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723184:6t3N392QN:m:1:3253819041:DBBF65B689E4499DB0FB45A1E417AE9C:r)
---

Our ticket was the most diverse in Virginia history, and we brought a sweeping Republican victory to Virginia, but we can't stop now.

We all have to stand together and show the left that we will not sit idly by as they spread their lies and call us racists.

**[I'm asking you to please stand with state Republicans and reject the left's lies about us. A donation of just $11, $22, or even $55 would be an enormous help in spreading our message.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58723184:6t3N392QN:m:1:3253819041:DBBF65B689E4499DB0FB45A1E417AE9C:r "I'm asking you to please stand with state Republicans and reject the left's lies about us. A donation of just $11, $22, or even $55 would be an
enormous help in spreading our message.")**

I know you won't stand by as they call you and me racists.

Thank you for all your support,

Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears
---
| |
* * *
**We 're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:**************61 of 99 state legislative chambers**************25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats**************28 of 50 secretary of state offices**************11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials**************Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.************************************************************************

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. name: Mike Lee
subject: Is capitalism missing something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Acton Institute
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58724852:6hTUJ92yN:m:1:3298722022:F5BA4B359AAB9EFD5F567E5BF4F5D5AF:r)
_A Personal Message From Senator Mike Lee
on behalf of the Acton Institute_

Peter, this may be the most out-of-the-ordinary email you will receive this week. Talking about this is not considered popular...

Is capitalism missing something?

Is the United States or our system of government missing something?

**Unfortunately, as of recently I believe the answer is a resounding, yes.** And our Founding Fathers warned us about the dangers of this...

_Free markets without the support of a virtuous society means NOTHING_. The future of the Republic without a virtuous people is in grave danger.

**My friend, Rev. Robert A. Sirco, the President of the Acton Institute, is leading the fight to advocate for a virtuous and free society.** _The Acton Institute is a pro-freedom religious non-profit organization that promotes the benefits of free enterprise to religious communities, business people, students, and educators_.

As a man of faith and believer that free market capitalism requires a moral backbone to create a free and prosperous society, I am choosing to support Acton Institute's mission and have agreed to help them raise $25,000.

[**I encourage you to prayerfully consider donating $20, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or even more to support their mission >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58724852:6hTUJ92yN:m:1:3298722022:F5BA4B359AAB9EFD5F567E5BF4F5D5AF:r)

It's no secret I love the United States, our Constitution (I carry a pocket Constitution with me nearly everywhere I go), and that I love talking about how free markets solve problems and unleash human potential. But we do not discuss how morality is key to the survival of our country.

The Acton Institute is right.

Without building a culture that fosters the strength of the family, compassion, voluntary charity, and respect for human life we are doomed to succumb to radical activists pushing things such as socialism, Critical Race Theory, and "Woke" culture.

I work in the United States Senate... and I can personally tell you it is a morally bankrupt organization. And whenever I stand up for basic moral or family values, the media relentlessly attacks me.

[**Fortunately, the Acton Institute is fighting back! Please consider sending the Acton Institute a gift of any amount using one of the links below:

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58724852:6hTUJ92yN:m:1:3298722022:F5BA4B359AAB9EFD5F567E5BF4F5D5AF:r)
[**Donate $20 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58724852:6hTUJ92yN:m:1:3298722022:F5BA4B359AAB9EFD5F567E5BF4F5D5AF:r)

The Acton Institute fights for our values by influencing business leaders, educators, and community leaders who have a DIRECT impact on our culture.

We've seen what happens when a morally corrupt culture takes over our schools...

Now, "Woke" culture has invaded the workplace. Nearly every major corporation has bent the knee to subjugate themselves to radical activists.

You and I desperately need the Acton Institute to lead this fight and restore our cultural values of freedom, individual liberty, compassion, and respect for human life and dignity.

The Acton Institute does this by producing award winning documentaries (some have even appeared on Netflix!) that spread our message, publishing online content to persuade everyday Americans about our ideas, and by directly engaging with community members.

[**Please consider supporting Acton Institute 's mission to create a virtuous and free society by clicking here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58724852:6hTUJ92yN:m:1:3298722022:F5BA4B359AAB9EFD5F567E5BF4F5D5AF:r)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by the Acton Institute

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
