subject: GM and Toyota Shut Down
body:
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8051%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8J21QMhs%2fp4sNUKLAjVqdw&sysid=1)
| Dear Reader, If you're like most people, you may have noticed some... strange things... popping up in the news lately. Once again, the word "Crisis" is being thrown around. But this is unlike anything we've seen before...
* Major automakers - from GM to Toyota are shutting their factories.
* Analysts are warning that Christmas, as we know it, may not happen this year.
* And massive food distributor, Sysco, says it's going to have trouble stocking grocery store shelves.

Not because of a recession or virus... Not because of a new lockdown or war... But the very opposite. **[A new threat](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17150%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WExmazWf3v%2bhlRbb5u77jw&sysid=1)** which could soon cause empty shelves as far as the eye can see. What exactly is going on? If you're an investor... if you own a home or business... if you are retired or plan to retire any time soon... Please...**[take the time to view this special presentation now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17151%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nrjf%2ftRDdDoyTkobAgq4dA&sysid=1)**. It explains all the details. Everything could ride on the steps you take today... Regards, Van Bryan
Editorial Director, Brownstone Research **P.S.** It's critical you get this information right away. Because the last time something like this happened... unprepared investors**lost as much as 90% of their wealth**. While the few who knew what was happening and what to do had the chance to **_gain_ thirty times their money** in a single year. **[Click here to learn why the difference was so drastic.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17152%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y6fRil8qZV2aRkM5B8BG7g&sysid=1)**

name: Jacqueline Coleman
subject: Why education is personal to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Before serving as Lieutenant Governor, I was an educator and worked as assistant principal at Nelson County High School in Bardstown. I know firsthand how important it is that every child in Kentucky can receive a quality education, and just what our teachers and school districts need to provide that. The fight to improve Kentucky's public schools has always been personal to me, Peter.

Before serving as Lieutenant Governor, I was an educator and worked as assistant principal at Nelson County High School in Bardstown. I know firsthand how important it is that every child in Kentucky can receive a quality education, and just what our teachers and school districts need to provide that.

That's why I've been proud to work alongside Andy and ensure that improving our public schools remains one of our top priorities. We've already made great progress for students across the Commonwealth. **Here are just some of our accomplishments so far:**

✅ Reorganized the state board of education and appointed new members who support public education,
✅ Waived testing fees for all first time GED takers,
✅ Introduced an "education first" budget proposal that increases education spending by $400 million and includes much-deserved raises for our teachers,
✅ Developed the Commonwealth Education Continuum to help students through transition points in their education.

We've accomplished a lot so far, but there's still more work to be done. From cutting down class sizes to reducing excessive testing and expanding medical and mental health support for our students, Andy and I will continue to work to make our public schools the best they can be.

I'm incredibly honored to be a part of an administration that prioritizes our children's futures, and I'm grateful to have you on our side.

Thank you,

Jacqueline
Lieutenant Governor | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q4-2021?refcode=em21_211108_educat_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211108_educat_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States

subject: did you see Josh’s message?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS

| | Josh reached out to you yesterday with an important update: **there’s one year to go until Election Day!**

[We’re hard at work on Team Gottheimer getting ready for the year ahead, but we need your help. Read Josh’s message below, then give $20 or any amount to support our campaign. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38453123/315526271/-1301873340?amount=20&refcode2=1ac333a9-7441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=JG_EM_FR_3MO_211109_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWMzMzNhOS03NDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2kj008GbuzloLWuVvktVyw6YkgDbphteLDnIS5T9UYM=)

**_Josh’s Original Message:_**

Last Friday, we passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill and changed the lives of millions of hard working Americans. This means a new era of jobs, fixed roads, and green energy initiatives. **This is exactly the type of work I’m here to do: implementing real change that impacts real people.**

November 8, 2022 is _officially_ one year away, which means we only have 365 days left until Election Day.

That’s 365 days of constant hard work to reach every voter in New Jersey’s 5th District and with redistricting just around the corner, we don’t even know for sure who that will be.

[This election is about every single person showing up and making their voices heard. That starts now by expanding our campaign, and we need your help. Can you chip in $20 today to join our campaign and help us through the next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38453124/315526272/-1301873340?amount=20&refcode2=1ac333a9-7441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=JG_EM_FR_3MO_211109_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWMzMzNhOS03NDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2kj008GbuzloLWuVvktVyw6YkgDbphteLDnIS5T9UYM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I would have been a YES on bipartisan infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
A message from Congressional candidate Kirsten Engel about the Bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act.
[**_As our next Congresswoman, Kirsten Engel will support legislation like the Bipartisan _****_Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. Help send her to Congress by chipping in $10, $100, or whatever you can today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38453379/315528282/41694283?refcode=X_110921_BIB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODExYmIwNy03NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcHelIqTkHrcIYoBm8rqeupCrVY8-APomu7vVxknljA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38453380/315528283/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODExYmIwNy03NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcHelIqTkHrcIYoBm8rqeupCrVY8-APomu7vVxknljA=&emci=d5ea397c-6641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0811bb07-7641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,

The Bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act that passed over the weekend is a tremendously important piece of legislation that will help our economy and our quality of life in countless ways. This historic bill invests over $1.2 trillion where we need it most:
* Repairing crumbling **roads and bridges**
* Bringing **high speed internet access** to rural Arizona
* Repairing and building new **ports of entry**
* Improving our **airports**
* Repairing **dams** and funding the **Drought Contingency Plan**
* Investing in critical **wildfire management** programs, including raising pay for firefighters

**I would’ve been proud to work on this vital piece of legislation and would have been an enthusiastic YES.**

Not all Democrats agree with me on that, and I understand their frustration. **But this legislation is too important to working families and everyday Arizonans.** We needed to pass it. As the adage goes, don’t let _perfect_ be the enemy of _good_. Or in this, case: _very good_.

And as excited as I am to see this bill pass, I know the job isn’t done. **We need to pass President Biden’s Build Back Batter Act**, which will help Arizona families by:
* Lowering the cost of **prescription drug prices**
* Investing in **renewable energy jobs**
* Expanding the **Child Tax Credit** (which is the single largest middle class tax cut in the nation’s history)

I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work, passing legislation like this for Southern Arizona. I hope you’ll join me!

Sincerely,
---

clean_body: A message from Congressional candidate Kirsten Engel about the Bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. = Friend, The Bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act that passed over the weekend is a tremendously important piece of legislation that will help our economy and our quality of life in countless ways. This historic bill invests over $1.2 trillion where we need it most: Repairing crumbling roads and bridges Bringing high speed internet access to rural Arizona Repairing and building new ports of entry Improving our airports Repairing dams and funding the Drought Contingency Plan Investing in critical wildfire management programs, including raising pay for firefighters I would’ve been proud to work on this vital piece of legislation and would have been an enthusiastic YES. Not all Democrats agree with me on that, and I understand their frustration. But this legislation is too important to working families and everyday Arizonans. We needed to pass it. As the adage goes, don’t let perfect be the enemy of good. Or in this, case: very good. And as excited as I am to see this bill pass, I know the job isn’t done. We need to pass President Biden’s Build Back Batter Act, which will help Arizona families by: Lowering the cost of prescription drug prices Investing in renewable energy jobs Expanding the Child Tax Credit** (which is the single largest middle class tax cut in the nation’s history) I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work, passing legislation like this for Southern Arizona. I hope you’ll join me! Sincerely, If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Paid for by Engel for Arizona Thanks, Team Engel Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: sharing a photo of my dad and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38454260/315532534/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk376-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg1YzhjNC03NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPgs_iY0kJ9f2zOFavkcx85zjQiSOYiMAWgqwp5ZZSo=)
Peter – you might be wondering why I’m dropping into your inbox with a photo of my dad and me. Well, my dad's story has a lot to do with why I’m running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Chuck Grassley, so I hope you’ll allow me a moment to explain.
You see, Dad, who is retired now, worked as a Union pipefitter-welder – and it was a good-paying job. But his body got beat to hell over the years as he worked his tail off just trying to provide for our family.
I will forever be grateful for the sacrifices he made, and I will also forever fight for those who’ve gone through the same. But far too often, our government helps out the big guys with the fat wallets rather than the working families like mine.
**There's no clearer example of that failed, out-of-touch leadership than my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).** He's spent decades attacking union members like my dad and their right to build good lives. In fact, when the UAW members working at John Deere in Iowa started striking for a better future for their families, Sen. Grassley had no idea the strike was even happening.
I’m so proud to be an Iowan, to stand in solidarity with the men and women at UAW, and to ALWAYS stick up for working families like the one I grew up in. That's why I'm running for Senate – and why I am determined to defeat Sen. Grassley.
**I’m in this fight for working families, like the one I come from, because Sen. Grassley has stopped showing up for us and representing our interests.**
[**If you believe working families in Iowa need a stronger voice – if you’re with me to flip this state blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority – then I’m asking you to make a grassroots contribution, right here and right now. Chip in whatever you can before midnight tonight to defeat Sen. Grassley and give working families in Iowa a senator who will fight for them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38454261/315532543/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk376-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg1YzhjNC03NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPgs_iY0kJ9f2zOFavkcx85zjQiSOYiMAWgqwp5ZZSo=)
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.

With gratitude,

– Abby

clean_body: | | | = Peter – you might be wondering why I’m dropping into your inbox with a photo of my dad and me. Well, my dad's story has a lot to do with why I’m running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Chuck Grassley, so I hope you’ll allow me a moment to explain. You see, Dad, who is retired now, worked as a Union pipefitter-welder – and it was a good-paying job. But his body got beat to hell over the years as he worked his tail off just trying to provide for our family. I will forever be grateful for the sacrifices he made, and I will also forever fight for those who’ve gone through the same. But far too often, our government helps out the big guys with the fat wallets rather than the working families like mine. There's no clearer example of that failed, out-of-touch leadership than my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). He's spent decades attacking union members like my dad and their right to build good lives. In fact, when the UAW members working at John Deere in Iowa started striking for a better future for their families, Sen. Grassley had no idea the strike was even happening. I’m so proud to be an Iowan, to stand in solidarity with the men and women at UAW, and to ALWAYS stick up for working families like the one I grew up in. That's why I'm running for Senate – and why I am determined to defeat Sen. Grassley. I’m in this fight for working families, like the one I come from, because Sen. Grassley has stopped showing up for us and representing our interests. = Thank you for standing with me in this fight. With gratitude, – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: I know I’m not alone in thinking this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r) | |
---
Peter,

**You might've already heard the big news: cry baby Adam Kinzinger has decided he's not running for Congress anymore.**

I'm sure I'm not the only one who's thinking this: GOOD!

Americans are sick and tired of an elitist political class that doesn't understand kitchen table issues - and we're MORE THAN HAPPY to say goodbye to RINOs like Adam.

That's what I told Fox News when they asked...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r)
The thing is, Kinzinger has been wasting our time for far too long.

Even in his last days...

He couldn't even be bothered to fight against the radical progressives, instead, he was fighting WITH them.

He couldn't be bothered to defend parents, teachers, or first responders against Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates, instead, he insisted they should not have choices.

He couldn't be bothered to concern himself with the crisis on our border while millions of illegal immigrants overwhelmed our system.

_Instead, this guy was on MSNBC_ , attempting to boost his profile, because he cares more about being a part of the fake news than he cares about defending those who gave him his opportunity in Congress.

I've had enough of Adam Kinzinger and I think we're glad to see him go.

This is our chance to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE by electing REAL leaders who understand the issues affecting the average American - leaders like me.
[**I AGREE: SUPPORT CATALINA LAUF >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r)
**Peter, trust me I know the left is already scared of what I 'm bringing to the table.**
* I'm an unapologetic MAGA conservative.
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants.
* I'm a former Trump administration official.
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

_And unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have an R by their name, I proudly stand by my conservative values. _

While RINOs like Adam Kinzinger - and the long line of fakers who want to replace him - will happily masquerade as Republicans, they will do nothing to actually fight the liberal agenda that is destroying our nation.

**_But I will._**

_I 've had enough of the out-of-touch, Nancy Pelosi-led Congress. And unlike those who refuse to upset the status quo, I'm willing to do what it takes to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE._
[**JOIN ME: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r)
_And my record proves it. _

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce.

As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress.

And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

As your member of Congress, I'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for a chance to sit at the table with the political elites.** **

**I 'll TAKE BACK THE HOUSE for the people - not for more power. **

And trust me - I'm in this thing to WIN. And though I may not be running against Kinzinger anymore - I'm still running FOR YOU.

I hope you'll show your support for me today by making a small donation.
[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r)
Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725938:JGZgU92CN:m:1:3298722022:6F7A086680968E2E9BC3B0D6929D6457:r)

Catalina Lauf

name: Farah Melendez
subject: [364 Days Out] Strategy Memo
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

I wanted to give you an inside look at where we stand 364 days from election day and why we’re asking for your support now.

Election Day is just under one year away, but building the movement we’ll need to defeat Ron DeSantis and bring something new to Tallahassee has already started.

To win this race, we need to reach voters in every corner of Florida. Doing so requires hiring the best political minds in the country, which is exactly what we’re working on right now.

Team, we’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 online this week to fund our new hires for field, communications, and finance. Can you click here to chip in now and help us hit this goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1106anniversary]

I know there are plenty of fundraising asks in your inbox right now. We’re being honest and upfront with you, team: we need your support to build a winning organization.

And we’re going to keep you in the loop over the next 364 days (and counting!) because you’re a critical part of this movement.

I know that if we continue to grow our movement, execute our plan, and spread the word that Nikki is fighting for something new, we’re going to win this race. Chip in now to help us get it done →

Thanks for being on our team,

Farah Melendez
Campaign Manager

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: BREAKING NEWS: GOP Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58726090:JOS5O92SN:m:1:3299561967:DB756B6422AD4561E6EB6917E515098E:r)
Patriot,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

The University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58726090:JOS5O92SN:m:1:3299561967:DB756B6422AD4561E6EB6917E515098E:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58726090:JOS5O92SN:m:1:3299561967:DB756B6422AD4561E6EB6917E515098E:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last night are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last night.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58726091:JOS5O92SN:m:1:3299561967:DB756B6422AD4561E6EB6917E515098E:r) A note for Patriot, from Adam Laxalt:

Patriot, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58726091:JOS5O92SN:m:1:3299561967:DB756B6422AD4561E6EB6917E515098E:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58726092:JOS5O92SN:m:1:3299561967:DB756B6422AD4561E6EB6917E515098E:r)

name: Team Patty
subject: We CAN keep the Senate blue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
But we can’t do it without your support.
#
There’s no doubt about it, Peter:
We need to not only defend our Senate Democratic majority in 2022, we need to expand it.
_But we can’t do that if we lose a single seat_. And in an election this consequential, we can’t take a single race for granted. That’s why it’s critically important that we do everything we can now to make sure Washington state stays blue and doesn’t see the same sort of extreme Republican surge like in Virginia or New Jersey.
**[With less than a year until Election Day, will you chip in $5 to support Patty Murray?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38457369/315539053/677971007?refcode=pm_em_211109_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDY0YWY1Zi03YTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDlvbZ-afF_xWbsdhWQMh0ldZ5sczOekcn5s4mzUlAQ=)**
Peter, Republicans are only one Senate seat away from reinstalling Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader. And we know what that means -- _more obstruction, more dysfunction, more climate inaction, and more help for the very wealthiest at the expense of everyone else. _
Now more than ever, America needs to keep our economic recovery going and help families, communities, and businesses build back fairer and stronger. We simply can’t count on the Republicans to do the right thing. They absolutely can’t be trusted with control of the Senate.
**We _CAN_ keep the Senate blue -- but we can’t do it without your support, Peter.**
**[Patty Murray is asking supporters like you to become 2022 Founding Donors and join her in the fight for the Democratic Senate majority. Will you make a $5 contribution now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38457370/315539054/677971007?refcode=pm_em_211109_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDY0YWY1Zi03YTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDlvbZ-afF_xWbsdhWQMh0ldZ5sczOekcn5s4mzUlAQ=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty
** **

| | There are only 365 days left to make a difference in this election. That may seem like a lot of time, but it will fly by quicker than you think.

I didn’t start this campaign to do a year-long media tour and then go back home. I started it to give the people a true voice in Washington. We’ve been dealing with thoughtless, uncaring leaders for years — too many politicians in Washington would rather chat with mega donors at fancy fundraisers than talk to the folks they actually represent.

**We have _real_ Americans with _real_ issues that need to be addressed – but before we can do that, we have to defeat Ron Johnson. name: Abigail
subject: A once-in-a-lifetime investment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/thhNFGmg9x3kD2rfPT3r8WVH0isIgPx_avhPCLkzIRU=/SvTUfOKs7dunpkMEoWicCUBuI1-rqXn9ST6QcKAm4zE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211109-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

**In case you didn 't hear,** the historic, job-creating, and bipartisan infrastructure package passed both houses of Congress. This has huge implications for our district - including a shift to electric school buses and increasing climate resiliency - and I could not be prouder to have voted for this transformative bill.

As I continue meeting with Central Virginians, I hear common priorities: rebuilding from the pandemic, keeping Virginia's economy strong, and creating jobs. This long-overdue investment in infrastructure directly addresses each and demonstrates that bipartisanship is not something of a bygone era.

And, above all, this moment reminds us **that when we work together, we can accomplish great things and deliver for people across the country.**

The package is on its way to President Biden's desk to be signed into law and will soon make an impact for Central Virginians. Here's what that impact looks like in Virginia:

🚗 ** $7 billion** invested in our roads & highways
📶** At least $100 million** to fund statewide, high-speed broadband expansion

🏗️** $537 million** to replace and repair our bridges

🚰** $738 million** to replace lead pipes and improve our water infrastructure

Passing this bill means we are on course towards creating thousands of good-paying jobs for Virginians, saving Virginia families thousands each year, and fostering long-term economic growth. We want to ensure Virginia remains the best state in the nation for business, and this game-changing investment in our economy acts as a major boost for that goal.

I'm honored to have worked hard in passing this package, and there's so much more I want to accomplish for Central Virginia. [_**Will you contribute to my re-election campaign today so I can continue delivering results for Central Virginia?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/thhNFGmg9x3kD2rfPT3r8WVH0isIgPx_avhPCLkzIRU=/SvTUfOKs7dunpkMEoWicCUBuI1-rqXn9ST6QcKAm4zE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211109-1-EM&amount=25)

Abigail

Big news, friend: North Carolina's Republican state legislature just passed new congressional maps for the next decade.

There's A LOT wrong with these maps.

For starters, they're brazen gerrymanders that aim to silence the voices of millions. They're drawn to give Republicans an advantage in 10 of 14 total congressional seats despite party registration in North Carolina being split 50-50.

But if there's one silver lining, it's in Madison Cawthorn's district, the new NC-14. Thanks in part to population growth in Western North Carolina, NC-14 has swung seven points left. **This represents the biggest Democratic shift in the entire state, making NC-14 one of the most competitive races in the coming midterm.**

**[There's never been a better chance to break the GOP's stranglehold on Western NC and unseat far-right extremist Madison Cawthorn. Peter,

Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and their socialist allies in Congress fight against everything our nation stands for... life... liberty... and all the great things we as Americans hold dear.

But they are also against the one thing that defends those values... our Second Amendment.

You and I know that our Second Amendment rights are not for hunting or sport, but to defend our Constitutional and God-given rights from those who seek to destroy them... from those who would be Tyrants.

That is why I am launching the OFFICIAL PETITION TO NULLIFY ALL BIDEN’S GUN LAWS.

Joe Biden and his gun-grabbing socialist cronies are constantly pushing laws to break down our Second Amendment more and more. But ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!

The American people are SICK and TIRED of the Washington Elite telling us that their laws override our GOD-GIVEN RIGHT to _“Keep and Bear Arms”_. While they are protected by their own personal army of armed guards in Washington DC.

This is why I am running... because we need CONSERVATIVE FIGHTERS! America-First champions who will STAND UP to Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and their gun-grabbing gang of socialists!

If you’re TIRED of the Washington Elite coming after our guns... JOIN ME and SIGN THE OFFICIAL PETITION TO NULLIFY ALL BIDEN’S GUN LAWS!

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Thank you, Virginia.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Let’s get to work

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdnv2d9pcd4266l837i57eu4ruuib7c02gt687jg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriots,

Virginia, we did it. None of this would have been possible without YOU. I am so incredibly thankful and blessed for each and every one of you. _**We won this, and we won this together!**_

Day one, we are going to get to work. We are going to restore excellence in our schools, invest in the largest education budget in the history of the Commonwealth, EMBRACE our parents, not ignore them, reduce our cost of living, and cut taxes on the retirement income of our Veterans.

We are going to keep our communities SAFE - we will stand up for Law Enforcement. We are jump-starting our jobs and reinvigorating our economy. **Most importantly,** Virginia will be OPEN for business.

My team and I have already set up a game plan, but to achieve that we have to start NOW. We have no time to waste. We need to start off strong going into Day One. | | [**START DAY ONE STRONG**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zre7f7h8i7vg44skb4casq52crudm9gbg4k6e1i8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs)
---
It’s time for Virginia to be the place where everyone wants to live, not leave. Together, we will change the trajectory of the Commonwealth, and we are starting that transformation on DAY ONE!

**There is no time to wait; we work in REAL time, not Government time.** Let’s keep this momentum going.

| [$15](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjt3dsicoo4sleh5lv7ca1et2ae8un7l43j324t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")
---
| [$35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z51hgfbimnro8fb0trgmele8og2dpv13pefa00to_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")
---
| [$50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeqdnd316o452mjp69pkodf0s6c42bra16euc0jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")
---
| [$100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zohmo2s1np3grf8scj8ul004ed5bmr07k65kv31g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")
---
| [$250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfm83o8a20pq2elbb74dctmhn3nts5p25ps0v1e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")
---
| [Other](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z44d4quk3g052r2jmnv22ubt04qhm1biju853sso_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")
---

Because of your support, we will be able to start Day One off strong. We aren’t going to wait until January, we are going to start now.

God Bless you, and God Bless the Commonwealth of Virginia.

**Let’s GO and let’s get to work!**

For Virginia,
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8cmfkc78u1dcrhac3ihnhma5lv4uagfae9nmtto_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5jmeoj4cdh2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: It was never about "science"
body:
Dear Peter, The radical left is doing everything it can to destroy the First Amendment and religious liberty. From vaccines mandates that don't allow religious exemptions to shutting down churches, leftists are STILL using COVID-19 as an excuse to attack people of faith. We are fighting back. But we can't do it without your help! [**Will you stand for religious liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725859:J3wXg92Nv:m:1:3253819041:AAADD2F0B405A329C6F9DCC1DD726D9D:r) You see, once the left had an excuse, they attacked religion. It began with politicians using the pandemic to shut down places of worship and to threaten and persecute people of faith. Of course, at the same time they kept abortion clinics, liquor stores, marijuana dispensaries open... _but they shut down churches and threatened pastors with massive fines!_ Now, they're using mandates to force people to get a vaccine and, in many cases, not allowing for ANY religious exemption! And if people choose their faith, they're being fired or suspended and cannot provide for their family. It's a disgusting and unconstitutional attack against people of faith. **These mandates are NOT about the "science" - they're a direct and blatant attack on religion from the radical left!** And I have bad news for you.... These attacks are just beginning. With this radical, anti-religious liberty administration in the White House, it's open season on our First Amendment rights. People or faith are under attack, and the radical left is not going to stop until they completely stamp out our freedoms! If we don't act now, the government will decide if your church is allowed to meet, if your child's school will be able to open, and how you get to exercise your religious liberties. [**That 's why it so urgent that you join the fight with a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725859:J3wXg92Nv:m:1:3253819041:AAADD2F0B405A329C6F9DCC1DD726D9D:r) **Here at the Center for American Liberty we aren 't just fighting back - WE'RE WINNING!!** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream, and Fox and Friends**._ I've been on a lot lately talking about our many battles and **_victories_** against the radical left and their attempts to destroy our religious liberties -**_including the United States Supreme Court!_**
* This year alone, we've had three victories at the U.S. Supreme Court that forced radical governors to open Houses of Worship and to stop unconstitutional rules targeting people of faith.
* We've forced public schools in Montgomery County, MD to allow religious exemptions for their vaccine mandate!
* And right now, we're fighting for parents' right to choose where they send their children - including private and religious schools.

**And that 's just a few of our victories, and ongoing cases!** [**Help us keep winning and defending our freedoms with an urgent gift of $35 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725859:J3wXg92Nv:m:1:3253819041:AAADD2F0B405A329C6F9DCC1DD726D9D:r) We've seen these awful attacks in just about every state, across different religions, and even in "conservative" states. **This isn 't just a New York or California problem... This is a problem for EVERY American.** It's something I never thought could happen in the United States, but it is. The minute this pandemic began, the radical left decided to use it as a weapon. And now, after almost 2 years of this INSANITY, they're still using COVID-19 to increase the size of government while eroding our freedoms. Now, I know that's a lot of bad news.... But the good news is that the founding fathers designed our government using a system of checks and balances. When the people stand up and hold public officials accountable in court, our liberties are being restored. That's why we must stand up together today. We have a chance to end the left's targeting of our religious freedoms. If we don't take immediate action on this.... TODAY, the America we pass to the next generation will not be the America that you and I know and love. [**So please join me to protect our liberty with a tax-deductible donation today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725859:J3wXg92Nv:m:1:3253819041:AAADD2F0B405A329C6F9DCC1DD726D9D:r) **My goal is to have as many patriots as possible on board** , so that the next time a crony leftist politician tries to attack religious liberty, I can leverage our support at a moment's notice! [**STAND FOR RELIGIOUS LIBERTY TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58725859:J3wXg92Nv:m:1:3253819041:AAADD2F0B405A329C6F9DCC1DD726D9D:r) To win this fight, before it even hits the court room, we need your help. I hope you'll join me! Sincerely, Harmeet K. clean_body: Dear Peter, The radical left is doing everything it can to destroy the First Amendment and religious liberty. From vaccines mandates that don't allow religious exemptions to shutting down churches, leftists are STILL using COVID-19 as an excuse to attack people of faith. We are fighting back. But we can't do it without your help! You see, once the left had an excuse, they attacked religion. It began with politicians using the pandemic to shut down places of worship and to threaten and persecute people of faith. Of course, at the same time they kept abortion clinics, liquor stores, marijuana dispensaries open... but they shut down churches and threatened pastors with massive fines! Now, they're using mandates to force people to get a vaccine and, in many cases, not allowing for ANY religious exemption! And if people choose their faith, they're being fired or suspended and cannot provide for their family. It's a disgusting and unconstitutional attack against people of faith. These mandates are NOT about the "science" - they're a direct and blatant attack on religion from the radical left! And I have bad news for you.... These attacks are just beginning. With this radical, anti-religious liberty administration in the White House, it's open season on our First Amendment rights. People or faith are under attack, and the radical left is not going to stop until they completely stamp out our freedoms! If we don't act now, the government will decide if your church is allowed to meet, if your child's school will be able to open, and how you get to exercise your religious liberties. Here at the Center for American Liberty we aren 't just fighting back - WE'RE WINNING!! My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on Newsmax and Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream, and Fox and Friends. I've been on a lot lately talking about our many battles and victories against the radical left and their attempts to destroy our religious liberties -including the United States Supreme Court! This year alone, we've had three victories at the U.S. Supreme Court that forced radical governors to open Houses of Worship and to stop unconstitutional rules targeting people of faith. We've forced public schools in Montgomery County, MD to allow religious exemptions for their vaccine mandate! And right now, we're fighting for parents' right to choose where they send their children - including private and religious schools. And that 's just a few of our victories, and ongoing cases! We've seen these awful attacks in just about every state, across different religions, and even in "conservative" states. This isn 't just a New York or California problem... This is a problem for EVERY American. It's something I never thought could happen in the United States, but it is. The minute this pandemic began, the radical left decided to use it as a weapon. And now, after almost 2 years of this INSANITY, they're still using COVID-19 to increase the size of government while eroding our freedoms. Now, I know that's a lot of bad news.... But the good news is that the founding fathers designed our government using a system of checks and balances. When the people stand up and hold public officials accountable in court, our liberties are being restored. That's why we must stand up together today. We have a chance to end the left's targeting of our religious freedoms. If we don't take immediate action on this.... TODAY, the America we pass to the next generation will not be the America that you and I know and love. My goal is to have as many patriots as possible on board , so that the next time a crony leftist politician tries to attack religious liberty, I can leverage our support at a moment's notice! To win this fight, before it even hits the court room, we need your help. I hope you'll join me! Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon ** The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Donna Imam
subject: Our work isn't finished.
body:
This is a major investment in our crumbling infrastructure that we badly need. It will create high-wage jobs with good benefits for the American people, but our work is far from finished. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38460618/315549181/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTVjNjIxNC04MjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwKHE8v4PrAYm2AF7dqKSQuGr6r_NvyuAY5sjkdQKNg=)
Friend,

Late on Friday, Democrats in the House and 13 Republicans voted to pass President Biden's $1.2 trillion Bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act commonly known as BIF. The final vote was 228-206.

The legislation invests in America's infrastructure, including roads, bridges, mass transit, rail, airports, ports, and waterways. It improves broadband access, electric grids, and water systems, and also incentivizes electric vehicle charging stations.

**In short: This is a major investment in our crumbling infrastructure that we badly need. It will create high-wage jobs with good benefits for the American people, but our work is far from finished.** With the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ passed, Democrats in the House and Senate need to pass the Build Back Better Act as soon as possible.

[**Please add your name to this petition calling on House and Senate Democrats to pass the Build Back Better Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38460619/315549182/-1377360634?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTVjNjIxNC04MjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwKHE8v4PrAYm2AF7dqKSQuGr6r_NvyuAY5sjkdQKNg=&emci=0a5c6214-8241-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0e5c6214-8241-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7168977)

body:

#
Team,
We have less than a year to go until Election Day 2022 -- and we are in for a real fight.
**In fact, Crystal Ball just downgraded the Nevada Senate race to “TOSS-UP” status.**
It’s going to take all of us working as hard as we can for the next 364 days if we’re going to reelect Senator Catherine Cortez Masto and keep the U.S. Senate blue next November.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: 364 days to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
|
#
Friends, It may feel like the last election was just yesterday, but the reality is that the 2022 midterm elections are now just ONE YEAR AWAY. In just 364 days I am up for re-election and we will be voting to defend this Maryland Senate seat and to protect and expand the Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate so that we can keep working to strengthen our democracy and make progress for the American people. And Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senatorial Committee Chairman, Rick Scott of Florida, are determined to stop us. After last week’s elections in Virginia and New Jersey, McConnell and his allies are reportedly hell-bent on recruiting a wealthy, well-funded candidate to run against me to try to flip this Maryland Senate seat Red and help Mitch bring back a GOP Senate majority. And in our current 50/50 Senate that means flipping only ONE more seat to make Mitch Senate Majority Leader once again. [The only way to prevent this scenario is to be ready for anything. And that’s why I am asking for your support today. These same folks are against ending or amending the filibuster, the undemocratic procedure that allows a small minority of Senators to block our ability to pass critical legislation to preserve our democracy and access to the ballot, protect reproductive rights, address commonsense gun safety, and take action on any issue that is opposed by powerful special interests.
[We can’t let deep-pocketed corporate interests groups and their dark money SuperPacs determine the agenda. Can you chip in $7 or whatever you can today to support our One Year Out fund and help us prepare to defend this Maryland Senate seat against Mitch McConnell’s well-funded drive to take back the Senate gavel? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38460794/315550023/-1808413249?;amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MOCL_211108_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmVkYjliZS04MjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1tXx-bFpitUt_iAsrjcY89aPdg0gVVmkIbAdkmPL9y4=)

And Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senatorial Committee Chairman, Rick Scott of Florida, are determined to stop us. After last week’s elections in Virginia and New Jersey, McConnell and his allies are reportedly hell-bent on recruiting a wealthy, well-funded candidate to run against me to try to flip this Maryland Senate seat Red and help Mitch bring back a GOP Senate majority. And in our current 50/50 Senate that means flipping only ONE more seat to make Mitch Senate Majority Leader once again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Let’s be clear: the corporate lobbying group behind this effort opposes my support for President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda which invests in lowering drug prices for everyday Americans, addressing the climate crisis, and requires big corporations and the mega-wealthy to pay their fair share of taxes, and much more. subject: They lied about mandates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Walz has accepted it and won't push back | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ed1dd7f7990b/they-lied-about-mandates?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

They lied to us about Vaccine Mandates. It's such an indictment on Tim Walz's leadership and the policies which have had massive implications for our state and country. He and politicians like him have closed businesses, caused gigantic supply chain issues and provoked massive inflation. These issues stemmed from lockdown policies and mismanagement at every level. I fear we're going to continue to reap what our politicians have sown for the last year and a half unless we start making different decisions!

Becoming a [health freedom sanctuary state](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d4830fea50&e=33b11688c1) is the only path forward! Tim Walz has not proven he can take on his own party even when his own party is WRONG. The mandates are unconstitutional, and our government should be challenging them! Moms and dads expect it! Even [other Democrat governors](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7e32d082ca&e=33b11688c1) are pushing back on vaccine mandates. **Check out my video on the issue by clicking the thumbnail below:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=1c554ff1ce&e=33b11688c1)
---
| We will not be smothered by a culture war or partisan politics any longer. That's what these vaccine mandates are! Tim Walz is passively approving of them through his silence. Through these policies, he moves us further away from "getting back to normal" --- and instead is pitting Minnesotans against each other!

I have a bigger and better vision for Minnesota! We need to LEAD again and let personal freedom guide us. It's time to build a movement and replace the failed leadership of the past. Join us and learn how to caucus on February 1st: [**https://drscottjensen.com/join-the-fight/**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0e30f0177e&e=33b11688c1)

Let's make Minnesota a better and more-free state! If you're not able to caucus for our campaign in February, I would simply ask this: [p](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2159c42ca0&e=33b11688c1)[lease consider giving to support our cause](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=db795fb3a0&e=33b11688c1)! We're coming to the end of the year and absolutely need you. Thank you!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

name: Adam Schiff
subject: When I was a young attorney
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
When I was a young attorney, I had the privilege of representing the United States as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Los Angeles. It was a thrill to go into the courtroom each day, and introduce myself as appearing “on behalf of the United States.” One of my most high-profile cases involved an FBI agent who was charged with spying on the United States on behalf of the Soviet Union. It was a classic “sex for secrets” case involving a Soviet asset named, of course, Svetlana. The FBI agent, Richard Miller, was convicted. Little did I know at the time, but I would see the same Russian tradecraft that targets Americans who are greedy and prone to extramarital affairs employed when an unscrupulous New York businessman became president of the United States. Nor could I have imagined that one day, the greatest threat to our democracy would come from within. Protecting our democracy has become the core of my work in Congress. And that fight isn’t over. Not by a long shot. In fact, it’s only just begun. Republicans across the country are wreaking havoc on our norms, our voting rights, and our democracy. And their attacks are purposeful. This isn’t hyperbole. It’s real. Voter suppression is their mission – and they are succeeding. Passing bills to suppress the vote in Texas, Florida, Georgia, and so many other places. And they are also preparing to overturn a presidential election if it again doesn’t go their way. **Today, as we face this existential threat to our democracy, I’m asking for your support. If you can, please consider pitching in $3, $5, or anything meaningful to my campaign. I refuse to back down from fights to protect our democracy – I never have, and I never will.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[DONATE $3 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38461051/315551584/-751938712?express_lane=true&amount=3&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20211109_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODNhM2NmZi04NDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwnXyGjud-dbKkwBHD9K5fMaxSxOuMVjb_G2uKSPJp8=)**

name: Eden at Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: Forget the shitshow in Virginia.
body:
We made history in Ohio.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462403/315556978/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do

_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=)
---
Let's cut to the chase here.

Last Tuesday’s victories in Ohio were overshadowed by the absolute shitshow we saw in Virginia, where an uninspiring white man with no message led Democrats into the depths of hell. We’ll send you an email with our full analysis of what happened there another time, but that’s not what this email is about.

Today, we are talking about the incredible, undeniably historic progressive wins we saw all across Ohio.

As much as last week showed us what Democrats _should not be doing_ , it was also about what we _should be doing_. **[In response to Tuesday’s wins, we are launching the Ohio Fund, where we will work precinct by precinct to show voters who we are and what we are fighting for. We are going to recruit young, diverse precinct captains across their state to organize their neighborhoods. We are going to strip it all back and rebuild, brick by brick.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462404/315556979/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=)** _**Tuesday’s election was about the strength of progressives candidate of color tilling the soil at the ground level. **_This is a particularly difficult feat in Ohio, where centrist Democrats (who have lost almost every federal and statewide race since 2014) are more concerned about taking out progressive Democrats and winning insider political battles than linking arms to defeat Republicans.

**_These were David and Goliath wins that make our communities— and for our Party— stronger, but don’t take it from us. Here’s what the press had to say about it:_**

**IN DAYTON, OHIO:** "Democrats Darryl Fairchild and Shenise Turner-Sloss made some history this week by defeating two Dayton City Commission candidates who were endorsed by the Montgomery County Democratic Party. One unendorsed Democrat winning in these contests is rare, but two in the same election is unheard of in the modern era." - [Dayton Daily News.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462405/315556980/1791286739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=&emci=80ecacde-8441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9975f99-8841-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=17300922)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462406/315556981/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do_IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=) **IN CLEVELAND, OHIO: **[Brent Larkin of Cleveland.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462407/315556982/-735680141?fbclid=IwAR1Sp9aHXuhh9VZ4Y3VYC9dWUj9N9fTzAF-7SMQX7oFdpsap77l160tIPHI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=&emci=80ecacde-8441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9975f99-8841-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=17300922) called Mayor-Elect Justin Bibb's win the most extraordinary he's seen in his nearly 52 years of following Cleveland politics.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462408/315556983/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do_IMG2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=) **IN LIMA, OHIO:** [Mayor-Elect Sharetta Smith pulled off a historic win](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462409/315556984/-1439623121?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=&emci=80ecacde-8441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9975f99-8841-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=17300922), becoming the first woman and Black person to win the seat. The Mayor-Elect used her story to relate to voters, talking openly about struggling with debt and other issues that the majority of Americans face.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462410/315556985/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do_IMG3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=) And it didn't stop in Ohio.

Pittsburgh saw a major shift too, with the historic election of Barrier To Entry endorsed Mayor-Elect Rep. Ed Gainey, who is the City’s first Black mayor. Rep. Gainey ran on a progressive platform centered around affordable housing and accountability with community policing.

Oh yeah— he made it across the finish line along with [a slate of FIVE progressive judges.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462411/315556986/1101531976?s=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=&emci=80ecacde-8441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e9975f99-8841-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=17300922) (HUGE!)

Are you sick of hearing us use the word “historic” yet?

At a time when we are losing nationally and statewide, _**we have to win and make hard moves to the left at the local level.**_ Let's keep it real: Ohio isn’t going to be flipped blue in the next two years. It will take precinct-level movement building.

We have to do better than what we’ve been seeing in Columbus, Cincinnati, Cleveland, and Dayton, where working and low-income people struggle to find safe, affordable housing.

_**We have to show people who we are and what we are fighting for in our cities, where community members can see and touch the policies we choose to champion.**_

The candidates who won on Tuesday night are champions of local issues and advocate for strong safety nets and accountability at every turn. They talk about policing and affordable housing and environmental racism and blight and raising the minimum wage.

We can see the impacts of these victories up close, and now we know what we need to do to win the long game. And unlike the out of touch political consultants who promise us huge short-term victories and never deliver— we aren’t just going to say what you want to hear.

Building up the progressive ground game will require us to take back power from the old guards who run our County Parties like the mafia, who resort to using racist dog whistles to slander progressive candidates, who prevent meaningful primaries from taking place, and refuse to embrace new members of our coalition.

Those days are over, and a new day has begun. **[Barrier To Entry PAC is an organization founded and run by strong Democrats. We know our leadership can better reflect our values, but it will require us to change. This is our fight. Join us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462412/315556987/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TODAY >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38462413/315556988/1956203302?refcode=211109_FR_ohiofund1intro-everyoneelse90do_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc=)** Onward Together, **_The Ohio Fund / Barrier to Entry PAC_**

clean_body: We made history in Ohio. | | | logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OTc1Zjk5LTg4NDEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ToXL5w7eDn82wslApNwulFUb45IvMlqs6M3NFTHdunc= Let's cut to the chase here. Last Tuesday’s victories in Ohio were overshadowed by the absolute shitshow we saw in Virginia, where an uninspiring white man with no message led Democrats into the depths of hell. We’ll send you an email with our full analysis of what happened there another time, but that’s not what this email is about. Today, we are talking about the incredible, undeniably historic progressive wins we saw all across Ohio. As much as last week showed us what Democrats should not be doing , it was also about what we should be doing. = Tuesday’s election was about the strength of progressives candidate of color tilling the soil at the ground level. This is a particularly difficult feat in Ohio, where centrist Democrats (who have lost almost every federal and statewide race since 2014) are more concerned about taking out progressive Democrats and winning insider political battles than linking arms to defeat Republicans. These were David and Goliath wins that make our communities— and for our Party— stronger, but don’t take it from us. Here’s what the press had to say about it: IN DAYTON, OHIO: "Democrats Darryl Fairchild and Shenise Turner-Sloss made some history this week by defeating two Dayton City Commission candidates who were endorsed by the Montgomery County Democratic Party. One unendorsed Democrat winning in these contests is rare, but two in the same election is unheard of in the modern era." - = IN CLEVELAND, OHIO: called Mayor-Elect Justin Bibb's win the most extraordinary he's seen in his nearly 52 years of following Cleveland politics. = IN LIMA, OHIO: , becoming the first woman and Black person to win the seat. The Mayor-Elect used her story to relate to voters, talking openly about struggling with debt and other issues that the majority of Americans face. = And it didn't stop in Ohio. Pittsburgh saw a major shift too, with the historic election of Barrier To Entry endorsed Mayor-Elect Rep. Ed Gainey, who is the City’s first Black mayor. Rep. Gainey ran on a progressive platform centered around affordable housing and accountability with community policing. Oh yeah— he made it across the finish line along with (HUGE!) Are you sick of hearing us use the word “historic” yet? At a time when we are losing nationally and statewide, we have to win and make hard moves to the left at the local level. Let's keep it real: Ohio isn’t going to be flipped blue in the next two years. It will take precinct-level movement building. We have to do better than what we’ve been seeing in Columbus, Cincinnati, Cleveland, and Dayton, where working and low-income people struggle to find safe, affordable housing. We have to show people who we are and what we are fighting for in our cities, where community members can see and touch the policies we choose to champion. The candidates who won on Tuesday night are champions of local issues and advocate for strong safety nets and accountability at every turn. They talk about policing and affordable housing and environmental racism and blight and raising the minimum wage. We can see the impacts of these victories up close, and now we know what we need to do to win the long game. And unlike the out of touch political consultants who promise us huge short-term victories and never deliver— we aren’t just going to say what you want to hear. Building up the progressive ground game will require us to take back power from the old guards who run our County Parties like the mafia, who resort to using racist dog whistles to slander progressive candidates, who prevent meaningful primaries from taking place, and refuse to embrace new members of our coalition. name: Edward Durr
subject: I just beat the most powerful Democrat in NJ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If we are going to put an end to the radical policies coming from Washington, it’ll take all of us to rise up and fight for o
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgrvdq797es2homkkl6efufhj6dqh6s6pna7te90_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlmiqmfcblmao61cjlcgpj3cpj69ij9p37cirr6sj6c5hbcp5j6pqjed1l6uo60puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj66ljjac30etj6cc5gm9h3csh5u)
Now, I'm humbly asking you to join me and make even more history.

|
| | | Hey, it's Ed Durr, grandfather, truck driver, and the Republican who just defeated the most powerful Democrat in New Jersey on Tuesday.

Listen, I'm no political insider, just an everyday, blue collar American who was fed up with the Radical Left's big government policies and decided to do something about it. **[Will you step up too?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo8d2oruuigsgro81ifg7p55srifj0aub7mu3ttg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "Will you step up too?")**

When I launched my campaign, I didn't have experts or fancy polling, all I had was $153 and the belief that everyday Americans like you and I can still make a difference.
**STAND WITH ED DURR**
---
| | | [CHIP IN $15.30](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd3gu0ogo9d93auq4i3q9v8b27i3ofuonvtnscio_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

**[And my election proved that when grassroots patriots like us stand up and fight for what we believe in, there is nothing we can't accomplish! But our work isn't done yet. Here's why:](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh87l99ddlk1h0bhe0ue6ora0v4hrj9q4uac1pdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "And my election proved that when grassroots patriots like us stand up and fight for what we believe in, there is nothing we can’t accomplish! But our work isn’t done yet. Here’s why: ")**

As long as Nancy Pelosi and her socialist pals in the Squad are running Washington D.C., our conservative values like the 2nd amendment and fiscal responsibility are in serious danger.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking you to step up and join our grassroots movement to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi by chipping in $15.30 today.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9cbu1bmmc4h4f5prj6gp5ggmkhbpp8k22uo01jg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "That’s why I’m humbly asking you to step up and join our grassroots movement to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi by chipping in $15.30 today. ")**
**STAND WITH ED**
---
| | | [CHIP IN $15.30](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh1j48osdv329f1llof35ramb9i8j2107lt516do_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Because, if we are going to put an end to the radical policies coming from Washington, it'll take all of us to rise up and fight for our conservative values.

I hope my win showed you the power that grassroots patriots like you and I can have when we decide to get involved. **[So I hope you decide to join me in the fight. And now let's take back the House](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh2iv6hd27tt5ujcqtrji9c9gec711jhcuh17ifg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "So I hope you decide to join me in the fight. And now let’s take back the House")**

Humbly,

Ed Durr
**STAND WITH ED**
---
| | | [CHIP IN $15.30](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zieu19p6f6tml10fv7hnegcekutfml5pc5m0tks0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge0p73chh2bs "Generic Button")
---
|

name: Team Rayner
subject: We need a bold move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38462773/315558598/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVmMTcxZS04YjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIKUQW6aev96jyXvoIjILKAHWRcaQrswRBwhE9ZNkDY=)

Peter,

Long before millions of Americans fell under economic hardship brought on by the pandemic, crushing student loan debt stymied the economic mobility of borrowers in Florida and around the country.

The weight of student loan debt prevents too many Americans from saving money for a house or retirement, paying medical bills or rent, or even affording expenses like groceries and child care.

Let's be real: Biden made a campaign promise to help alleviate the racial wealth gap through student debt cancellations and a reformation of repayment processes. But the administration's debt forgiveness to date is _puny_ compared to the total $1.7 trillion in student loan debt currently being carried by 45 million Americans.

**It's time to make a bold move in the name of racial justice. President Biden has the power to cancel all student debt -- and we're demanding he does so immediately.**

**[Together, we can make our demands loud and clear so that the Biden administration can move swiftly to provide this relief immediately. Sign your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38462774/315558599/1227146099?ms=em21_211109_studentdebt2&refcode=em21_211109_studentdebt2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVmMTcxZS04YjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIKUQW6aev96jyXvoIjILKAHWRcaQrswRBwhE9ZNkDY=&emci=61875d17-6c41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2aef171e-8b41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=34271788)** [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38462775/315558600/1227146099?ms=em21_211109_studentdebt2&refcode=em21_211109_studentdebt2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVmMTcxZS04YjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIKUQW6aev96jyXvoIjILKAHWRcaQrswRBwhE9ZNkDY=&emci=61875d17-6c41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2aef171e-8b41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=34271788) The good news is that President Biden temporarily paused payments due to the economic impacts of COVID-19.

The bad news? _That's not enough_. A temporary pause for an issue that needs a permanent solution will never be enough.

Peter, we've got people right here in our district who are working two and three jobs to make ends meet, and may even be sacrificing their education due to economic hardship. Canceling all student debt is exactly what our friends and families need to get back on their feet and _succeed_.

**_That's why we are calling for Biden to cancel it ALL._**

**[This is our opportunity to close the economic gap between those who need it the most. Please join Team Rayner in sticking up for our students and families by signing our petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38462776/315558601/1227146099?ms=em21_211109_studentdebt2&refcode=em21_211109_studentdebt2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVmMTcxZS04YjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIKUQW6aev96jyXvoIjILKAHWRcaQrswRBwhE9ZNkDY=&emci=61875d17-6c41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2aef171e-8b41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=34271788)**

The future is in our hands, Peter!

\-- Team Rayner [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38462777/315558602/-1570160113?refcode=em21_211109_studentdebt2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVmMTcxZS04YjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIKUQW6aev96jyXvoIjILKAHWRcaQrswRBwhE9ZNkDY=)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks – In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. **Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted.** With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade. Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red. With all eyes on New Hampshire, my campaign launched an emergency fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight. **[Reaching this goal will help my team build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. Can you rush $5 before midnight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38463346/315560894/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-competitive&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWJmMmZjZS04ZDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xzHaDjip6S0f5gAc6d1-eXERex9wHrnkvf8tQa_S2fw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38463349/315560897/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-competitive&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWJmMmZjZS04ZDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xzHaDjip6S0f5gAc6d1-eXERex9wHrnkvf8tQa_S2fw=)

clean_body: | | | Folks – In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted. With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade. Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red. ** For Immediate Release **

Sheriff David Clarke, Ted Nugent Endorse Loren Culp For Washington’s 4th Congressional District

November 8, 2021

WASHINGTON -- Today, Loren Culp’s campaign is thrilled to announce that Sheriff David Clarke and Ted Nugent formally endorsed Culp’s campaign to serve as U.S. Congressman for the 4th congressional district of Washington state.

Both Clarke and Nugent hailed Culp as a candidate who will protect Second Amendment rights, fight for the America First agenda, and will stand up to Washington, D.C. bureaucrats who are dedicated to chipping away the God-given rights of all Americans.

Statement from Loren Culp:

“I am very happy to receive the endorsements from two of the most Pro-American, liberty-loving patriots who fight on the front lines of Freedom every day! Together, we will stand up for America!” - Loren Culp

Read about Loren’s push to represent the patriotic Americans of Washington’s 4th congressional district in an exclusive Breitbart profile here.
