name: Alex Stovall
subject: “You ain’t black”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I 'm a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona's 9th Congressional District. **I 'm the left's worst nightmare and let me explain why...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I 've experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we've been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I 'm SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I 'm in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r)
The Left isn't shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **" You ain't black"** if you don't vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it's the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn't imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I'm a doer. I'm a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor's degree in Theology and master's in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it's why I'm asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn't popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it's time the truth came out. The left's socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left's oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58727736:JryB8t2EN:m:1:3298722022:921D9DA06C14557E946CC90DB3596E1E:r)

I 'm the left's worst nightmare and let me explain why... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I 've experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we've been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I 'm in their crosshairs. The Left isn't shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, " You ain't black" if you don't vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it's the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn't imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I'm a doer. Being black and conservative isn't popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh88qthvu6g8sg11vs1d39fnnnnvsh8i7j6jm1ig_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6urj8tb262qj2d1kchj7fctk6oqn1pbi6oq7ao3l6lq60sjkcuom8crie8rb1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj66ljjacj7m8p6cdj0m9h3csh5u)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6cu9d3n0f5ieotf9h7arria535l1fa99if0pmdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsmjb0l3k0d5nbh0lrlc6ulbgdrqk874mokmh1m0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg677aloflttm19p79veociobvdjf3fc2jhv1q10_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh8ktteophrdcquqteqs8hue0c2k2rn7vvjj8k3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0oduot84pdg408a8o0beud41dstsh8kq8d39kco_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ncgcja8974oia17du460fg32chbs50q29ocaro_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvejt7pd1lrnt3fag2kaejhkdtomr8mt3rkcafq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpsapbs2in507d7h2n3l7f7du1rkulifcqpgp9mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zga4urofjf6822gk61stpt0q8mjvpafrl0hu6ogg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhihlk2dnpmnf2r4mvip56r5ghboph87fmr1ndlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ge2ob2c3h2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

| Peter,

| Minority opposition to the far-Left agenda is growing FAST:
* Virginia Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin **WON** 55% of Latino voters... and won historic numbers of Black voters.

* Minneapolis voters **REJECTED** "Defund the Police" at the ballot box.

* Seattle (_yes, Seattle_) elected a Republican City Attorney to **STOP** the soft-on-crime agenda.

* A conservative **FLIPPED a 75% Hispanic House district** in Texas.

2022 midterm candidates to watch → Read Teen Vogue’s profile of John | Team — **We’re SO excited to share that Teen Vogue recently included John on their roundup of 2022 midterm candidates to watch!** We’re proud — but not surprised — that John is included among this list of so many exciting Democratic leaders, and we’re working hard to fulfill the promise of our campaign to flip Ohio blue. But we can’t do it without YOU. **_[RUSH a donation of $25 or any amount to continue building on this momentum>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465403/315570199/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUxZmY5NC05NTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL8N3QaDJXYW_AYDCeqNuNyyXIQFXz-Nfu52aEoHMX8=)_** _**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465404/315570200/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUxZmY5NC05NTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL8N3QaDJXYW_AYDCeqNuNyyXIQFXz-Nfu52aEoHMX8=)**_ _Here’s some of what Teen Vogue had to say about John:_
* * *
“Cranley’s platform includes legalizing marijuana, raising the state minimum wage to $15 an hour, building state infrastructure and broadband access, and a job creation plan that aims for 30,000 new jobs earning at least $60,000 a year for Ohioans, funded by tax subsidies from marijuana legalization. Outside of his mayoral role, Cranley is known for cofounding the Ohio Innocence Project, now housed at the University of Cincinnati College of Law. The Ohio Innocence Project has freed 33 wrongfully convicted Ohioans. Criminal justice reform is a large part of his gubernatorial platform: His goals include moving funding from prisons to ‘addressing poverty and mental illness,’ investing in resources for reentry after incarceration, and — harkening back to the mission of the Ohio Innocence Project — creating an office to investigate wrongful convictions.” _**[READ THE FULL STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465405/315570201/-1385380952?refcode=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUxZmY5NC05NTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL8N3QaDJXYW_AYDCeqNuNyyXIQFXz-Nfu52aEoHMX8=&emci=bb25202c-8541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)**_ _**[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465406/315570202/1618095363?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.teenvogue.com%2Fstory%2F2022-midterms-candidates-to-watch%3Futm_source%3Dtwitter%26utm_medium%3Dsocial%26utm_campaign%3Donsite-share%26utm_brand%3Dteen-vogue%26utm_social-type%3Dearned&text=Candidates%20to%20Watch%20in%20the%202022%20Midterms&via=TeenVogue&refcode=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGUxZmY5NC05NTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL8N3QaDJXYW_AYDCeqNuNyyXIQFXz-Nfu52aEoHMX8=&emci=bb25202c-8541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=50e1ff94-9541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)**_
* * *
It’s clear that John’s track record of success for Cincinnati makes him the right candidate to lead Ohio’s comeback. John is ready to get to work on creating real change for our state: from expanding the clean energy economy to bringing good-paying jobs to Ohioans to legalizing marijuana so we can invest in our communities. We hope that Teen Vogue’s excitement for John’s candidacy will help our movement grow, even beyond Ohio. **But the fact is, good press isn’t what will win this race. It’s having grassroots supporters like YOU on our team.** **_[Friend, if you’re all in to ditch DeWine and elect John next year, we need you to show your support now with a donation of any size. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: 2022 midterm candidates to watch → Read Teen Vogue’s profile of John | Team — We’re SO excited to share that Teen Vogue recently included John on their roundup of 2022 midterm candidates to watch! We’re proud — but not surprised — that John is included among this list of so many exciting Democratic leaders, and we’re working hard to fulfill the promise of our campaign to flip Ohio blue. But we can’t do it without YOU. = = Here’s some of what Teen Vogue had to say about John: “Cranley’s platform includes legalizing marijuana, raising the state minimum wage to $15 an hour, building state infrastructure and broadband access, and a job creation plan that aims for 30,000 new jobs earning at least $60,000 a year for Ohioans, funded by tax subsidies from marijuana legalization. Outside of his mayoral role, Cranley is known for cofounding the Ohio Innocence Project, now housed at the University of Cincinnati College of Law. The Ohio Innocence Project has freed 33 wrongfully convicted Ohioans. Criminal justice reform is a large part of his gubernatorial platform: His goals include moving funding from prisons to ‘addressing poverty and mental illness,’ investing in resources for reentry after incarceration, and — harkening back to the mission of the Ohio Innocence Project — creating an office to investigate wrongful convictions.” It’s clear that John’s track record of success for Cincinnati makes him the right candidate to lead Ohio’s comeback. John is ready to get to work on creating real change for our state: from expanding the clean energy economy to bringing good-paying jobs to Ohioans to legalizing marijuana so we can invest in our communities. We hope that Teen Vogue’s excitement for John’s candidacy will help our movement grow, even beyond Ohio. But the fact is, good press isn’t what will win this race. It’s having grassroots supporters like YOU on our team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks! Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Nina Turner
subject: My post-election reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Delivering for the people is how we win.
#

Dear Friends,

Ohio Democrats saw some major wins in last week’s elections, and I hope that you will join me in congratulating some of the candidates that we supported on their much-deserved victories.

In Cleveland, Justin Bibb was elected Mayor, Stephanie Howse and Rebecca Maurer were elected to the Cleveland City Council. Michael Dylan Brennan was re-elected as Mayor of University Heights. Kahlil Seren was elected Mayor of Cleveland Heights and Shenise Turner-Sloss and Darryl Fairchild were elected as City Commissioners in Dayton.

With your help, Nina Turner for US supported these candidates through donations, organizing on the ground, and partnering with great allies like Our Revolution Ohio to help build a bench of champions who will fight for a bold agenda that lifts working families.

Cincinnati also elected its first mayor of Asian descent, Aftab Pureval and Michelle Wu’s historic victory as Boston’s first elected female mayor and mayor of color is another incredible win for our progressive movement.
[**Donate now to keep our movement growing.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465521/315571439/1761773496?refcode=211109_FR_electionreflection&refcode2=b2bc8bdb-9641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmJjOGJkYi05NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgjIdyTcgQQBMegN0cLUoWcmFU-uTDMeHPhkZggVkrU=)
**In the meantime, there is still much work to do to protect progressives running for office.**

India Walton, Democratic nominee for Mayor of Buffalo, NY, was defeated by the incumbent Byron Brown using a write-in campaign, funded by corporate interests to circumvent his loss in the primary. This is a troubling precedent that hurts our Democracy. It is also a stark reminder that progressives often take punches from corporate Democrats who are committed to maintaining the status quo. India was an extraordinary candidate and deserved support as the official Democratic nominee. We must remain vigilant with our time, talent and treasure to build our movement and push back on the disgraceful tactics used to hurt progressive candidates.

**Foreshadowing of 2022**

Last week’s results gave some indication of what we can expect in the midterms and how to change course. Republicans swept three statewide offices in Virginia, taking the Attorneys General seat, the Lt. Governor seat and elected its first Republican Governor since 2009.

In a race too close to call on election night, Governor Phil Murphy became the first Democrat to win re-election in New Jersey in 44 years, defeating a Republican challenger in a race no one expected to be that close.

With these volatile results, we know that delivering for the people is how we win in 2022.

More than ever we must pass the not just popular, but necessary legislation that will give voters something they can feel like, paid family leave, permanent child tax credits, expanding Medicare to cover vision, hearing and dental, student debt cancellation and more. We must protect the vote by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and to do it, we must end the filibuster now.

As we work towards the 2022 midterm elections, we will carry on our righteous fight for justice and continue doing what progressives have always done to push our mission forward -- **_organize, organize, organize._**
[**Together, we will amplify our collective voice and use the power of the people to demand change. I want you to join us in mobilizing like-minded people across the country by lifting up our movement with a donation of $20.22 today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465522/315571440/1761773496?refcode=211109_FR_electionreflection&amount=20.22_L1&refcode2=b2bc8bdb-9641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmJjOGJkYi05NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgjIdyTcgQQBMegN0cLUoWcmFU-uTDMeHPhkZggVkrU=)
_If you've stored payment information with ActBlue Express Lane, your contribution will be processed immediately:_
**[DONATE $20.22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465523/315571444/1761773496?refcode=211109_FR_electionreflection_EL20.220&express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode2=b2bc8bdb-9641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmJjOGJkYi05NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgjIdyTcgQQBMegN0cLUoWcmFU-uTDMeHPhkZggVkrU=)**
**[OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38465524/315571451/1761773496?refcode=211109_FR_electionreflection_ELothr&express_lane=true&refcode2=b2bc8bdb-9641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmJjOGJkYi05NjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgjIdyTcgQQBMegN0cLUoWcmFU-uTDMeHPhkZggVkrU=)**
In solidarity,
Nina Turner

We must protect the vote by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and to do it, we must end the filibuster now. As we work towards the 2022 midterm elections, we will carry on our righteous fight for justice and continue doing what progressives have always done to push our mission forward -- organize, organize, organize. = If you've stored payment information with ActBlue Express Lane, your contribution will be processed immediately: = = In solidarity, Nina Turner = * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe.

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2ncmfsdhgai1dbla0ehoqhcv2utt73lt2v2k4q0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf7ddmc1qm0odgcoq3cdthecp3cd70c9jr4cdme8q76p5ke5grad7663in1djjeurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cdb76kqjfcljcoq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm2o77c9j60oh5u)
*Sponsored by | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqr6nond0qhtbns5opokbv6mla1a56d4ps0d8sb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5geeoj6c1h2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr43seimu2v591qlj4l32eprc0p78agv9dv7qe7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5geeoj6c1h2bs)**_ We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfv47b4p0le3q1fqftdr1fvu6jeb9aodjco2t8l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5geeoj6c1h2bs) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: your first contribution of $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I realize that number might sound humble, but I want to explain why your donation today matters so much.
#
$5.
While that number might sound humble, Derek, it's the exact amount I'm asking you to please chip in today to support my campaign to flip this Senate seat.
**Why $5, you might ask? 🤔** Because, while one single donation of $5 may not sound like a lot on its own, someone else reading this email today might just step up to join you in donating $5 too. And then all those gifts of $5 will start to add up.
**Basically, if enough of yinz who open this email today decide to kick in $5, the sum of all those online donations will make a *really* big dent in the sizable hole we've got in our organizing budget.** That is exactly how you + a lot of other folks on this team can come together to directly fund our plan to hire enough field organizers to reach every one of PA's 67 counties.
I understand that not _every_ person who reads my emails will choose to donate $5, Derek, but truthfully I'm REALLY hoping you'll be among those who do. [**_I gotta ask: Will you chip in your first-ever $5 to our people-powered campaign to add that 51st Democratic vote to the U.S. Senate in 2022? I'd be so grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37188?refcode=em20211109-3343&t=1&akid=3343%2E434096%2EZkgo8O) 🙏
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37188?refcode=em20211109-3343&t=8&akid=3343%2E434096%2EZkgo8O)**
I've never been much of a numbers guy myself, but I know deep in my heart that this is how we're gonna build the historic campaign strong enough to win this thing. That's right, just good old-fashioned people power. Brick by brick, dollar by dollar, vote by vote.
Every county, every vote. 💯
Thanks for hearing me out, Derek, and have an incredible week.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**TL;DR:** Online donations are what power our campaign — and if enough of yinz dig deep and decide to chip in your first-ever $5, we'll be able to greenlight some *massive* priorities for our statewide field organizing program — _items and hires we simply won't be able to afford without your support._[**_Can I count on you to add your $5 contribution today to help out?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37188?refcode=em20211109-3343&t=9&akid=3343%2E434096%2EZkgo8O)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211109-3343-footer&t=10&refcode2=3343_434096_Zkgo8O&akid=3343%2E434096%2EZkgo8O)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=3343%2E434096%2EZkgo8O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3343%2E434096%2EZkgo8O)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: BREAKING NEWS: GOP Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728192:JBcLrt2N9:m:1:3299561967:57ACA6E7FBDEE39CD5A43775759F12C6:r)
Patriot,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

The University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728192:JBcLrt2N9:m:1:3299561967:57ACA6E7FBDEE39CD5A43775759F12C6:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728192:JBcLrt2N9:m:1:3299561967:57ACA6E7FBDEE39CD5A43775759F12C6:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last night are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last night.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728193:JBcLrt2N9:m:1:3299561967:57ACA6E7FBDEE39CD5A43775759F12C6:r) A note for Patriot, from Adam Laxalt:

Patriot, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728193:JBcLrt2N9:m:1:3299561967:57ACA6E7FBDEE39CD5A43775759F12C6:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728194:JBcLrt2N9:m:1:3299561967:57ACA6E7FBDEE39CD5A43775759F12C6:r)

body:
Politico just called Democrats’ Senate majority “precarious.”
#

Friends -
Politico just called Democrats’ Senate majority “precarious,” and their analysis shows that “the fight for control of a chamber currently split 50-50 is likely to come down to a small universe of competitive contests.”
They specifically listed North Carolina as one the few **“competitive contests.”**
That’s why it’s so important we invest now in building out our grassroots campaign to elect Cheri Beasley and turn North Carolina blue.
**With no margin for error, what we do in this campaign could be the difference in whether Democrats hold the majority or Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. That’s why we need to ask:**

subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|

| | |
Peter, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.

First of all, I just want to thank you for your dedication to the conservative cause. It is because of grassroots patriots like you that Republicans are able to fight for conservative values. You understand what's at stake and you don't shy away from taking a stand when it's needed. That's why I wanted to come to you first with this offer.

**[I'm opening up my 2022 GOP Membership to top supporters only until midnight. Tomorrow morning, I'll be checking the first 50 names who responded, I hope I can count on seeing your name there!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728239:Juezrt2NL:m:1:3298722022:CD8C4DDEFEBA4F6ADD73F06175A8D04F:r "I’m opening

name: BREAKING ROE V. WADE NEWS (via DCCC)
subject: Senator Klobuchar’s STUNNING announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Senator Amy Klobuchar just called Republicans out for their attacks on fundamental reproductive rights. We're calling on 1,000 grassroots Democrats to stand with her to DEFEAT anti-choice Republicans and PROTECT our House Majority. Can you rush in $3 before midnight to defend our pro-choice House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We're livid.

_**FIRST:**_

Donald Trump packed the Court with THREE extreme, anti-choice justices, putting _Roe v. Wade_ in grave danger.

_**THEN:**_

name: Billy Long
subject: How we could save America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE
body:
We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially! |
No longer want to receive emails from Billy Long for Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=79a16bdf66c84809a144a5a4e620784e&_t=cgyz6ySNsPG4Ss9FTz6rzV2OFBtWAmgwMQJMpKIGDXxbAWXmuHQkRAbf6ODwtsVYYHKaD4KFnZUfi42VNCl2HwkC_YeqwgN5Bm3QzEClCf1YNtH3EyuXnRF_jYE6p3pN4DUGQNES2VpdX4Hk71WnXKgXfYQpBMuk6OfMde9bx88%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79a16bdf66c84809a144a5a4e620784e&_e=_cRJXCpiQVy97wirmk92vuvKNJhwHtx28w1BSlRH7hSucXKb5jdNkhxoqQH4GapZZsKpaHhhOD2shT56qy_aEfxo4pq-VDx3nnfpgVA10F3flyQZGX3cgW3QFz8xHH9iahnH1tTh3uk0k3lOndGmz2QQLlEbMH_v6vd1Glun0Rnj8xF-uMv8MsB6491pNluTQuVABhGzTOCVwuvHBd2owKi-HxHhWujsaZuPplud3HxtLy8LN72nyEsW8m2oBQWNJx6G1cpCGHA4nh9RizomyByI8OK8ptfP8x14cqCOqQTntXxI_7NlWXgrkrFoGdTSGkOnBr87qDq9xkCCpCjA_zY1RPBPusC0Ifd4li6P_AqHvnytviKwsatPaIIYbU5XWZvHM-RNIKKV3wfgE9AQAdYHAYn7-kpAbveoflWC3Wcg3iACVwjj1QNHuUxSRmVt_dAwdd1-j1L1mtKoBrg7vRzsUyxDEGTsQSkVrc-3Rbs%3D)

---
_**“SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.”**_
-Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden
Peter,

In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. **But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and[that’s why I’ve decided to run for the U.S. Senate seat opening in Missouri.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79a16bdf66c84809a144a5a4e620784e&_e=_cRJXCpiQVy97wirmk92vuvKNJhwHtx28w1BSlRH7hSucXKb5jdNkhxoqQH4GapZZsKpaHhhOD2shT56qy_aEfxo4pq-VDx3nnfpgVA10F3flyQZGX3cgW3QFz8xHH9iahnH1tTh3uk0k3lOndGmz2QQLlEbMH_v6vd1Glun0Rnj8xF-uMv8MsB6491pNluTQuVABhGzTOCVwuvHBd2owKi-HxHhWujsaZuPplud3HxtLy8LN72nyEsW8m2oBQWNtVPXi8lIy5WDJ1MW_m5NvAnx_TY11DwdbEzDGJl3TRahoUNmumD56YcLUC4AksM30JPETrOWbXj2EaqwsQeqe65lK258-nD4gu8--_H4WiG29igBr3a2ZHLvN8472vLK7s4WAsls8vfRCS2_oQj02dTAse-PLVTKHr231aVhyB926xUWMUO8pEj2-Chkc9w4urqfjS_FjyR-4WrExRtHd8aBO4t9nckyPQRnh1TgfUU%3D)**

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!** [**That’s why I need you to help me protect this Missouri senate seat, immediately.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79a16bdf66c84809a144a5a4e620784e&_e=_cRJXCpiQVy97wirmk92vuvKNJhwHtx28w1BSlRH7hSucXKb5jdNkhxoqQH4GapZZsKpaHhhOD2shT56qy_aEfxo4pq-VDx3nnfpgVA10F3flyQZGX3cgW3QFz8xHH9iahnH1tTh3uk0k3lOndGmz2QQLlEbMH_v6vd1Glun0Rnj8xF-uMv8MsB6491pNluTQuVABhGzTOCVwuvHBd2owKi-HxHhWujsaZuPplud3HxtLy8LN72nyEsW8m2oBQWNLe06AIynZfTzRBvH1Ha7On6w__2ij1vBJeEd4hYipR6CYP_AKNO-vl7jOx3Y7svZdZHFvv3XbY2ejuxKAu7cFA5xmtO4cd-C4fhlawMid9P3494_gG0fl24XH1aYCtHUQ52NSo6An5M_A-dYPsuyjv2DqjvY0JzhNbwCJF6_JPe_BkYWO7SPbA0eEn2Msqq7W-YffZ67kuUbem6Kk_-ie1Ig2LPQxNFPNy8ic5TKSPU%3D)

[** BID ON BILLY ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=79a16bdf66c84809a144a5a4e620784e&_e=_cRJXCpiQVy97wirmk92vuvKNJhwHtx28w1BSlRH7hSucXKb5jdNkhxoqQH4GapZZsKpaHhhOD2shT56qy_aEfxo4pq-VDx3nnfpgVA10F3flyQZGX3cgW3QFz8xHH9iahnH1tTh3uk0k3lOndGmz2QQLlEbMH_v6vd1Glun0Rnj8xF-uMv8MsB6491pNluTQuVABhGzTOCVwuvHBd2owKi-HxHhWujsaZuPplud3HxtLy8LN72nyEsW8m2oBQWNW4r1Jn2AMTRn55kOdVcz5pEJT6Z_hNEbawuJmbeI-DAzxEYttmSg92qXjVLmqvREpDTCypgOuHnWU39H-XqYL5-d6HKtC4sqPKL6YuzaEdk-vv3UzG_zKrNZCoTkpEv8R6rec7ZY_ThOD8K-t4xX-hJmjxnDzYQRn5JgMyDeEUzGADYHiBqNWCm6DlyicVxB1LHa_9qkPYYsJLKBcMrV-9Sf-X-pXgNSpM8_5u2Oj-Y%3D)
Peter, I for one, will not stand for the Left spending trillions of dollars all for my children and following generations to repay with their hard-earned tax dollars. Taxes should provide for the well-being of Americans, not illegal immigrants and Democrat slush funds.

**As long as Joe Biden and his Washington Democrats remain in power, we can bet on Americans being put LAST.**

Under this administration, America has lost its way and I plan to work with a Republican Senate majority to put us back on track in 2022. # Hi Peter,

[](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=1d098c032d&e=5167ed8367)
New Jersey has spoken in 2021. We will speak even louder in 2022.As your congressman, I will be a relentless voice for a better America – one with stronger families, safer neighborhoods, better schools, and more economic growth.As your congressman, I will not be silenced or intimidated by the lies and the labels of the far left.As your congressman, I will be the checkmate against their destructive agenda.The best is yet to come!
| [Help me reach voters with the message of “A Better America” with a donation of $20, $50 or $100!](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=f9b759cf0d&e=5167ed8367)

Why? Because America is better than how the far left has described us!Be part of the Better America team as we win Congress in 2022!

This is a defining moment for our campaign and this race. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Reaching out to you
body:
I’m going to cut right to the chase: America is at a critical crossroads. Are we going to be a failed socialist state? O
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zve3oq4995os0su5bhcbeaor9fk6eg67ldprk8i8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj6dtgc5qe3cbje4omco316li72olmm6o64p5mc9j6bd5mcio6echmmmr6dd77mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3impj3ap5l63jr4sj66aob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cdgm9p33c9ie49fg)
Fellow conservative, I’m going to cut right to the chase: America is at a critical crossroads.

_**Are we going to be a failed socialist state?** _

**[Or will we carry out President Trump’s America first vision of opportunity and freedom?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf66f455j4bqah8ms0mqms8da4omfsdvrjr939q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ie8or2cjh2bs)**

The Democrats have made themselves clear - they want to destroy the very fibers of our great country and replace them with woke nonsense.

**I made a contract with America to defeat the radical Left almost 30 years ago, and I haven’t given up on it yet.**

Now, it’s time to rally behind President Trump and his A-team to save America, but we can’t defend our great Democracy without your support.

**Join me today so we can SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left and make our country great once again.** [**SAVE AMERICA**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5hri4crs1sr7a0ink39p4pg3uehfn8qub7futrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ie8or2cjh2bs) Thank you, Newt Gingrich [**TAKE A STAND NOW >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4jqr95hvpgoqj92875pft19fm8kefdh16dv7v28_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ie8or2cjh2bs) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.
---

subject: Thank you

body:
Peter, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.
|
---
| | |
Peter, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.

First of all, I just want to thank you for your dedication to the conservative cause. It is because of grassroots patriots like you that Republicans are able to fight for conservative values. You understand what's at stake and you don't shy away from taking a stand when it's needed. That's why I wanted to come to you first with this offer.

You understand what's at stake and you don't shy away from taking a stand when it's needed. That's why I wanted to come to you first with this offer. "I’m opening up my 2022 GOP Membership to top supporters only until midnight. Tomorrow morning, I’ll be checking the first 50 names who responded, I hope I can count on seeing your name there!" | "Graphic" | | | "ACTIVATE YOUR 2022 MEMBERSHIP" | | "Timer" I appreciate your support, let's take back the Senate - together. Sincerely, Marco Rubio | | "Footer Image" Personal note from Marco Rubio: Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again. Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate. If you stand with me, "please click here to donate now"**. Thank you for everything you do, Marco Rubio | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. name: Izzi Levy
subject: MomenTIM newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ][IMG]

Hi there --

Welcome to MomenTIM — a monthly newsletter for our top supporters.

Thank you for being such a big part of our team and the effort to flip
Ohio’s open Senate seat blue.

Keep reading for recent updates:

ENDORSEMENTS

Last month, we were proudly endorsed by Senator Sherrod Brown, a lifelong
fighter for working people in Ohio and around the country.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1007&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Tim and Senator Sherrod Brown

We’ve also received other exciting endorsements:

The United Food and Commercial Workers and the tens of thousands of
essential workers who never stopped working to keep our country moving
these last 18 months.

Ohio Education Association and the National Education Association. As the
husband of a teacher, Tim knows the challenges facing our students and
educators. He’ll keep working to invest in our schools so our teachers
have the resources to give all our kids the education and support they
need to thrive.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1008&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Can we count on you to chip in right now and help our campaign keep its
momenTIM?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1009&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5852?t=1010&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5853?t=1011&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5854?t=1012&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $200

ON THE ROAD

Tim has also been busy on the road, crisscrossing the state meeting voters
where they are and discussing the issues that matter most to them.

A few highlights:

At his stop at the Victoria Opera House in Baltimore, Tim talked to folks
about access to clean water, broadband, childcare, and fair wages.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1013&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Tim and audience at Victoria Opera House

Tim toured the Norwalk Theatre in Huron County and talked about how we can bring
new opportunities to our small towns. When we invest in our communities, we can
attract good paying jobs, help businesses succeed, and bring back the quality of
life that keeps people here.

Throughout the pandemic, the Teamsters at Stericycle have risked their health
and safety to provide critical services to our health care facilities. Tim
visited the Teamsters on strike and is proud to stand with them in this fight,
and to stand on the side of workers everywhere who are stepping up and speaking
out to make sure their hard work and sacrifice doesn’t go forgotten.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1014&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Tim and Teamsters

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1015&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Can you chip in $25 or more to help keep Tim on the trail meeting voters
where they are?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5851?t=1016&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5852?t=1017&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5853?t=1018&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5854?t=1019&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate $200

Thanks,

Izzi Levy
Communications Director

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1379%2E3611125%2EEKkGJF

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I’m respectfully asking, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468406/315586476/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTE4YzAxYS1hNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UXXAusCcDGdrwgwZVTPI0TdN9B4_C5-Lwmcdn4ULnY=)
Team, in less than a year Coloradans will head to the polls. That may seem like a long time but it takes long-term investment, strategy, and grassroots supporters like you to win a race like this. Winning this race isn’t just about keeping Colorado blue or defending our slim Senate majority. It’s about building on the progress we’ve made: keeping 3 million children out of poverty nationwide, cutting taxes for working families, and working to mitigate wildfires and drought so future generations can enjoy our beautiful public lands for decades to come. To expand on that work, I’m counting on support from folks like you. Your investment today will help us reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell, dark money groups, and self-funding opponents who are distorting my record. We can’t rest for a moment. **That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today — because a contribution from you today will have a much greater impact than a gift made next month or right before the election.** [_**So team, will you chip in just $10 today to help fuel our campaign as we enter this new stage of the campaign? Any amount will make a difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468407/315586477/-1836949484?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211109_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTE4YzAxYS1hNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UXXAusCcDGdrwgwZVTPI0TdN9B4_C5-Lwmcdn4ULnY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468408/315586478/-1836949484?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211109_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTE4YzAxYS1hNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UXXAusCcDGdrwgwZVTPI0TdN9B4_C5-Lwmcdn4ULnY=)****

clean_body: | = Team, in less than a year Coloradans will head to the polls. That may seem like a long time but it takes long-term investment, strategy, and grassroots supporters like you to win a race like this. Winning this race isn’t just about keeping Colorado blue or defending our slim Senate majority. It’s about building on the progress we’ve made: keeping 3 million children out of poverty nationwide, cutting taxes for working families, and working to mitigate wildfires and drought so future generations can enjoy our beautiful public lands for decades to come. To expand on that work, I’m counting on support from folks like you. Your investment today will help us reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell, dark money groups, and self-funding opponents who are distorting my record. We can’t rest for a moment. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today — because a contribution from you today will have a much greater impact than a gift made next month or right before the election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks for chipping in. I’m honored to have this team fighting with me. — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

I’m Ben’s new finance director, Simon. It’s nice to meet you!
I’m looking over our fundraising numbers right now, and while we had a great third quarter, we really need to ramp up our efforts. Republican Ann Wagner has millions in her war chest, and we’re just not there. **[Will you be one of [15] donors right now to make a quick $20 contribution, to help us build out our campaign infrastructure?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468570/315586996/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211109SimonIntro_CM_SK_90DO_5_G_TESTA_L2&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI0ZTQ0Mi1hNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYXkNjoqao1P937aIjyJou3kUJ0-lt_QQrNUyYeZzyk=)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468575/315587005/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211109SimonIntro_CM_SK_90DO_5_G_TESTA_G1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI0ZTQ0Mi1hNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYXkNjoqao1P937aIjyJou3kUJ0-lt_QQrNUyYeZzyk=)**
The more we raise online, the more time Ben can spend out talking to voters and ensuring he represents **_them_** in Washington.
_This race is critical to Democrats keeping the House._ I know that candidates all over the country and in every race say that, _**_but it’s the truth_**_. Ann Wagner has been rated as the **_most vulnerable_** Republican incumbent. She has been wielding her power to harm us all in service of a purely political agenda, and it’s our responsibility to send her packing.
I am so grateful to be working on such an important race. **[Can you help make my job a little easier by contributing $20 and being one of the [15] donors to help us hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468577/315587007/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211109SimonIntro_CM_SK_90DO_5_G_TESTA_L2&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDI0ZTQ0Mi1hNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYXkNjoqao1P937aIjyJou3kUJ0-lt_QQrNUyYeZzyk=)**

Ben Samuels is a Democrat running in Missouri’s Second Congressional District. clean_body: Ben’s team is growing. . Or to receive fewer emails, . = I’m Ben’s new finance director, Simon. It’s nice to meet you! I’m looking over our fundraising numbers right now, and while we had a great third quarter, we really need to ramp up our efforts. Republican Ann Wagner has millions in her war chest, and we’re just not there. [Will you be one of [15] donors right now to make a quick $20 contribution, to help us build out our campaign infrastructure?](=) = The more we raise online, the more time Ben can spend out talking to voters and ensuring he represents them in Washington. This race is critical to Democrats keeping the House. I know that candidates all over the country and in every race say that, but it’s the truth. Ann Wagner has been rated as the most vulnerable Republican incumbent. She has been wielding her power to harm us all in service of a purely political agenda, and it’s our responsibility to send her packing. I am so grateful to be working on such an important race. [Can you help make my job a little easier by contributing $20 and being one of the [15] donors to help us hit our goal?](=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = From the campaign trail, Simon Korn Finance Director Ben Samuels for Congress Ben Samuels is a Democrat running in Missouri’s Second Congressional District. As a sixth-generation Missourian, economic policy expert, and businessperson, Ben will work tirelessly to deliver results for the community his family has long called home. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. __= || || Ben Samuels for Congress 9621 Olive Blvd. P.O. name: Holly McCormack
subject: 🚧 Infrastructure week is here 🚧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, many Americans predicted another loss for the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill when controversy stirred within the Democratic Party on Friday.
But our hope was not totally lost .
We saw 215 Democrats and 13 Republicans step up for their constituents and support a bill that 66% of America wants. The Biden Administration has shown what can happen when we reach across the aisle and work together for the benefit of our Nation. That's why after decades of promises, it is finally infrastructure week .
Marjorie Taylor Greene voted against this historic legislation, one that would directly impact Northwest Georgians. This bill includes funding for essential roads and bridges as well as high speed broadband, public transit, and bold climate policy. This is the biggest economic bill to pass in our history, and GA-14 will finally have access to things we have been begging for.
We're one step closer to Building Back Better. And we're one step closer to working together for the benefit of all Americans.
Help us continue this forward progress,
Team Holly.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1109] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]

Fellow Conservative, Kevin wanted us to reach out and make sure you know about our campaign kick-off event tomorrow November 10th, from 5:30pm to 7:00pm. You already know everything at stake in next year's midterm election. We're fired up and ready to end Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's disastrous reign in Washington. I'm fighting for the heart and soul of America and I want you to be there when we kick-off our campaign tomorrow. **For just $100 per ticket, you can come meet the Congressman and help us officially launch his reelection campaign for 2022!**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I’m not a normal candidate for U.S. Senate — and that’s the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
No matter where you’re from — urban, rural, or suburban — if you know what it’s like to be ignored, left behind, counted out, this is your campaign.
#

Friend,
I’m not a normal candidate for U.S. Senate — and that’s the point.
That’s because our campaign is for folks who know that “normal” is failing.
Normal Senators don’t come from working-poor families.
They don’t know what it’s like to move over and over because money is tight.
They’ve never watched their parents ration their insulin or had their heat turned off in the dead of winter because gas is too expensive.
I didn’t study poverty in school or learn about it from an internship. I lived it.
And I’m in this race because no one like me — like us — has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate.
We deserve a Senate that works for working people, and that will only happen if we’re in the damn room.
[That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. But I can't get there alone, and your support today would mean the world to me. Could you make a contribution today to help me win this race and fight for working families like ours in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468940/315588845/-360183459?refcode2=7bd10720-a841-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211109-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmQxMDcyMC1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uGr2Dj0sJ9OKKkblNaFB_DggZjXRXEQx71Tu1vSkT2Q=)

subject: Why I'm standing with striking workers at John Deere.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468951/315588939/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU3NGIzNC1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WDZUwbkmbv0D-nhmNGhAgaRxYXfRt8P5APyMHjSlkno=)
Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468952/315588940/-73891749?refcode=em-11921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU3NGIzNC1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WDZUwbkmbv0D-nhmNGhAgaRxYXfRt8P5APyMHjSlkno=) to our grassroots campaign. We're aiming to raise $7,000 online this month, and we're coming up $6,084 short of our goal. We need to pick up the pace a bit, but first let me tell you more about why I'm standing with striking workers at John Deere:

**Workers are working harder than ever, while their pay is barely increasing.** In fact, productivity has grown 3.5 times as much as pay over the past several decades.

Here in Iowa, we're seeing this firsthand at John Deere. The company is expected to rake in nearly $6 billion in income this year. During that same time, the CEO's compensation went from $6 million to more than $15 million -- yet workers are only being offered a small raise.

It's the same with pay for workers in schools, the service sector, healthcare, and many other industries. Those at the top get richer and richer, while working people get peanuts. Enough is enough.

**My opponent Kim Reynolds has had nearly a month to stand with the UAW workers at John Deere. She's done nothing.** On the other hand, as a state representative and son of a John Deere worker -- I'm standing with workers on the picket line as much as possible. If elected, workers will have the governor on their side as well.

**In a few weeks, I'll be rolling out a Workers' Bill of Rights. Right now, I need a ton of people chipping in grassroots contributions to help fund our organizing efforts across the state.** That's why I'm asking:

[**Will you chip in $3 to help me close the gap on our monthly goal? Anything you give goes toward reaching more Democrats and undecided voters to elect a governor who stands with workers.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468953/315588941/-73891749?refcode=em-11921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU3NGIzNC1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WDZUwbkmbv0D-nhmNGhAgaRxYXfRt8P5APyMHjSlkno=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468954/315588942/-73891749?refcode=em-11921-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU3NGIzNC1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WDZUwbkmbv0D-nhmNGhAgaRxYXfRt8P5APyMHjSlkno=)

clean_body: | = Friend, In a moment I'm going to ask you to = to our grassroots campaign. We're aiming to raise $7,000 online this month, and we're coming up $6,084 short of our goal. We need to pick up the pace a bit, but first let me tell you more about why I'm standing with striking workers at John Deere: Workers are working harder than ever, while their pay is barely increasing. In fact, productivity has grown 3.5 times as much as pay over the past several decades. Here in Iowa, we're seeing this firsthand at John Deere. The company is expected to rake in nearly $6 billion in income this year. During that same time, the CEO's compensation went from $6 million to more than $15 million -- yet workers are only being offered a small raise. It's the same with pay for workers in schools, the service sector, healthcare, and many other industries. Those at the top get richer and richer, while working people get peanuts. Enough is enough. My opponent Kim Reynolds has had nearly a month to stand with the UAW workers at John Deere. She's done nothing. On the other hand, as a state representative and son of a John Deere worker -- I'm standing with workers on the picket line as much as possible. If elected, workers will have the governor on their side as well. In a few weeks, I'll be rolling out a Workers' Bill of Rights. Right now, I need a ton of people chipping in grassroots contributions to help fund our organizing efforts across the state. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: This Election is in Play
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dem Darren Soto is vulnerable |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ab6f351cd2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

BREAKING NEWS: the NRCC has listed my race as a "targeted race"!

_They saw how well I did against Darren Soto last year and now it's time to defeat him!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's swing 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0146902008&e=afa21b7626), in the shadow of Disney World. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an AOC wannabe who isn't long for this political world!**

In 2020, I garnered more votes against Democrat Darren Soto than any Republican ever had. Florida is turning Red- and this district is leading the way!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=50d5f4c886&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Here's the reality you need to know: Florida is getting REDDER.

_There are now more registered Republican voters than Democrats in Florida for the first time in the Sunshine State's history.

"When I got elected governor we had 280,000 more registered Democrats than Republicans in the state of Florida," Gov. Ron DeSantis told a crowd at the National Conference of State Legislatures on Friday. "Today, and it will probably be fully publicized very soon, for the first time in the history of Florida we have overtaken Democrats. There are more registered Republicans in Florida than Democrats."

The crowd applauded Gov. DeSantis, who then joked that Republicans would have won the tightly contested New Jersey gubernatorial race if the state’s Republicans hadn’t moved to Florida.

DeSantis explained that Republicans are fleeing to Florida to escape coronavirus restrictions, lawlessness, crime, and other factors.

DeSantis also explained that Democrats have not governed well in the parts of the country they control.

"Once these areas go deep blue they get destroyed," DeSantis said. "How many places that are deep blue are well governed in this country? Can you name me some?"_

The nation's best Governor, Ron DeSantis, is right.

Blue areas are NEVER governed well.

But we still have some Dems to defeat here in Florida- and with more and more Republicans here, NOW is the time.

**With the national help we are sure to get, that I did NOT receive last time when I challenged Soto, This race for this swing district is sure to go my way this time!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b234bd5d2a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **I AM the America First candidate in our district. I ran alongside President Trump last year, and I will do so this year.

Darren Soto is finished. He voted for the inflation; he voted for the Afghanistan debacle; he voted for the massive spending and tax hikes; he voted for the Socialism.**

[I will fight Biden and his Socialism every time. We will remove him from office!. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=23c762f9f2&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't stood up against a single bad idea Biden has had. He hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. Typical America Last Democrat!_

I can flip this district- if the country swings as Republican as NJ and VA swung this week, the Dems are doomed! [Help me win this district and evict Nancy Pelosi from office!!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=90a29b5da4&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=787ed01860&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=19098a39bc&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8c1cb67fea&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5ae8efb489&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: I want to personally invite you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
Hope to see you there! | |
---
| | **** Peter \-- 2021 has been a year unlike any other. Despite every challenge, Democrats were still able to deliver a better future for Hoosier families in all 92 counties. This year, Democrats like U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan joined President Joe Biden to pass the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal, two transformational investments that delivered good-paying jobs for workers, better access to utilities like broadband and clean water, and a pathway to help Hoosiers put COVID-19 behind them. Peter, Hoosiers like you made this progress for Hoosier families possible. **That's why I want to personally invite you to our annual [Holiday Party](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468990/315589362/-710561404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3YWI2MS1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UlKIHpeRaSMGB0fvai9gqm5GZBaDGePw2pe0WuYy-Sw=) on Friday, December 10! ** The Sponsors' Reception will begin at 5:30 p.m., followed by the General Reception at 6:30 p.m. **[Get your tickets here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38468991/315589363/-710561404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3YWI2MS1hODQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UlKIHpeRaSMGB0fvai9gqm5GZBaDGePw2pe0WuYy-Sw=)!** Please email Daniela Contreras Cuervo at daniela@indems.org for more details. Can't wait to see you there! \-- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the INDems |

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Henry Cuellar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Henry Cuellar is the most conservative Democrat in the U.S. House. He is
one of the only Democrats opposing the progressive policies in the Build
Back Better Act. He was the only House Democrat to vote against abortion
protections in September.

Cuellar even feeds into right-wing scare tactics on immigration. This is
him on Fox News:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83244?refcode=em20211109-20403&t=1002&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6 ]Henry Cuellar on Fox News talking about the so-called migrant caravan

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83244?refcode=em20211109-20403&t=1003&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6 ]Chip in to defeat Cuellar. Voting starts in less than 100 days!

We endorsed Jessica Cisneros, the progressive fighter running against
Cuellar, on Day 1. She’s an immigration attorney and a fierce supporter of
a Green New Deal and Medicare for All. While Cuellar is on Fox News trying
to divide and conquer people with lies, Jessica works with immigrants to
secure their rights. While Cuellar is taking corporate cash from
Republicans and Big Oil to obstruct the Democratic agenda, Jessica is
working for a Green New Deal.

The differences couldn’t be more stark. But here’s the thing: Nearly 90%
of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. The
most recent available data shows that Cuellar has more than *$2 million*
in his campaign account. Jessica has just a fraction of that, but with our
support and the support of grassroots donors like you, we can still win.

Wall Street, fossil fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to
Cuellar as primary day approaches. We’re relying on a flood of grassroots
donations — $5, $27, $50, whatever folks can afford — to help us close
this fundraising gap.

The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop
more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. They don’t want to
see Cuellar lose, even though he opposes most of the Democratic agenda.

So, Peter, can
you make your
first contribution to defeat Cuellar and elect more
Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83244?refcode=em20211109-20403&t=1004&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6 ]→ Yes, I can donate $3 to Justice Democrats today to
elect Jessica and defeat the most conservative Democrat in the House.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83244?refcode=em20211109-20403&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6 ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211109-20403-footer&t=1008&refcode2=20403_1203867_Yquts6&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=20403%2E1203867%2EYquts6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

| Friend,
Americans across the nation are rejecting the socialist agenda with the power of their vote. The American people don't buy into Biden's "Build Back Better" agenda; they know it's a flop and only benefits the liberal elite.
Last Tuesday's elections were a wake-up call for the Radical Left.
Make no mistake, we will take back the House in 2022. Momentum is on our side but we need to stay focused and prepare for the coming fight.

| The Socialists are scared. They're going to use every back-handed trick in the book to save what little is left of their party. Biden sees that his own party members are starting to turn against him. While they fight amongst themselves for control of a collapsing party, we will stay unified for the America First movement.
Together, we will take back the House and then the Presidency.
I can't do this without a true patriot like you. With your support, we will keep the momentum strong and retake the House in 2022.
