_**“SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.”**_
-Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden
Fellow Conservative,

In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. **But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and[that’s why I’ve decided to run for the U.S. Senate seat opening in Missouri.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagm_uZkPgfkzQb2Pgee2my06lUKSlS3nlyg3gY0i1-9xWvHXUwn9OzydGo9Jmo8-6RcZ7xzD81zFpgsghA7B_vWXitPaPKTrV-cG1I2G1uns-ttI1baluvwM_sxQIBaT5SfKvDZfFiT1OTQY7zDR-zkvkMwB6Ye4hNfqpyIBL2Omn1n8BBIjehIvz5qFGSgw1O5mQnDxECFnFIdwhAUhiRYQ%3D%3D)**

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!** [**That’s why I need you to help me protect this Missouri senate seat, immediately.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagprdwaer0AQBTHltHVX7-OJFqEv3f9HxWG5m9CurFvfxZL768jUvj3wNJXQJcba5on9W_27CAsTy_9X4SyK_bW9IYy4dWv3-zytU5eTCTFq4K74swnzjeSNtfvQ_QBtqp2Ma3NYTD1DLi-3mlCgMbkOuESFs8X-MBEKEtqkbD-miM3Yyo0Nwbc_VTAHrCLp3uXD-FpW_JktWt69G_LVOe1g%3D%3D)

[** BID ON BILLY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagGptkZfEI1tnk-6C1Na-QRe-pnTkr3OpscbU0fW611dsjGlF8csF5KnthDkF8xkOLhjzIgkd3hUtI-m582RZmg9BBbrCuvuCENL8tUl9L1C5HyOAADuIg99rGc5mcjMqIdzUQKOhLwS4cqOcI6OwZY-bu2ZwaK7tlw-Tk8tgKXoUXIGYMtF2Qme6dLsnGbpj-r9etuKA79XTW-azRTH_wrQ%3D%3D)
Fellow Conservative, I for one, will not stand for the Left spending trillions of dollars all for my children and following generations to repay with their hard-earned tax dollars. Taxes should provide for the well-being of Americans, not illegal immigrants and Democrat slush funds.

**As long as Joe Biden and his Washington Democrats remain in power, we can bet on Americans being put LAST.**

Under this administration, America has lost its way and I plan to work with a Republican Senate majority to put us back on track in 2022. [**I need your immediate help to start this campaign off right, with the support of proud patriots, like yourself, on my team. I don’t expect you to invest in my campaign without knowing a bit more about me and my record as a rock-solid conservative. **But by the end of this email, I hope to convince you that I am the candidate that will protect this seat for the Republican Party in 2022.**

So, here’s what I’m all about:

**I firmly support your Second Amendment rights** and will fight the gun-grabbing politicians infringing upon them.

**I am also 100% PRO-LIFE** and give any Supreme Court nominees who support ending abortions 100% of my support.

America wasn’t built with handouts, it was built on the back of hard-working people who respected our flag, **I will fight to get folks back to work and our economy moving again.**

While these techy liberal billionaires on the West Coast may not care about election security, **I DO!** We need to require voters to show a photo ID and put an end to ballot harvesting not fund it!

[**As your next Senator from Missouri, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure the voices of conservative Americans like you get heard in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagjOkFTMInM5JP9apmefkNiWLRY6Bu0iWZ_CHjaLNwdaBzNpPGlBAwsoVddUR3dUa1N8CnlnBW9EBZWUJJi2QaxIJIJ6w5obO_6sbcswXQh-unpztv_8ORJrNXhTtTD6DZOCRUfdDDLG8ErrDG7kNXoIvip_1_zlp-sGo4yS_Odvh7mBUAznWRIdn_MNa4piMGoj644KHH2QniFVUCWw4dgQ%3D%3D) **Just take a look at my To-Do-List for when I get to the Senate:**

* Stop Out-of-Control Spending
* Finish President Trump’s Great American Comeback
* Secure the Border
* Secure our Elections
* Put a stop to the _“woke”_ insanity coming out of Washington, D.C

Nothing on the list above will be achieved if a Democrat wins this race, Fellow Conservative. [**That’s why I am counting on you to help me ensure the Left doesn’t increase their power and further force their radical agenda in America.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagOcMgQEtJaAiWS1TBogu2SsP0Cxs8ix3KvuMeeiaYbeoCShnVJuOZOqLZ7q4RnIK4VsOTg3BGzbTtHq-0y6lrTc_sVNgrU_aMfQ-83aaXXT_zGEykx2uTJuciHVlajsqtcKFO5D9HjgewmTFI2Q5t7JcSdNRwDGUCROr4l46fTSbquLtBUGFsShCKaHN5aZPkgbJ4HSwX_9Z6pHOCPZjt6Q%3D%3D)

[**Please, send in whatever you can right now, even $5 or $10 will support my campaign and help us keep Missouri RED in 2022.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagOT84a1ErLqA-oBOCrFR0MjeaJNB99N4fSELALgukMzxWRF0LdDrSbL4SFFZfblONNWVRpIBlgWDhKnp61ZnMj5wah5ptXRCcVc0rLF3EkUwf-to0LygtxTn1qOh59kevwsgaHkqQsq8A_jjdyzoI0Neew1Nye_0qwraUmvThjsawWgPA-CwJtVohXHkSqohsNQ2GJfCeTGgjClZ1psQ3RA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Billy Long

[** BID ON BILLY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8df053fae92247c1af057c4e9950dd77&_e=G3QDzlLEIVlt6BrxDD-jMj4rS-_-0JTL17FdQmDyXaoU3mn9pSwPQRy89lgUTHG0CRaOdlT59ILegxjzpAAATlSoGzzA-UlimqsxKg6Rmlzdm5YXwliBQF-qaYK6P5j0E_jf8lj6y1RfaKV2EjkMUaX5uMEsqB_eGpyd-eJOmfNnSFpVherIaEQZAvF9l-fHr1rgLwB34TQjjMkObLSwxvlvpbGAlwQlslElpukpF2SrhvOJwINxX-2eEQgNAnagEcpaUYjJDAmkCuOkyGNB0ziZzCjSCb5EFGawjUjD4n-AnFHWOspik3qdqX8HsSwyr2TNAPxgcC-NhLw8nZ4jvT-LjP6sKPlO0_Hg-Bgnj2GeMCWM0eY54J_YFELwTz_XJTVcjG__MdAuJMKH5oOkafZyqMO46Pe3MfTPKiWr2GD1NlTaEeAHOE-SHPHq8ESrEwybaJeKuTX6smmxuQkJ4w%3D%3D)

clean_body: Despite what the Democrats are willing to bid.... | No longer want to receive emails from Billy Long for Senate? You may . “SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.” -Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden Fellow Conservative, In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American. I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year. We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially! Fellow Conservative, I for one, will not stand for the Left spending trillions of dollars all for my children and following generations to repay with their hard-earned tax dollars. Taxes should provide for the well-being of Americans, not illegal immigrants and Democrat slush funds. As long as Joe Biden and his Washington Democrats remain in power, we can bet on Americans being put LAST. Under this administration, America has lost its way and I plan to work with a Republican Senate majority to put us back on track in 2022. | I don’t expect you to invest in my campaign without knowing a bit more about me and my record as a rock-solid conservative. But by the end of this email, I hope to convince you that I am the candidate that will protect this seat for the Republican Party in 2022. So, here’s what I’m all about: I firmly support your Second Amendment rights and will fight the gun-grabbing politicians infringing upon them. I am also 100% PRO-LIFE and give any Supreme Court nominees who support ending abortions 100% of my support. America wasn’t built with handouts, it was built on the back of hard-working people who respected our flag, I will fight to get folks back to work and our economy moving again. While these techy liberal billionaires on the West Coast may not care about election security, I DO! We need to require voters to show a photo ID and put an end to ballot harvesting not fund it! Just take a look at my To-Do-List for when I get to the Senate: Stop Out-of-Control Spending Finish President Trump’s Great American Comeback Secure the Border Secure our Elections * Put a stop to the “woke” insanity coming out of Washington, D.C Nothing on the list above will be achieved if a Democrat wins this race, Fellow Conservative. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuc0l45ab5cn040a8f2liaintnktilbt0i73b67g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn6sjhc3ij2dhi6hhrao3hcer7cclkmsqm6pj0cpqn8t5lm5jbbd36eipn1d1n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3impj3ap5l6grr5cr661ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cdgm9pb2cpj649fg)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjkge94011eur5a32q1d7bt832tce9fv01hcvo88_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgjmqhv470rhupd415hbnq4ephfq0unuf30m3c6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvne1o88n9pflucq3grspo5jbq822smqducuuk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zda7smcj0smftc9bgi3kj6tadvvoca0lmf22ps20_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z07qam49kuisjlcf7tcg7ckcin4ajbibgdhh8ch0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4sngbqvag0jh3ahsvq7jlea7p66op58e3ovpe1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za37lno3jur7akrmavj5l4fc8pig9jnlffofh3sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjrtavib28us3rmcrg9p0fm2glnviqb41foc8pe8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuh346gv7k6k45ccb9bgsmdljo73uh330mueo360_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6bdkkdjighk8ab3mfpl0d398evbvsq7i85v4j48_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieaoj6cph2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaemmppfrk8b6dri7tjsdjqtkulssnmnfhb19cno_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdgm9pb2cpj649fg)

name: Mark Warner
subject: What a difference a week makes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're showing Virginians that Democrats are working for them.

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38469842/315592858/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjQ4MTIyNC1hYzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDjeLHvt4yO3P-b_FmigkvNpt2FYMgYZ8O_pcfdTfMA=&emci=06d77b79-a541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ff481224-ac41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, The last week has been bittersweet for me. On Tuesday, Democrats experienced a tough setback in the Virginia elections. On Friday, the House finally passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill that President Biden will soon sign into law. I’m sending you this note and my attached CNN interview to give you a sense of how I am thinking about both of these events, and to ask for your thoughts on our work moving forward. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38469843/315592859/314992900?ms=mw_em_211109_1&refcode=mw_em_211109_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjQ4MTIyNC1hYzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDjeLHvt4yO3P-b_FmigkvNpt2FYMgYZ8O_pcfdTfMA=&emci=06d77b79-a541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ff481224-ac41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237) The impact of our bipartisan infrastructure bill cannot be overstated -- $1.2 trillion will help communities here in Virginia and all over the country fix crumbling infrastructure that has not seen nearly enough federal investment. But if we’d gotten this over the finish line back in August when we had our first chance of passage, or perhaps even a week earlier, I think we could have elected a Governor McAuliffe, Lieutenant Governor Ayala, and Attorney General Mark Herring here in Virginia. The truth is, Democrats are delivering for Virginans and the American people. Included in this bill is money for improving Virginia’s transportation system, revitalizing our airports, and making sure every home in our Commonwealth has clean water, and broadband wireless internet connectivity. Imagine if we’d had an opportunity to campaign on this bill for a week, or longer. It could have made a big difference. We’ve just passed a monumental bill that will impact nearly every American. Hopefully Build Back Better legislation will soon follow. In 2020, people gave Democrats control of the Presidency, the Senate, and the House. They expected us to produce, and now we are producing. And we need to make sure every voter next year understands the impact these two pieces of legislation are going to have on their lives. If we don’t, we lose. My point in writing to you today is not to reopen fresh wounds. And it’s not just to talk about what could have been. It’s to make sure we don’t make the same mistakes twice. **_[Please take a look at my conversation with Dana Bash on CNN about this issue and share your thoughts with me on our work going forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38469844/315592860/314992900?ms=mw_em_211109_1&refcode=mw_em_211109_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjQ4MTIyNC1hYzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDjeLHvt4yO3P-b_FmigkvNpt2FYMgYZ8O_pcfdTfMA=&emci=06d77b79-a541-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ff481224-ac41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)_** Our work to show the American people Democrats are working for them must start now, and I look forward to hearing your thoughts on this important issue. Thank you, Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38469845/315592861/1523721431?refcode=mw_em_211109_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjQ4MTIyNC1hYzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDjeLHvt4yO3P-b_FmigkvNpt2FYMgYZ8O_pcfdTfMA=)**

body:
Did you see the news? The Albuquerque Journal reported this week that Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is pushing more liberal indoctrination in our s Peter, Did you see the news? The _Albuquerque Journal_ reported this week that Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is pushing more liberal indoctrination in our schools. The MLG mandates would require children – starting in kindergarten – to identify their racial group identities. It gets worse from there. History should teach us the hard lessons we must learn from. **But I will strongly oppose efforts to label and define children by their race.** **Children should NOT be divided into victims and oppressors, based on the color of their skin.** We are 50th in education and our children fell even further behind when the Governor kept schools closed longer than any of our neighboring states. [**We should focus on helping our children master the core subjects of reading, writing, math, and science – not indoctrinating them in liberal ideology.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=5f4070dcb13e4e7d947f450bc2971f8d&_e=I1vSkhjpjR6RPYobnMzmYiO-oQs9-zXIDMr05fe49IBmRF_u0DGZo7ln05GvnTJBQB64mJcWahkaYvGunb5HpfLxPiTEbua7SGlkTnjqLqLg1m4SNW4bstdcPfNI4j93k3ELENdzyY0lcPmp7UhGXkgTtQk8CK89tmn8-oQqE-sb1QM9gPSqFf58QngHmYaLHvcMDamz6RAnHY7lyR0jJhdBHzLtw7MJlKlcviMvmigWiGNGTuJdTg5VRdA5aDSBuSQI367iqk-oiGJlOpDMbini4-Sv-rNstjpAI791TkAUjLr4eNVi5I5aEJ4CfCbjExnQ90stiWAdhu-aS-YShXghsYmrk03j2Z4kX1iqmLK66xB71hfi3w0c-aV0MZ9cihfh3g8Gpz561gEZKB66OZiF5hQmJze3APcQ6V_bqZ_7d09LqwfxLA5OfrF4dwBCWcGz7M4A02k3u7AJxFzUkDvGdxm0UWZTfNhnHzIpOVFZxQcytq3aVlV_7ngkx3RS_Zm0LmKUqN3Vf7XSeFCb1g%3D%3D) name: Great America Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6563%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=qCu%2blHOmXTZwAbqCwwamXA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67963%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZSBrx3LMjjKfrkbQ4yf7XA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given us the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67963%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZSBrx3LMjjKfrkbQ4yf7XA&sysid=1) These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ , and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And Mark Levin--the “Great One”--gave Hillsdale a rare first edition set of these famous essays. They’re on display at our Allan P. Kirby, Jr. Center in Washington, D.C. It’s safe to say we’re pretty fond of _The Federalist Papers_ around here. In fact, that’s why we developed a course dedicated just to these important essays. There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, [_**"The Federalist Papers,”**_ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67964%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hY7OgexE0pvjQ0mw0t4hnQ&sysid=1)on DVD today with your generous donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. You can learn more about this special DVD box set using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67975%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WCugwDD8BMwogmrPuCK2rw&sysid=1)** Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll reserve your copy of **[_“The Federalist Papers”_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67976%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5e%2f1wCsq4svvuXfqw3nk1w&sysid=1)** _** **_ DVD box set today. Supplies are limited and I’d hate for you to miss out. Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6563%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=qCu%2blHOmXTZwAbqCwwamXA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6563%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=qCu%2blHOmXTZwAbqCwwamXA&sysid=1)

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Thank you, Virginia.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Let’s get to work [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6578%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=nEtmrIQpECZsRyQxmamuDg&sysid=1)
Let’s get to work

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67979%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QHGkJdzShgJ3P%2biRn2QNIg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriots,

Virginia, we did it. None of this would have been possible without YOU. I am so incredibly thankful and blessed for each and every one of you. _**We won this, and we won this together!**_

Day one, we are going to get to work. We are going to restore excellence in our schools, invest in the largest education budget in the history of the Commonwealth, EMBRACE our parents, not ignore them, reduce our cost of living, and cut taxes on the retirement income of our Veterans.

We are going to keep our communities SAFE - we will stand up for Law Enforcement. We are jump-starting our jobs and reinvigorating our economy. **Most importantly,** Virginia will be OPEN for business.

My team and I have already set up a game plan, but to achieve that we have to start NOW. We have no time to waste. We need to start off strong going into Day One. | | [**START DAY ONE STRONG**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67970%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MjcBe0zZ29r8tkO4OigVdQ&sysid=1)
---
It’s time for Virginia to be the place where everyone wants to live, not leave. Together, we will change the trajectory of the Commonwealth, and we are starting that transformation on DAY ONE!

**There is no time to wait; we work in REAL time, not Government time.** Let’s keep this momentum going.

name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: why Chicago crime is so bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
It was not so long ago that standing in Helmand, an Afghan village elder looked me in the eyes and said, "You see these young Af
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z16sqpf7vrd7639turjdqj5tiuiiru6pidmsf11o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs) | |
---
Friend,

It was not so long ago that standing in Helmand, an Afghan village elder looked me in the eyes and said, "_You see these young Afghan men? They have no jobs or opportunities, help us solve that problem and we'll have peace."_

I have worked in some of the most violent, crime-ridden, and corrupt cities on earth, including Port-au-Prince, Haiti; Lagos, Nigeria; and Helmand, Afghanistan, where I saw good intentions go to die.

Repeated US government handouts, meant to alleviate suffering, instead perpetuated a culture of dependency and created patronage networks that enriched corrupt power brokers rather than incentivize hard work and job creation.

_But while running my business here in Central Illinois, I've watched the state that I love ruined by the same political failings, dependency, and violence that I was trying to fix abroad. _

**I cannot stand by as my state becomes more and more reminiscent of the corrupt warzones I've seen. In fact,****that's why I'm running for governor of Illinois.**
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkbqs6urv24m6leuuns8t28qjodbspi4nosdhie0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)
[**Meet Jesse Sullivan**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp9sjviifqb56krubng1asu6esv1huiv78kbo8uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)
I'm a fifth generation Illinoisan committed to raising my kids and grandkids here. But it's getting harder every day.

Our taxes are so high with so little reward, corruption so ingrained, and crime so rampant that in the last decade, only West Virginia has lost more people. States like Florida and Texas beckon, with lower taxes, better safety, and more personal freedoms.
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zll74e0b2o0rojvoc1qto2vn3pivcs7ar5skg5uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)
Recently I sat in a church on the South Side of Chicago with a pastor who told me he had buried 8 children in the last year, murdered by violent criminals.

Another looked me in the eye and repeated the same words I'd heard in Afghanistan years ago: "These young men need jobs and opportunities."

**A state that stands by as children are killed suffers from a devastating absence of moral leadership.**

**[ I AGREE - ILLINOIS NEEDS NEW LEADERSHIP ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgd7peu7rsj1ijmmg1pree82nd7gokc68kit591o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)**

A state's attorney who refuses to charge violent criminals feeds a culture of lawlessness and fear. This State's Attorney has dropped charges against 30% of felony defendants – 35% more than her predecessor - and dumped tens of thousands into "executive review," where they will never see the light of day.
** **
When communities see criminals right back on their streets without delay, they reach the only logical conclusion: the state is unable or unwilling to defend them. This legal cynicism plunges victims' families like Angela into a devastating spiral, where witnesses are afraid to come forward, and justice is not served.
** **
**_At a time when the Illinois government is overreaching into our lives, our homes, and our schools, it is pulling back on its most sacred obligation: keeping us safe. _**
** **
No matter what our elected officials tell us, this is not normal. Headlines like these are not normal:
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdtvbaerigrl2g3ccljoo4kb9o54utekak0as8e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)
Chicago's homicide rate in 2021 is six times larger than New York's and three times bigger than Los Angeles'.

It should not be extreme to suggest that our elected officials step up, support law enforcement, and do their job to keep our communities safe.

**Leadership is about prioritization. Governor Pritzker has shown us what he cares about. **

In the final week of this year's legislative session, here’s what Pritzker prioritized:
* gerrymandered maps designed to secure Democrat power for another decade
* abortions without parental notification for 14-year-olds.

When he finally found time to talk about crime, Pritzker announced an executive order that fell back on typical far left talking points: blame guns, and throw money at the problem.

Illinois has the people and the grit to be the best place to start a business and raise a family. We deserve a government that helps make Illinois strong, rather than stands in the way.

**Do you feel the same way, friend?** And are you ready to try something new for our state?

Then I’d like to ask you to join me today.

**[ JOIN THE TEAM - DONATE NOW ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfm4dj49k9sgrqn8j7jh3uf9feemqmbo0srd9fgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)**

Thank you,
Jesse “Sully” Sullivan
Republican Candidate for Governor of Illinois
[**Meet Jesse Sullivan**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ziciel7jhifq9m8e22gsmujc2js9jig9v0msg8d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhm8ib7ght4f0q3k7c8o71vt4ein63572oaas2ko_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs) | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp6l13hr59sp7a20khm8mi5e4j6imvkiinbi3978_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs) | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqk7meu2mrf3ae0tr7vo81s802p9m1utbdth4eso_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34cth2bs)
---|---|---

---
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2ihj1uvts1e6emb3mi60j2i460assj7ip4s75bo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdgm9pr0chjm49fg)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: This is one of our best tours ever
body:
As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Cri
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvca0fp4d6g41jbejmqqjc7qffb94f2kl668qb6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American, As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Critical Race Theory” agenda of the radical Left. But hear me on this: I can tell you, from firsthand experience, that there is _GREAT_ reason for optimism! **Turning Point USA recently launched our Exposing Critical Racism Tour** , a no-holds-barred effort to fight back against the racist Left on college campuses. And so far, it has been one of our most successful tours _EVER_ _!_
---
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgfnm4etvdeo1mtj10kkot47ru1snurdrjqgcf1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
But with four dates remaining (and the potential for more to be added!), I want to ask for your help to make the most of this tremendous live event. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more today to help us continue promoting the Exposing Critical Racism Tour, executing these live events to their fullest potential, and supporting these students to ensure that our presence has a lasting impact on their campuses?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z14upg3bmfofbaff4ai0d1r5rtu9flqfjosrtdqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zuli8n2d20dq78l21spu302d7natq09mhfal8pu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
I’m including a few photos of some recent events in this email, because you really need to see the enthusiasm among these young patriots to believe it. _**_THOUSANDS_**_**of college students have come out to these events -- even on some of the most Left-wing college campuses in America. We even drew a sizable crowd in Burlington, VT a few days ago!** And these students aren’t just coming to be entertained. They’re being equipped with the facts, the arguments, and the encouragement they’ll need to stand up to their college administrations and professors, and to take on the racist ideology of the radical Left wherever they encounter it. Because, as I’ve said many times, _if America doesn't kill Critical Race Theory, Critical Race Theory will kill America._
---
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3gi87vn666mq58gvstfc7saf4lts3upjp15hrng_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
That’s why we're going right into the belly of the beast by visiting college campuses with the _TRUTH_. [**Will you help us continue this vitally important tour with your generous gift right now?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcekkfnvb7quusfu145c6r792s65rl6b2hvk3580_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs) Your gift will enable us to fund the travel expenses for my team. It will cover the cost of the promotional work that will bring students in the door. It will help provide transportation for students to off-campus venues when we're not allowed to meet on campus due to draconian COVID restrictions (a challenge we have dealt with a few times already). **And it will help fund TPUSA chapters on these campuses and many others, so that conservative students in hostile environments can sustain their camaraderie and support for one another long after the event is over.** Many conservatives have written off places like the University of Vermont or the University of Oregon. They say they're too far gone... too steeped in radical Leftism. And that's _PRECISELY_ why we're going there on this tour. For many students, this event may be the only exposure they get on their college campus to the truth about Critical Race Theory. Already, we're seeing just what’s possible when we carry the truth into those dark places. Students’ eyes are being opened. They’re finding their courage. They're fighting back against the poison of Critical Race Theory, socialism, and Marxism and standing up for our pro-America values in some of the most hostile environments in America.
---
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztonf78p0rts73odeffoj69acn90hri6n1i8jjv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
[**Will you help us reach even more of them with your much-needed gift today? Please click here to pitch in your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlshnob7mjg3eo0n4uv0qoa1f9mqq984ghbdm900_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqdqla0v6gn3tr4s9nka44urve2romkjtnp5kmpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5ieeo34c3h2bs)
---
Thank you for standing with the next generation! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Roger Stone will endorse U.S. Senate candidate Jackson Lahmeyer at Enid, OK Freedom Rally
body:
| |
---
[](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=dny8doun3zqlbxwly&linkid=0&link=6daf6158281d4c04a6b4f605bc484731)
---
| **LEGENDARY REPUBLICAN STRATEGIST AND TRUMP ADVISOR ROGER STONE AND OKLAHOMA GOP CHAIRMAN JOHN BENNETT WILL ENDORSE JACKSON LAHMEYER OVER INCUMBENT SENATOR JAMES LANKFORD IN ENID NOV. 21st** **FREEDOM RALLY TICKETS NOW AVAILABLE** **Tulsa, Oklahoma -** Conservative U.S. Senate Candidate Jackson Lahmeyer who is challenging veteran Washington Senator James Lankford will be holding a freedom rally with Trump's longtime advisor and legendary Republican strategist Roger Stone and Oklahoma Republican State Chairman John Bennett on Sunday, November 21st at the Stride Bank Center, 301 S. Independence Ave, Enid, OK. A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: Nixon, Reagan and Trump. Roger Stone was indicted on fabricated charges in the now discredited Mueller witch-hunt and subjected to a Soviet-style show trial in Washington DC in which his first, fourth and sixth amendment rights were violated. His sentence was commuted by President Donald J. Trump as an act of justice and mercy on July 10, 2020. "I am proud to have the support of this American political Icon who had the courage to stand up to Robert Mueller's witch-hunt and who steadfastly refused to lie and bear false witness against the president. He is a true American hero who President Trump pardoned based on the unfair, illegal in baseless prosecution this man was forced to undergo" said Lahmeyer, "This kind of courage is always welcome in Oklahoma." "Republican State Chairman is a man of true courage and I'm proud to have his support. Across Oklahoma Republican Party officials and Party activists are joining our crusade to fight to save this nation" Lahmeyer said. Lahmeyer's campaign has raised over $500,000 with 4,000+ individual donors. In addition to Stone and Bennett, Jackson Lahmeyer has been endorsed by Trump National Security Advisor Gen. Michael Flynn. Recently GOP County committees in Logan, McClain and Cimarron Counties have endorsed Jackson Lahmeyer's candidacy as has Oklahoma State Senator, Warren Hamilton, who represents Hughes, Pittsburg, Latimer, and Haskell Counties. Lahmeyer has gained significant steam in his insurgent conservative campaign since entering the race in March of 2021, with support from national conservative icons like Flynn, President Trump's former legal counsel Jenna Ellis, Trump's former Senior Advisors Sebastian Gorka, America First Patriots like Mike Lindell and Senator Wendy Rogers as well as hundreds of Oklahoma conservative activists. Lahmeyer is a 4th generation Oklahoman, successful businessman, devoted father of five, faithful husband, teacher, and pastor running for the U.S. Senate. Lahmeyer believes Oklahoma is ready for a courageous fighter in the U.S. Senate with a backbone of steel. I invite every Oklahoman to join us in Enid on Sunday, November 21st. You won't want to miss it!" Lahmeyer's freedom rally starts at 6:00 pm at the Stride Bank Center in Enid. General admission tickets are free to the public. You can also purchase preferred seating for $20, and tickets are available for a VIP Meet & Greet with Stone and Lahmeyer for $150. Reserve tickets at [jacksonlahmeyer.com/stone-rally](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=dny8doun3zqlbxwly&linkid=1&link=647f187323864d99831686921c2fd5d3) or call 918-527-5673. clean_body: | | | LEGENDARY REPUBLICAN STRATEGIST AND TRUMP ADVISOR ROGER STONE AND OKLAHOMA GOP CHAIRMAN JOHN BENNETT WILL ENDORSE JACKSON LAHMEYER OVER INCUMBENT SENATOR JAMES LANKFORD IN ENID NOV. 21st FREEDOM RALLY TICKETS NOW AVAILABLE Tulsa, Oklahoma - Conservative U.S. Senate Candidate Jackson Lahmeyer who is challenging veteran Washington Senator James Lankford will be holding a freedom rally with Trump's longtime advisor and legendary Republican strategist Roger Stone and Oklahoma Republican State Chairman John Bennett on Sunday, November 21st at the Stride Bank Center, 301 S. Independence Ave, Enid, OK. A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: Nixon, Reagan and Trump. Roger Stone was indicted on fabricated charges in the now discredited Mueller witch-hunt and subjected to a Soviet-style show trial in Washington DC in which his first, fourth and sixth amendment rights were violated. His sentence was commuted by President Donald J. Trump as an act of justice and mercy on July 10, 2020. "I am proud to have the support of this American political Icon who had the courage to stand up to Robert Mueller's witch-hunt and who steadfastly refused to lie and bear false witness against the president. He is a true American hero who President Trump pardoned based on the unfair, illegal in baseless prosecution this man was forced to undergo" said Lahmeyer, "This kind of courage is always welcome in Oklahoma." "Republican State Chairman is a man of true courage and I'm proud to have his support. Across Oklahoma Republican Party officials and Party activists are joining our crusade to fight to save this nation" Lahmeyer said. Lahmeyer's campaign has raised over $500,000 with 4,000+ individual donors. In addition to Stone and Bennett, Jackson Lahmeyer has been endorsed by Trump National Security Advisor Gen. Michael Flynn. Recently GOP County committees in Logan, McClain and Cimarron Counties have endorsed Jackson Lahmeyer's candidacy as has Oklahoma State Senator, Warren Hamilton, who represents Hughes, Pittsburg, Latimer, and Haskell Counties. Lahmeyer has gained significant steam in his insurgent conservative campaign since entering the race in March of 2021, with support from national conservative icons like Flynn, President Trump's former legal counsel Jenna Ellis, Trump's former Senior Advisors Sebastian Gorka, America First Patriots like Mike Lindell and Senator Wendy Rogers as well as hundreds of Oklahoma conservative activists. Lahmeyer is a 4th generation Oklahoman, successful businessman, devoted father of five, faithful husband, teacher, and pastor running for the U.S. Senate. Lahmeyer believes Oklahoma is ready for a courageous fighter in the U.S. Senate with a backbone of steel. I invite every Oklahoman to join us in Enid on Sunday, November 21st. You won't want to miss it!" Lahmeyer's freedom rally starts at 6:00 pm at the Stride Bank Center in Enid. General admission tickets are free to the public. You can also purchase preferred seating for $20, and tickets are available for a VIP Meet & Greet with Stone and Lahmeyer for $150. Reserve tickets at or call 918-527-5673. To join the campaign or learn more, please visit , phone: 918-896-1041. ### | ] ] ] Email Marketing by [ [DirectIQ ] ](=)

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vOwdyo4kpUJNaX4D6iyqxzxROE71UlnaG_BuEUvHP1ZYL_bAeGbCmuPV7DoswcF2nAhJiWmPa-2o7QWMhE6OpP3lgP59rz-3YiWJHqhCPK_L__zDLoFXDMfsfDkQvMspry_zNOvuePCzTSAldyYkcFo8Aq897_CwMPrNvztanZKe9jZQqqp42vK0AlzkYQj7yeJ_53B1rYTwZ70pdJ45lqSiZLDK7FvbopoDNN46TwLN)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vEL6iuhTtkHMExiBtseTUDLLMDlAchBcQdbRDRrg0l6SwPTh3ayshP6-WmnYu50yEjHS7j_WMQLIigXpNIJ8CB92wPzr2ISAH-tmWtDUOpN2XudfYh7hjGnKH0Snv4DZ_n47XOH6oqSfDueb2xCBcrCHQQ6XOgiFST2CkRYOOMuZXqQWOfgfMNnuwYBnj36DXqRcKWpetuJIb9PI4ZUN1hOMsWa4V-Y0socLzTw4OJ_o)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vAHFUV1cfviSEjjtk9YUCVniDdThNE2MNkdfHgEaAnCLDwjZGU2Qr9KDE-YvAl58d3FoWKPcT8Vl8xzhdjIx2gKLUQWlFoQk-orPs80u53EvYYu_pY9ZgGtcHJG5LdpT4hyt9k_YQ0lWTlD4baVvgwTkTJCKiZhEJ0MmXOpIzGom1lIU-jU2U9zfu7RoUaHNELewfeIrbWnITXd3iABXsbuQ9pVSsUujTp8kVVmoC-u2)

**[Your donation,](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vC5GH2wxPDntzuFSB1FCWYfMLkt6bi9M6TntFm3fWCyhnmshqUCWMhGiNirzdY68-BeyR_Xfl4K0qjB1iVb_cimT76_0tH8JOqJ7GwefNXoCjQ2gH7adibUqEBS6R9R7fOuvDvjAbPHy7cQPB99lORNqqaByIIbHRBI4FBVOfhlUl_JrIxLEnmQfxxkqdWMShRLntA0dfFoRdbHNGcGhZ9WTDsWUgfCKrZ9M-1uHobxa)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vLLeH2qeqxm_oD_XxfWbbVrzeR77SeaLCVBNuUmR_V6WcP715-vYM-mZZY8-XCkKgRPux1k9K8ecTveWgW6KpMiHyEXtSFrJmSIur64GRkfP840lKvEgjazAQsjrnvNhc6RZWzX0UV3oqDZig49f9gsN6u5pcPi74KvMFuBdFMbOaReT9hsBsBvpFnxZAK6XCqhc-f0yUjiyAYOkrhtKE1i0NFmWoUVfv_m5J5eI7hER)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vGzdvXWOXOdsAJkWoFiCtvFkBGE9p0AOLBGtIT56qIHogvPPz9nwGkufymiGdbboN4QYbvgHK_AiGxB1aaI5UX5HfdQR5YYHK-eoI5jy5EH9g-mka9QZResGN1Pxx1Oi1YDnGA-G5EZ7Qy4IaQtRQ1L5ci4nSJQFYkqplFohLVYuLI5NvvOdgd8hTvxaYo6SHffGLcOnvuYCJcXHhcBsN2dUgxPvEIXE_Q3QAO7PpW6Z)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vFm9HaZcj3M4gHh92foWqP9InO8JBWvynHhTi8IR5thkAX0SUcgzT_IK9teZHDrcWODQfUsV7NZTzuUq3IyjPofzdvaJ8odGECibbAIZskXu8ZvbI2wu--nhHTitIHIs8qgnYB4fJ1CHFevqPShLt330BsGCxabLF0pBkHgMdyUyM_YHVKqhDY-0zH1IVcBF0TdWq59KFpi_2uJ6EnQMaqyyCNG5hjwBXfEKXpLM5AOF)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=912d714d99bd444988a2da9575239479&_e=FxxsJWTySkTKNBqxgCXUOx1eguyPCDIVvj4rf33LI_d2nzbVpwfWOhMGiht3F9W5FXp9M5TuU8h7Bp_hgxafCHdKWn_OOSkb2frRGbPF3d0cxICUE-ki9_c62kIFrlwJeB02iPWGAsBRXav7jKH0vDCNEVqZOv8lUQKFL30O2gQ4uqcZbCV9wG3TKZPTTd99exqztehnMEmkUV1InZitRFxG7G9w2psOMEX8ow3azl1Wx8ToeLyX8gcaxRKmFEVAcwLI4FNCMxFuWdGMv9bipkzpQaLVQJKv0NQE94TIuHhGL-7d_8UKSYKDNSBEs2HPGz6KCPSbB1q2iJ1ovmI5MsBpRWUJdnoR7QkWaU8MYSmtnv5PZGLjcxSng5WmlvSx)
Jim

name: Florida Patriot
subject: I will end Bidenflation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffrey Buongiorno For Congress**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728495:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "Headline") Peter: Joe Biden has his foot on the gas pedal, **_and he is driving us straight toward a Socialist Surveillance State!_** The radical Left is now debating the threshold for the bureaucrats at the IRS--the same ones who harassed conservative activists during the Obama era--to monitor all transactions in bank accounts. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728495:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "IRS")Whether that number is $600, $10,000, or whatever amount, **my answer is simple, I don 't want the IRS policing Americans' bank accounts.** Increasing the amount of money you are allowed in your bank account before the IRS has permission to snoop on you is not good enough. We will not kneel at the altar of Biden, AOC, or the Socialists. **We need to keep the IRS out of our bank accounts!** I'm Jeff Buongiorno-- businessman, patriot, and candidate for Congress. **[If you believe America can be saved and want to slam the brakes on Joe Biden's race to radical socialism, I need your immediate support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728495:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "If you believe America can be saved and want to slam the brakes on
Joe Biden’s race to radical socialism, I need your immediate support.")** Imagine having to explain every transaction in your PERSONAL bank account to a Government Bureaucrat. **If they don 't like it, you will be in trouble.** That's not an America I want, but it's the America we will get if Joe Biden, AOC, and the socialists have their way. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728495:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "Headline")America's economy is crumbling--skyrocketing inflation; supply chain disruptions that will cause significant delays for holiday shoppers; explosions of bankruptcies predicted for 2022; and repressive job-killing government mandates are just the tips of the iceberg. Discussions in Congress center around spending TRILLIONS of your taxpayer dollars; money we don't have. As a businessman, I don't see the logic. **The highway barons in Congress are robbing the next generation of Americans,** and after 30 years of running various businesses, I'm running for Congress against a professional politician who would rather organize a protest than solve a problem. I have created jobs, made payroll, and trained U.S. Veterans for the workplace. My extensive real-world business experience makes me the ideal candidate to clean up the messes in Washington that Biden and his socialist buddies have made. **[If you're ready for experienced business leadership in Congress to stop Bidenflation and the Big Brother monitoring that seeks to squeeze every last dollar you earn to fund their socialist spending spree, then join my team TODAY with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728496:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "If you’re ready for experienced business leadership in Congress to stop Bidenflation and the Big Brother monitoring that seeks to squeeze
every last dollar you earn to fund their socialist spending spree, then join my team TODAY with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250!")** I'm a businessman running for Congress to end the threat of socialism from radical leftists who use government agencies as a club to erode our privacy and further destroy our economy. **I need your help today to stop them dead in their tracks!** **[Will you join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728495:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "Will you join me?")** For Freedom, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728495:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "Jeff Buongiorno") Jeff Buongiorno
Patriot, Businessman, Republican for Congress P.S.-With your help we CAN WIN this battle for freedom. **[Your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 will help send this experienced business leader to Washington so I can keep the radical left and their bureaucrats out of your bank account.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728496:6OtHbt2lN:m:1:3298722022:16CD160BE24C2740037EE175E0C460D2:r "Your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 will
help send this experienced business leader to Washington so I can keep the radical left and their bureaucrats out of your bank account.")** Thank you.

| | This is huge, Peter— Hershel Walker is surging in the polls thanks to Mitch McConnell's consolidation of GOP establishment support for his insurgent campaign to oust voting rights champion Raphael Warnock from the Senate. 74% of Republican voters in Georgia will vote for Herschel Walker, who Donald Trump hand picked to defeat Warnock, POLITICO reports. Walker's next closest rival is polling at just 6%. It's clear: Trump is still the Republican Party's kingmaker, which means Raphael Warnock is in serious trouble right now. Donald Trump's furious, riled up, extremist base is pouring money into Walker's campaign. In just the first five weeks, Walker raised $3.7 million thanks to a blank check from nazi-sympathizers, anti-maskers, and anti-vaxers. If Trump and McConnell can successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022— a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020— Herschel Walker will defeat Raphael Warnock, and Mitch McConnell will control the Senate once again. Together, Walker and McConnell will clear the path for Donald Trump— whose reelection campaign is already firing on all cylinders— to retake the White House in 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but we're still $1,150 short from hitting our daily fundraising goal. name: Alex Stovall
subject: “You ain’t black”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I 'm a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona's 9th Congressional District. **I 'm the left's worst nightmare and let me explain why...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I 've experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we've been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I 'm SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I 'm in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)
The Left isn't shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **" You ain't black"** if you don't vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it's the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn't imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I'm a doer. I'm a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor's degree in Theology and master's in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it's why I'm asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn't popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it's time the truth came out. The left's socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left's oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall

[** DONATE » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728480:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)

Get the latest by following me on social media.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728481:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728482:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728483:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58728484:J0rsut2NF:m:1:3253819041:0427A78C6D2242BAE01D8BF5B919A259:r)

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: We are writing to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly avoid the traditional November slump that happens to all campaigns.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We need you to see something. This image is from 2019.
#

We need you to see something. The image below is from 2019. The blue bars are how much money we raised each month from October to December in 2019, and the orange lines are the number of donations.
As you can see, November had a big drop-off. That can’t happen again. Because this time, we already have five opponents and A LOT of outside spending to beat us.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help re-elect Mark Kelly? We need a good start to November or we risk falling behind.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211109-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1644_6688874_R5i2Va&akid=1644%2E6688874%2ER5i2Va)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211109-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1644_6688874_R5i2Va&akid=1644%2E6688874%2ER5i2Va)
We’ve already received thousands of individual donations this year, and it means so much to us. We’re off to a great start because of it.
But if there were EVER a time to add your first donation, this is the time.
Because if we can overcome the traditional November slump that happens to all campaigns, we’re going to be in great shape to win.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign. Help us get November off to a strong start. This is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211109-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1644_6688874_R5i2Va&akid=1644%2E6688874%2ER5i2Va)

name: Alex Stovall
subject: “You ain’t black”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f385462b0ca649f69e7a101a3f00b5bb&_e=Aw1kRoDJ0dXvbbb9JV3iv6lljFlC1qztGUFL8MSNWNxIzqH47g1hEFJo-g6D1QKdxmeI-r7F68xwT77k4R7jwRx4SBRgnXbhYQbJkqtkSbe8H4f0SNYPnrRF46rL2uksD9ZNaIprHH0yRUcJOV1Kus2fz4-NcQlKNBlf5E2P7YpZWU8tnWd6tBdihLwtB97m3xVyZt6zAsqSFlMYTNkTb5DwykTLdhF2fHx1WxL2ofAuqh0Wc5UyPXhOeif_YDXKgAywWclQ_QtRYmfrN0n5bj-j08STvidpPxIG3LdZrC9xtusJhUbe1v4j2AnsK7c3Uqr3L0tBVPt3eIr2ya4qGr3QP8MX692SLFCXDOuomw4HeM4u-zHXO8oPxqJ290CU)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f385462b0ca649f69e7a101a3f00b5bb&_e=Aw1kRoDJ0dXvbbb9JV3iv6lljFlC1qztGUFL8MSNWNxIzqH47g1hEFJo-g6D1QKdxmeI-r7F68xwT77k4R7jwRx4SBRgnXbhYQbJkqtkSbe8H4f0SNYPnrRF46rL2uksD9ZNaIprHH0yRUcJOV1Kus2fz4-NcQlKNBlf5E2P7Yo23vf3CfSgHHgoEbkHtmj2adWfS3tCmanuKDWnhupTMAgaU3QtkDoMEKZX3AtSHGCniM17wOLCBAzt590125D94M6SdE-8lG_37AAiXNi7T6NUIOUKHPd1DSVwyCxNXd-ou217FeIAffBSS-ykFbsxoAN0v4TRIrz8zZLg-nbdURRjYGonMzr6kjvQgKzTaPInOd6ALWpEJyl5uy63J5dZ) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f385462b0ca649f69e7a101a3f00b5bb&_e=Aw1kRoDJ0dXvbbb9JV3iv6lljFlC1qztGUFL8MSNWNxIzqH47g1hEFJo-g6D1QKdxmeI-r7F68xwT77k4R7jwRx4SBRgnXbhYQbJkqtkSbe8H4f0SNYPnrRF46rL2uksD9ZNaIprHH0yRUcJOV1Kus2fz4-NcQlKNBlf5E2P7Yqn1vRCY5KvH6FY-u_izmbs76hI48Wub10YO_D44jkeJ6kZWg5Eh3UCUBl7VvLeaFszA3sVJJaRuQAq0lKONIGeo5SEu6LF1moqU2nNcILNfKntj8E11yinoELyEhcmYtqLxCLStcVkiXkdn295qDb5OEfPAj1vkPqWHtgDBg_GVYNVnLqrmTqjHgyujAQPSgMiLhpmHABpB_xKwmZEocnF)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f385462b0ca649f69e7a101a3f00b5bb&_e=Aw1kRoDJ0dXvbbb9JV3iv6lljFlC1qztGUFL8MSNWNxIzqH47g1hEFJo-g6D1QKdxmeI-r7F68xwT77k4R7jwRx4SBRgnXbhYQbJkqtkSbe8H4f0SNYPnrRF46rL2uksD9ZNaIprHH0yRUcJOV1Kus2fz4-NcQlKNBlf5E2P7YqR_tN_qKLsTPwl7KL9YAA4czUn-nhVNj_eQwc8JWqov-577aY6MyZxaE2tHt5h4FQlgKOqCXUO6HoLWI4pDPw4WK6VfZQzWLQREPCbo4Qkxc90rFhBRMhVgdqEskplQXpyQvTg9FOMjy12auu3Rv5a54hiaKsvmcJcEBy46qHkO5M-1pu09EgpN_-UaGJBQNBlpg2RQSywDd5AIlFrBwfV)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f385462b0ca649f69e7a101a3f00b5bb&_e=Aw1kRoDJ0dXvbbb9JV3iv6lljFlC1qztGUFL8MSNWNxIzqH47g1hEFJo-g6D1QKdxmeI-r7F68xwT77k4R7jwRx4SBRgnXbhYQbJkqtkSbe8H4f0SNYPnrRF46rL2uksD9ZNaIprHH0yRUcJOV1Kus2fz4-NcQlKNBlf5E2P7YqWvoPveIKH3piltbEREmuoW1ltsk2IH5PrgJs7-C-6-YevRAvzcKsjM_FtF2h1Ekc4hyRPJtpOyMo6yJhve3XRMY81b_p1w_HapSO563EkGe19SWJV-m-uwsQQI4RhIW3dZtUu0PKvruNLwa185A3v5opijL9IqxEp2o76Smv_eC-NSkdNfORv75cJDinPbQmsk3AoKrwlhrXLAZsk7B4I)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f385462b0ca649f69e7a101a3f00b5bb&_e=Aw1kRoDJ0dXvbbb9JV3iv6lljFlC1qztGUFL8MSNWNxIzqH47g1hEFJo-g6D1QKdxmeI-r7F68xwT77k4R7jwRx4SBRgnXbhYQbJkqtkSbe8H4f0SNYPnrRF46rL2uksD9ZNaIprHH0yRUcJOV1Kus2fz4-NcQlKNBlf5E2P7Yp3YGAJGJ_6KQjWQ6yQ32oPrGE6TCvsLYjdEFU20RKi9LQlldO64Q0bEbPN04l1qLyia9r90Yv6C2mscci5ckYOnbIRUn-iHUAMo_TN5tKd7BYdWTlfao1XMBPAwalG4grW9_89VMT1QDG56SitlQgwJupLB8u-7Iz13DVt-yIpbkaL5PTA6uJSFUczXNExGRzHecI1LJrRIuoWdu44YXbn)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

clean_body: I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Peter, My name is Alex Stovall and I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I’m in their crosshairs. The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, “You ain’t black” if you don’t vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - For Freedom, Alex Stovall Get the latest by following me on social media. | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, insignia, photographs or descriptions of military service on this website does not constitute endorsement by the federal government, U.S. Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but._

name: Alex Stovall
subject: “You ain’t black”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HWqMd64th4nmJRPvveLI5lMHazgaf774u6Ksi--CKgV_kbejpunwMX8hh3DyUOPIgsa0uy-qyKhh5jX5bv8DId5RFmo3_nDD5fN2ZDpYBQgTLotrY_ZVxC7uLUVWpwARUirFV1YQ88Pl8bfpCepwnJ7EVA_G1Tc2dYu_oFJqbljjljc7qfOW8cxiq2Sfw6D5fAWzojoHvtUUE9xeW_EpYyC)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HVRlS3AE-TTV5YAeCCLozr1j5jy0lrKT4ehXBar7mU7Sc-5CdwZz7Dlkwg2Mp8nixAnGBWTR1qbcxcYqVw733Fagh3o2KDDBtTQLuQq-dT3SK8HwKhfCzBFw9G_VzLabHQfMnM0kYPNTUPuM3Gqio7iLqu_Jf4BtsXQDJH8tQTv6ZxTP-fUdMcMgpBcMtGIlXJkHARR7LoZLELay-qLBZKW) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HXtiThQB4wlwvew-18nhBx6X9WwBlWqJROufymeCT0cASX_cLKInMhCCyV90kPLVudzA8lORa0_f349cLrDvLf0kPJRWmMocs5KSs_LjDBEw9MgEfMmbCCWU_l3Ng9poCa5WunAmcrnCiT2yHlApuJkDcF391AowDFab1SgH-Qie9HP6yezV1rTURuMIm3o9tfEPuGh5MrxeQZ83EzU9Vwd)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HU7RcqDqyJm4OU-o2C1a0ERfQl0Gt6AwAG-PLY37wgblIcB5FuK9lmMU7kMhtzyjLZ5yqhEkV_DOjOyC7MtI2OANKIGSM73mmrtLJ96_1qcEUIpowxNYbqVwj_7-OeokEB_m4AG9eY4dHrsuqxqUQz0Ucnu12t72adU_bX90lJ4dAZDHFpPNKuDfPVW-2Be_JFx25KDUfhMMdcs9pYcdQcj)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HWtg9_2LlPL-AA8V2QOwZ_HezZ51M9tSsCUEcofzHooqpxS-MUouFV7eWM2-bUa7P_QRxZzMZADi7N3vUaBdWHtk4QY8nxiLfQmPUneOuYrdsriVsAT2SYBbdlBhtHFQqSMxh_62645PyPrVQfEYMROkeXu3zFwrlV2PY0BUoFxtIjtoBTK8kg5y5a-oWm5EZ6jYB51Pi0PbKZw8ZWbn8cY)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HUMzKFim5ylgsZevKdSbXiznPIcGgoziu9lovCcxkRum5ZPoYlExSkrfeLt342Tk9jDdDl3tI8quSu4WroR_-ZUjzIwcGgZksjQlpccKlcqrY5WflyHkJhxPPqbPbtb3SrgWaoBYkVBcaFEFOY4pj8iio6gf2ApNFLINhgdA8nl64RGTtOpc7PZU1AWu4qvy3oAa1tdpAowT_XeRmnfU1e_)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c93d7a69ff2544aa863fa093025cf330&_e=rGu-gwUz9MjtH00EiWs1bQOX-MkTWpHq1sq0_8vPSpqaDT-_Wu5sBnhZc5t22GP6csAZqJIeRoG5xy_H7ipSHbXC2Jc_QTQTZ939v_eYWp42uW_IJ8mw03ysMAl-BXGX4c-PClBhAT2RiYVzQ4oESgmmUf5PHCW2KHk_8bpG-HWvLhwKbreyQigXS9HdrH29VngSvdSqA6M_T2ikFZwdBKl8lxhmQwvoxQP4hY33JQrEFATHAbjhUeB6Xhve0Ym6-mDXSR-xYDLEcXHhGv8NWRD7oS2AWY2VWrRi5Kb_wCzY-GYk_AHVb5UP7Uf5MW5Br6lzRMF_-FhjksH15C_7NTRHxwLmd49EG_62T-vy9qV4pGhtfcviJUrqEpqh_6eM)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall

name: Mark Kelly
subject: We have to pick up the pace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38471813/315600469/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzc5YmZlYS1iMjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Shlk9gfjTzGcn_cqpxltkzLDDc96L4C8OQfifp7UMOo=)
Friends — I know we send you a lot of emails. But in just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances. Here is the truth: In just a few days, our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end. And when it does, we’re going to take stock of the ads running against us and the resources we need to fight back. It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. They spent millions against us in 2020, and they’re already doing it again in this election. We won last time because we built the largest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. That’s just a fact. We received millions of donations and ran an unprecedented volunteer effort. But the dark money groups are already back, and that means we need to rebuild a grassroots campaign of similar size, or even larger, if we’re going to win again. Right now, only about 10% of the people who gave in the last campaign have given to this one. So we have to pick up the pace, and this mid-month fundraising drive is an important marker.
