clean_body: It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. | = Friends — I know we send you a lot of emails. But in just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances. Here is the truth: In just a few days, our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end. And when it does, we’re going to take stock of the ads running against us and the resources we need to fight back. It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. They spent millions against us in 2020, and they’re already doing it again in this election. We won last time because we built the largest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. That’s just a fact. We received millions of donations and ran an unprecedented volunteer effort. But the dark money groups are already back, and that means we need to rebuild a grassroots campaign of similar size, or even larger, if we’re going to win again. Right now, only about 10% of the people who gave in the last campaign have given to this one. So we have to pick up the pace, and this mid-month fundraising drive is an important marker. And that’s why it’s so important for me to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split automatically between Mark Kelly and Michael Bennet: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you in advance for your continued support. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7LSONUMJyvjApO3HYbx-fArUWGcKFYfJzC08I0Hwz729Tqix6EEvfxX3sTfc3GCG06lZ1uKQbNDjVmJjtkj_GL9bUKMBgYjuZLdnp463EdVEUrnnS9cyHImupQq1bsHNV9gIr7VZ0MRDfKo70iSH2fp4b3h_rBf8TXODRwuUB7f6Qa9FzZVGGOzqy51CUjm6rIv1pPOlljjDZKCXNM3M22v)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7JSMo0vzSAE-xkU53qneEhoU2eGJsllxpC4yUw4Vt7QVOvSrseaJFfeuNZJRJBUK8EDA2FU1SmcbLpebEAbCwLAhMQdjjOVzpmh04egE8nO5Cbp1yNCS_9shHiqZhy8rnqy9ncwC7j3pG0PagYpAMhQvYoiXfJG8Buv1T7y5Fs5DctI-KQiyLFhWaUyXCGW8jWuqz2NyP3dmTGahzcO7EYP) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7I_lo1ZaMgYIuUXMxSvkqlOs3A90o34q9njb5fw-XLQmPV828GgjhccTZyKWVuCuxXyex-MLrtPIDQFVSWalWcXG8KtCXbP7H4rmCCU3nODzYuhlyKs9CLi9Bu6iv3Q5onl2Lb1Y2bykIbe8SJj1c8uBluWOVQFw2mKtGFVzdw-ZQV8brz7C-OCKZugaNvoU3KGydmhu7s7NCHDzuwpaGcq)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7IeP9JXM9W8D6yjMyKeIojzp_apc6ri4SONmwoSiB4yyFOO6JqPeauDEK_sSZSAwU03n_jq_cSvI_wR41gxryImmu_P4bnkWqL-P685B9JgI5kDCMXdJSZalbloypGehqt_2P6QdVB-PsOODzpS4bMCRDZ7cl5Y9q8Gtq9QWBhv7c50QgA5mrvMhtfw3PESyftNpOFgScn9BQr688mmxFM1)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7LWcwjbv3K4hblqSFHNnLu4Q_l5POy1SycqIuySnetspANasrBWSZvC2R7hLH7p1ziWC6AECaWrs3u6ScJboMbbr7s-GpO9fpYVTe0YzOw8YZnoY0aeH7BnYbMb8vnxndSZYryzZME-Jma1jSvz4tCtcXcEXp4kjeECjuBE_bvnCML6z3oz92pIIR9rrd0-vJ2m16cKsKaip32-ao-jVKJo)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7JI8qUCM0aacQTqQTHv8VOrqS3BCsWWZzCK7ZxcRRxFJaZj2NLqiv0daBdLXM-WzY3EEG6MbvlpCmYXU4YryKv6nS3CcYLmwq_iSJQhVKz0ba6Z0OgLZwIbAz5XbXJ6Y6PJ_IBGUXRwjHp5s2anBrcDdEkmeJvtb3Er5RaLxQZLg2NKVe8oUw8NPYbzYA1Z3t7ZCZ-5_6x9hcofOb6h368Y)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7LXPau0YeNuOfx2fKNqs0ROoEcPOAuXBkW6frH3pGRr2hgTd6wVykezqz0DIKjqQVHcLgu_ODrN25Yy8ebPFSqPuqQnQOc442WpBmYsztkB9-tY6nBTttLS-V1b2oV2yn3Wl22i9HeByMmrs9VkSD3VursRnL84MnQZiUXAD5oX3MM7SyWnjo4O5cggUVz49p14n4mfPS2rN97Rpljxi6xp)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall

[** DONATE » **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=71ed51da52a141f9ad1b633201947f4d&_e=7ZKllPl66pIwI0KJ2VQlHVxkGha2U19AQ4maZoy4r7b2Qt8d375BftY2-JtCPOlQ4Jbbi6ezXu0bwKn4rkRfj106Pr_zagmAi92e3BHl0zcL2-iwdrUDeXQH2BFs-s9gv6ds185iLc6ppTwVKxZAaCaT-hL1Uy8GSuV2VEL7d7J4HIoxu4CX570FuVtDqvU7pYK8Ipl5A1oDwMVCVqOTlzCHTV16hJGulBE8J1sqQzuiDEXv6w5jjJPBp9VvJoA0Xs64vj3sk7LyAuC4Fz72whNWTlSKonAp49OyXo7KcBEBqkeMDson0YMOVXAjujwtevpkwLjFmwTalLFn9EQF-4wtakKSs5ttyiMbEBOq_G5P-jW7MxSVZJVsVl9IXiz-)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: RE: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks – make no mistake, New Hampshire will be one of the most competitive Senate seats in 2022. This is a decisive moment – and in a swing state like New Hampshire, we can't take anything for granted. That's why my campaign is buckling down to protect this critical Senate seat. But Mitch McConnell will not give up on New Hampshire – he will continue doing everything in his power to unseat me. If we don't have the resources we need to stand up to McConnell's fundraising machine, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor. **[Right now, we're still $15,000 short of our emergency goal. Can you rush $5 before midnight tonight to help protect this seat and our slim Senate majority? I wouldn't ask unless it was absolutely necessary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472195/315602490/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-competitive-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiYWQxNC1iNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QkGDSQyhJdnRiBYYZDWDPy0s5snOQYU8VzvHeJAvEk=)** Here's the best link to give at: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-nov21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472196/315602491/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-competitive-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiYWQxNC1iNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QkGDSQyhJdnRiBYYZDWDPy0s5snOQYU8VzvHeJAvEk=)** Thank you so much for your support; it means the world to me. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Tue., Nov. 9, 2021
Subject: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472197/315602492/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-sununu-k&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiYWQxNC1iNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QkGDSQyhJdnRiBYYZDWDPy0s5snOQYU8VzvHeJAvEk=) Folks – In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. **Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted.** With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade. Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red. With all eyes on New Hampshire, my campaign launched an emergency fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight. **[Reaching this goal will help my team build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. Can you rush $5 before midnight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472198/315602493/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-competitive-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiYWQxNC1iNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QkGDSQyhJdnRiBYYZDWDPy0s5snOQYU8VzvHeJAvEk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472199/315602494/-1803038125?refcode=e20211109_mwh-competitive-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiYWQxNC1iNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QkGDSQyhJdnRiBYYZDWDPy0s5snOQYU8VzvHeJAvEk=)

This is a decisive moment – and in a swing state like New Hampshire, we can't take anything for granted. That's why my campaign is buckling down to protect this critical Senate seat. But Mitch McConnell will not give up on New Hampshire – he will continue doing everything in his power to unseat me. If we don't have the resources we need to stand up to McConnell's fundraising machine, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor. = Here's the best link to give at: = Thank you so much for your support; it means the world to me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maggie Hassan Date: Tue., Nov. 9, 2021 Subject: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race = Folks – In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted. With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade. Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red. With all eyes on New Hampshire, my campaign launched an emergency fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = The stakes of this election are high, and this race could decide the fate of the Senate. What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades. I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I know we can win this. But it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together. = Thank you for your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me. name: Alex Stovall
subject: I’m a black conservative and I’m being attacked
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4a5be92b7ac74cda90acf47b28042a72&_e=rgmk6hx06Buz436Tw1a3jg9tbn8P7BdlCi6mfUmnsJ0XMBM581v7pMHxydIoteQq1ADWai0ls9Rmh68HU2ItTPmD8LZnHVOQ-Ny-K47kJPbTpfWm67qQwvBcyTXgGjKIRPn6wSf0_vEWAvXU77AF5hTijexieCs9EHJl_9gzFGHfm3nmz3cvl9DwofZhMv352xmmXNYTc8pgISXS9Qo3hsl4rtiIN96zAtoQugEwB0BzjB3CrOJX88Q-33JFaUIkD1HpucLSDLGKIdYt6GARBW1QeIUoBLRpbDIXLFu8bkuDTOp5CWHw2brXEUn1cKQ8c5TJ5LDG-kAt7FJhstUyvE7eFDpObybMhsFEgypSliMofJRgTBYMomNAY-fCyA-h)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4a5be92b7ac74cda90acf47b28042a72&_e=rgmk6hx06Buz436Tw1a3jg9tbn8P7BdlCi6mfUmnsJ0XMBM581v7pMHxydIoteQq1ADWai0ls9Rmh68HU2ItTPmD8LZnHVOQ-Ny-K47kJPbTpfWm67qQwvBcyTXgGjKIRPn6wSf0_vEWAvXU77AF5hTijexieCs9EHJl_9gzFGEnM6k0YNKIpYw-8DGDb306J7XFmFln6ZSEfTyDihvsCwH6CdpwJTbF4MnBagGYR72DbsKkK3iH8Nv4Xa2HPD11geQnkkXnYWlofxm5X1hRag5PO6FF3vbf-R3unPgmXa_a-7mxq4t9OKZH62lHnCxetdHc4ZlmZ9BsjMRLr7GDVXdxDvv_YtZAGnL6ifGbEHjiYJuYI0mR3Cd5qNVSk4LQ) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4a5be92b7ac74cda90acf47b28042a72&_e=rgmk6hx06Buz436Tw1a3jg9tbn8P7BdlCi6mfUmnsJ0XMBM581v7pMHxydIoteQq1ADWai0ls9Rmh68HU2ItTPmD8LZnHVOQ-Ny-K47kJPbTpfWm67qQwvBcyTXgGjKIRPn6wSf0_vEWAvXU77AF5hTijexieCs9EHJl_9gzFGFY0_7VDE8WPjhF3SIHfrpVVASa14FkQE2SeUMWyQ5C2xelF4Mt_xO_p4NZaUDiSOA-JBl4tBDLlrjRFZlLhAP19S805mAaqaTUH_F9TTaGDEWFnAln62mslbCUdqmcdaFjqGE3Og-YBpq3HxFc45TS4GtLn4LaN9F-R-q0yqzfjTq-MvW0GLOnyhAVlpOaIAj2MeoqHtlHouVol3_zjfPq)
The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. clean_body: I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Alex Stovall and I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I’m in their crosshairs. The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, “You ain’t black” if you don’t vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

clean_body: RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

Roger

name: Cora Neumann
subject: I'm running.

Hello friend,

**I'm Cora Neumann, and I'm proud to announce that I'm running for Congress in Montana's new congressional district!**

I love Montana, and serving this state has been the privilege of my life -- especially right now because we are at a turning point with many challenges and opportunities in front of us.

Our economy is booming, but growth is uneven. Too many working families lack access to high-wage jobs to pay the bills. Home values are going up, but Montanans who've been here for generations aren't sure they can afford to stay. We need a representative who understands these issues.

**What we don't need in Congress is another insider like Ryan Zinke -- Trump's former Secretary of the Interior. Zinke is the likely GOP frontrunner in this race, and is best-known for wasting taxpayer dollars for personal use and selling public lands to the highest bidder.**

**[I'm thrilled to take this next step to serve Montana and its people. And today, I'm asking you to join me in this journey. Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $35 to become a founding supporter of my campaign for Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472420/315603471/102973118?refcode=em-11921-intros8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI5OTBkMy1iNzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljbVHegRUYwLOcfXa4HxxZj6pjD3hMFbKNRPdc5GWtI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472421/315603472/102973118?refcode=em-11921-intros8&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI5OTBkMy1iNzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljbVHegRUYwLOcfXa4HxxZj6pjD3hMFbKNRPdc5GWtI=)

My parents raised me with Montana values -- hard work, gratitude for our incredible land, and the importance of caring for one another.

That's why I spent my career improving access to health care for underserved and rural communities. And it's why last year we launched We Are Montana -- a non-profit, public health hub for rural and Native leaders across Montana battling through the COVID-19 crisis.

This new district gives us a rare chance to do even more for Montana's workers and small businesses. But winning this race isn't something I -- or any one person -- can do alone:

**[If you're ready for new leadership in Montana, chip in today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38472427/315603478/102973118?refcode=em-11921-intros8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI5OTBkMy1iNzQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljbVHegRUYwLOcfXa4HxxZj6pjD3hMFbKNRPdc5GWtI=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They Stole New Jersey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is why audits are important! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2b8e896fc5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Have you been watching the news?

**Then you couldn’t have missed Glenn Youngkin’s tremendous win over Terry McAuliffe in Virginia. **

_And you also couldn’t miss the nail-bitingly close contest in New Jersey._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7905c3743c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **And if we have learned anything from close contests, this is where the Democrats DON’T PLAY FAIR!**

In the dead of night, once again we saw the same play out of the same playbook. Thousands of “miracle” votes procured out of thin air with already 100% of votes reporting...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=696eaae21d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There is still time for this to play out and I am calling for all election integrity patriots to _watch this contest closely._

If we’re all watching, then they have nowhere to hide.

**_1:54 AM: When everything changed_**

As seems to be the pattern of Democrat “victories,” everything changes in the dead of night.

At 1:54, in particular.

Bergen County, New Jersey’s largest county, was claiming 100% votes reported with 219,894 votes, with Jack Ciattarelli winning 52% of the vote of that county.

**Then, a “glitch happened.”**

_Without warning, the vote switched to 261,528 votes (over 40,000 votes more), with Murphy declared winner of that county. 40,000 votes out of nowhere!_

**_Ringing any bells yet?_**

_This is exactly why I am pushing for a nationwide audit in all 50 states. We are making great progress here in Arizona. AG Brnovich has launched his investigation and we are pressing on to Pima!_

But this is not sufficient. When we see sources of blatant fraud, it is time for us to double down on our efforts and save our elections!

_If you think we need to push for a nationwide audit, especially in New Jersey, please support my efforts here!_

My name is Mark Finchem. I have been leading the vanguard of election integrity Patriots since I initially paid for election integrity hearings out of pocket.

**And this was the spark that ignited the firestorm now sweeping America of Election Integrity.**

_This is why I am the Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona. He knows that I will protect elections in this key swing state and make sure that 2020 never happens again!_

**[But I cannot win this fight without your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=738f911811&e=44b8c466b0) We are almost done with 2021, and 2022 is about to begin. And we need to make sure we have the war chest to continue to fight the good fight against Liberals backed by crony Silicon Valley Billionaires.**

_[Can you help us win this fight with a generous donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c8ca6254b7&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=82df52d520&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ed2cd436a8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=56fbd95fde&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=30e27c1bbb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=30e27c1bbb).

name: Blake Masters
subject: Do you believe CNN or MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
It's definitely not being taught in schools. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4034779b6fe34a99929854642ba475aa&_e=ZqAFqyBscJ8HMcZpCGi3jsc_KS9QJXopVDZgVaU3ZzlfYdwlmAsEvwJCDw3N-uDDCbR6h1zCS7bUgLQJ04uKhXQqmYk6sQKa-q-LOBTgOYGaETEDpTxfJwxShwZnBdIEvwaOg0dvUZbXmhpDyGs_9gwjgf0NKT6agAasu34yxO3wCh_hxX1UELc13Ns-a8ZZL9VDcu5fp58HfqrMG4CCQIAH8gUnO6JPnzhj9GI5q1oWHXDxh0iygjH5vPKqMGAaNfl4hH0y04Sw0449cbzzs_z9M2J6ZrqrhMX_lZmD5gsvaIijhoMvTJha9FOIvJE8LaV0wHsDMNlavCATTrPNHPy2Jb4t-FWIsBvmnGFQZbmkP-jzj1ascYFrdAwC_9ywRLuJUhvnHXipwZRXw-vTeJPXf9k8DFQhZPQiPePBiCWPOQRtOtMDSgaZUpDlfSnv)

---
Fellow Conservative,

The Left lost their minds last Tuesday. After months of gaslighting Virginians about what is going on in their schools and telling them that they shouldn't have any input into what their children are learning, **they lost the Virginia governors race.**

CNN and MSNBC can't stop; they keep saying a Republican only won in Virginia because the voters are racist.

Glenn Youngkin won because of Democrats' insane rhetoric. Parents don't want that radical race ideology in their schools. [**They made that clear in Virginia, and we'll make it clear in Arizona in 2022.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4034779b6fe34a99929854642ba475aa&_e=ZqAFqyBscJ8HMcZpCGi3jsc_KS9QJXopVDZgVaU3ZzlfYdwlmAsEvwJCDw3N-uDDCbR6h1zCS7bUgLQJ04uKhXQqmYk6sQKa-q-LOBTgOYGaETEDpTxfJwxShwZnBdIEvwaOg0dvUZbXmhpDyGs_9gwjgf0NKT6agAasu34yxO3wCh_hxX1UELc13Ns-a8ZZL9VDcu5fp58HfqrMG4CCQIAH8gUnO6JPnzhj9GI5q1qojTyPU-sHlUTVahQjZSamvbHQcpPt8TrE5aM4rE_El75tZkpnDzPeqG-ObYe1Rvb7ZHLx18zwIa_ZhCOkq3wTNNaGfvBCW7RmbvPLQhHM4w9oMd9ZEiwZoAQDdxJuwuHnQinY7Q3K2Dk1wMRsLf3k7o5gwR7TDts40PT_hVDQe9lCQfOUt9A07yoKgZrbtJMbdIeZir_e70pgIrm_JfQQ)

**Fellow Conservative - you should have anxiety about what schools are teaching kids.** We know that their curriculum is full of lesson plans teaching kids that some races or genders are morally superior to others. _Parents saw it firsthand in 2020 when their kids were locked out of their classrooms and forced to do Zoom school._

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUuq6ZKZg77jpy_vlDE9Jmtgg752L_sVjon4kt6_pT7EToXH4ywSiRnUIzGG4bHJ8hfuhd6euxvvtNGSOYR2ifcSxbQED8-88A4iEDlhOrb1-jlA3MHSreVqqFIgTLvaZ83PAJGpQIKYSJPyjnRG7niROMcXgmx3CpRy0cTbFK2khRoJf62X8KzGF8ZJDEnDmPvpr1-ZlgoyUoQSOfAzeYePGGX_-_lpwSgvGg7qOhfat)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUvrexTvyEUVv4ABS6-jEIDZUvJRtN9jZvv2gsNnrtexEZZIIpIM4vw1lKpTe_5gk7uB2NqD7rlTkfgLv9ewPu0KqHqby6e2JIgcL2MHp-G3MM4HUbLyxLshPUBhQ3MAztmglVLUhNJg6kcAOYE6z3VUvsHY2hf40BQLLzPo8ksj7wrDVzlcch6BNH3CtH1d9ndDrVJkR_t11b35mly0bsB1OrdLU-3NhDR9kPJTTcAXV)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUoC8oDy_n0so3luN9xtrhmL3KCfRS1rSLXJN__OtfrhjOUVGRy2cyj-b3zI8-UAR66wk3z0H1cFydSf0CCF7kxphjqRSTUtPi-q3CIJSEHHoCU1nMDUoGCtPCZW9sxSdl5oQYQNkwCKN9GNn0xXEwnV-rpD17-NmtcZKMt_z1tOXJjGAOlkQS9QO99NySiSykhNk_gmajExl1fNIZ69GbSj5KthwUpqcK9SaRx90Zv7A)

**[Your donation,](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUro6lWtl-1vs3e-EclK0OdhdZpcOM6tLSlCQpug9HxUVJXnUywp-l37tlM3Ix27pvfbiV5OwSoquaf4kYM9aYoVM5E1srL7xEUSrcif9MG5-CVQWRU-asVjVhEPy-zElhabpRqOzzNtLpWHPmnGHbmzA46MfbQqjo977sN7H4TuLG-erPoT9XNOr0ciYFfzDmUxtuAD11_4HgVKsrGKjj2qe5CkmrdXX1HI-EE9DAdE4)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUhANYHAd6JkrtjNJjn3S-Qcl0rvPI3xMzs73bvg6DrmMc4Ph69WRL-x2iVX1MrBOSE181ltrMY9Uh9LndhUf8hyfvu5Ul5hp9HEYpehl4V1wc0Pf9HJH7E9zQiqrFGs2m-P90pyM8KSmDqnBi7o087PRXiPrbYmAJBlMmBtOfAD_ALz0YY6-zJgxJE5EaN15GqzjXwVM-zngu9LdOaAH_9yyN5vacK2TKehrByTP68Us)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUmz5NvYVOr7ZTEZgdP5_jzGnUDdkmCv0dz3lKIAA0VR_4puxQj2Pjli28ywqVAO2j91Yy-OAAP-9xBQ1pFFbiHAVpGaPTPXjJBmGEPMk19BrQFiiyfXSA42gCF944J9qFySoiYh_OgRkhJLPvS6Os9gelZrxjHZkuz9R8PqDMzicrN5BlnwSzB8kfI1k_mssHEXLinOoj9p4NC5LIpNrzh7kUk7xO7SE8AZmsSFSiUx-)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUrGLzWSln3gLa_bXFTbd9I7oHniPZwTOjZQGnNJPW4q4KMHpvyMhqLYpVjqd65TK9D4ox5ehm6F9WhOK1TXGNZqdh-FPSKWekm1ZMgZgMg0Ca4-NjAFRVwpkOtYuhpcJN4SBxYW68gkpAZvGV7uDSrapokXXYV0kNyQaMBYb_RLdOi0UMTko3MbUfPDypiOrVZ9uoxZhMsN5gfY8X2EW6xwHelTEBAIKfH-T1pCdDhjR)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1f90430caed4697ac381ac8e59e29f0&_e=lRND6SW22749Loe2PO8dcL9kB7sE1CO_-Xt4zSDFG4djKtvdl8MS6YKAR-LeBObbeseYLz0oLwjOyzDXHfTqZrmuElAzAk_mJuOIBTs_ucdxqKrQNsPU5dhUl-oOuO9dBxxHd0Q3XvbWpsvzc0qXUlXiNPH6FuKb8bB4_BsZ6DEiejb48ZIv-_fXNy3q54XCK6k1GWdcA3R9MgK0AdCemBfzJdpj7fUzzrxqAxvGZxNdJDRyY9NFKciA9-Uu20pinzWglSh_tMATTorsud8XeihMlA6nBZNAI1e0YuyOdt-kWkLnOK0YOCjKosYSfipcHKDUTayeoFkJjfgmnY4GghCD3nDG6vUW0FbKkyjTzkmY6RradRgaOJa9_zYUWD3N)

subject: Fw: Poll: I'm Leading…. For Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
Did you see the email below?

I can't tell you how glad I am. All our hard work paying off. But we still have a LONG way to go.

Rep. Herrera Beutler has only one chance to beat us: a massive ad campaign designed to fool voters into thinking she is anything other than what she is: an America Last RINO.

Please help us to maintain and build our polling lead with a contribution today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Thanks,

Byron Sanford
Campaign Manager
Joe Kent for Congress

-----Original Message-----
From: Joe Kent <Joe@joekentforcongress.com>
Sent: Saturday, November 6, 2021 5:00 AM
Subject: Poll: I'm Leading... For Now.

Dear Patriot,

According to the latest Trafalgar Poll of our race, I’m in first place. The poll says I'm over seven points ahead of the incumbent Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler, 30.6% versus 23.4%. The poll also revealed that Herrera Beutler has an astounding 59% unfavourability rating!

This result is a combination of the hard work our campaign has put in on the ground here in the Third District and Herrera Beutler’s constant betrayal of America First, Republican Values.

However, voting does not begin until July 15, and during that time, Herrera Beutler will spend her multi-million dollar war chest to try to take me out.

Can you help us defend against her special-interest funded campaign with a donation at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate today?

While the poll numbers look great for us, there is one problem: 37.4% of the respondents said they did not know me or had no opinion about me.

You can be certain that when Election Day nears, Herrera Beutler is going to bombard these low-information voters with propaganda to cover up her vote for President Trump’s impeachment, her vote against building the border wall, her votes for amnesty, her votes to send our fellow citizens to die in endless wars, and her vote against repealing Obamacare.

We can’t let that happen. Please help us raise the money to battle back on the airwaves by donating today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Thank you for your support.

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

PS - I know that I wouldn’t be leading this race without your support. Please, help us continue to raise the money we need by chipping in at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Paid for by Joe Kent for Congress

==============================================

https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4a7c82fdc2&e=00856e661d&c=6536e5d303

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please claim your Christmas wrapping paper before 11:59 PM.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2tlgm--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | **FINAL DELIVERY NOTICE**
---

| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2tlgm-1k6f4-4qqlpo5/)
---
| | | [CLAIM YOURS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2tlgm-1k6f5-4qqlpo6/ "Generic Button")
---

Keep your Trump pride going through the Christmas season this year by giving your Conservative loved ones a gift wrapped in this limited edition _“Trump Collection”_ wrapping paper! **Don’t miss out on making Christmas _YUGE_ this year! **

**Inventory is limited, so be sure to claim yours before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, or you’ll miss out on making Christmas great again.**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOURS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2tlgm-1k6f6-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2tlgm-1k6f7-4qqlpo8/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2tlgm-1k6f8-4qqlpo9/ "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2tlgm-1k6f9-4qqlpo0/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: This is a political hit job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs in Ohio are attempting to retire me from Congress by drawing me into a congressional district that favors DEMS by 19+ points! RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_t=mJMygue3SAR7AdmE7ZpGe8gUKm3LJbpOwksvOlxqzWoE0ECUEvy0fS2mJM5mSQPIjhGeNqG_JAGnGmDW3tJ_4daTbrCB-ums2uKZIQgGCa-Nz6DUhNknWk0SgPKOCgs9g_MIs15JxDxUayvaoGxzMXTl9dIhDsk3X2wqQt52EgA%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6GiKCi_WiEvQxfz_In1kBhVwBZVIC5PinE747SxKqQ3ykOCVmhIeb4fVdgu09jNKzTaIb2zna0AXASQhiGhiAvsvF-XTze3W4y9-vMepxB_O2OuFjvgT4L0ym4zZW5e0sPBcwmTa2j0afEhsS6hCHtGoxv1A6cs8UjtabbRIifKHct7QLCS2vVHmya0WJNq5fDJAQSrfgcKXgmAnzf30LVZiS1WUR6LEdq3l3-3TRnTn)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6GJF_i18Az5X8f_nzR-OWNH7pJYU30NstDqnMx7L5qtKfzWmisjKJP9w2vx05_zwsjClGjzRcSuSOl7xQf62noEN8sYGDeyHBbj1-4Eu-YUMhAPI6xbAEcZeK5yfn_2SA1CMKo37nrAhjgvEHfzVvpVmZ60V4pG6rredxBhZjYzrAxu9lrG-yKsef0H8qvLOwYXwnbafK0jKcNkZ1SGrBfp7aWhMWS1PIzmRuBMPJX71)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6KhC58OZSkcrorGZCY5j6u7m2Ho70jUNZummFDOxbLVuv2_PnTS1YJpLSJWM_FnOd4ZkszgZYjr3tQ0z-hQUGRxzuCTYnNtnaDRtnRIrRktZwU897CipjAtUNd7zKqtWWjlfIx8J8qM6y1CnJq8mNA9wv38pcSDVFFTVIysn8lGPrhDdfVc9WrMDIeBt90a6_fpUcreKRpbhpSoEex6hxPE5a-oXACtHsEZ1PWj3MoXb)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6C5zD1lk18tyyElQR3PGDcLntSdeisOHQ-lbJhGFNF6m7Ek6dSSDYEy9tG8ADqjPHGH5xB0up25nvN47XsfERPxzY75BXNG5s7a0ZYN7SB6XQAntCTUjsWAia6AHDnWuFBN82m_RpkEEh7MOAbwlPd3s801BbN0Zz1JUXU115TgvIVzrHjMRqH0HO_A5Gj_NdQXxqLXV2pu5EjSTygKkNCDDkvZlL5MbZmWSwHjXcWjh)

**[Your donation,](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6BAbPm2VmsDXmuHRR3wpF8FfGxpMxpN7odb9MU6Y_rYGSlg7WvU2YYHS_TqBKY6ErcTTVwaLpwk2R5qQjrcx4QPrluuwOFC6RYjb6RLwKFs8Y503HkpAZcyHAf5yzLFq7DaROYUyLlTFDGXMwdg-rCAkI1IgXiJ6uhaAH5nEtSa3YafoZIxcdA1NYA3tFK1fwPkNnE7P9QXeyYltaw4UZB5_nVS4Mk1Al4heCJfwkNFp)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6Op98F3TdVac7eEE2aGERLOWKIFMgTyXelBjnGNePH6zSKJWnX48f2L_AUmu0qdU4M2Qnd9maNk9TDDuzkhjvCJlIIiAZMldQjarbyOwGf-v6GmgKLjLT_mt7DJv7eLVI-ATJYOFaBoNk_ghqnx7OQqeAeN0UgnB2E57CpyHLTzsI0E7USrnNHE-xZTOOASXRjxyJix-53hxOVBb5zK-rWbdCFPmdR_VP9qnv41nPZil)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6Go_IdC-2gTeYuHy9KB3V0TcWFPcomsNXeq2BNEeritHBTVNYwY6ybb9fgqRqwjFGfY8Lr9cn-psYqtR29oQ5x5E0fcD-Z8ETu6hq3e_4_HeWDI9tfcpHzphqQ251GPosyVbtOMJLw0kIBcNIlNUrN1eYbCqLKfDuoW7jAcVheD40aUPchT7K3HgU3enUZaocX9SB8Prvuo4uz3naW3HxE1O6Tjbaj5BQNxZ2DSwBeUt)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6K6o722lpyK0XJl1IzJTi3BPNXG5HlcocT8R-kmR9bB9YJ6TfmCm4gWb2cA4etIgrcAsKLAiJevvXHkn3jkdDcidk-g-OlJ90yBFzXuF8FshEBnovd9RYhbKbymHnvdiSHecTAjASro_ZxR37K4z1dg-qcAWS9Wjhm6yG5R1opREbQVMvtAD5hKoG0bTWX3-syU-4AxB6D_hU6UJ1BLM44xI1mu2QAugOSy7p3bxFy5T)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6GZUekd7jshU_uhXD7yZXvEo6JPmJ4DCimySlDehX63DmUTRLuxl5OlP1E5SKqjgtJGICmgTiQkI9roj1MYqyrg2ZxCGCkELjm_0oqgxlKW11JQatqTF6eLOFUfbU0Bow79GCcBv5WuIiZBWuzfENk-XZP6158zlQb8rArTMsUJW--SwSMDxTN4su6_lNihOzMwTTetH9lvWkh0nEvRlIxgvf9ZtKFplKq3ISXv6lSqC)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee205aeafba74f52b19a9e083eedd48b&_e=ZSbJ-FHC04WdSiMXgT9JoXK7fW0cWQyO1iJGxxC9pdBPR76zrrt6rh-xrFD0Kf-T9r1xfZn2zy41Bmq7e7O8IArXom_SLylgRaLcv0ZcVSF3XS-8Mw_yxvux95IsvoEPsXkNIJwL5ir8B1f5zx2x6IXtwKn10s3-ac4lyEMxFBWqnzvZXVORM7pzvj9KPqxhh4CFoOqbDYtPzVy9t183qMT5b1V2KBaI4f6-cUD_nx9XvcsbUtQVqY3k5xTgqdaJCGy5Dl9lQv6nlTlWEAkQLna1bTQxH9kfee3d3WbLX9-t9lsP315B8DBl5D4iSHFIpzMtFr7U6USrUYiNWLSXPeoNi0vq1ZK8MYM9r8rBFXBljpiNdpzERdflj3LCW66Z)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: FWD - Update on Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Medicare expansion, climate action, universal pre-K, and more.
#
Peter, we just wanted to make sure that you saw our note from yesterday. We have just ONE week to ensure that the Build Back Better Act passes, so that we can deliver for working people, families, and our communities. Here’s what’s at stake (and what Pramila has secured in the Build Back Better Act):
* Universal preschool for all 3-year-olds and 4-year-olds
* Affordable, high-quality childcare
* Paid family and medical leave
* Home and community-based care
* Historic climate action
* Health care, Medicare expansion, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs
* Affordable housing
* An extension of the monthly Child Tax Credit
* Humane immigration reform
* Higher education and workforce development
* And MORE!

**[We need your help right now to continue putting the pressure on Congress to pass the Build Back Better Act and deliver for the people. Can you chip in $3 to fuel Pramila’s fight for getting these transformative investments across the finish line?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8584?refcode=em20211109-789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=789%2E420207%2ERn8mQt)** **[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8584?refcode=em20211109-789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=789%2E420207%2ERn8mQt)** Check out our email below for more about where things stand at this pivotal moment. \- Team Jayapal
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jayapal HQ
Date: Mon, Nov 8, 2021
Subject: Update on Build Back Better
Peter, a lot happened on Friday — so we wanted to catch you up to speed.
**Here's the deal:** Late Friday, the House sent a historic $1.2 trillion infrastructure package to President Biden's desk to be signed into law AND also took a critical step towards passing the Build Back Better Act.
**What comes next:** Pramila fought for and successfully negotiated a vote on the Build Back Better Act the week of November 14th — essentially giving us _one week_ to build the pressure necessary to pass this transformational bill that invests in childcare, paid leave, pre-K, health care, climate action, housing, and so much more.
Progressives are focused on delivering for working people, families, and our communities. That means investing in our roads and bridges — **but it also means passing the Build Back Better Act.**[**If you're still with Pramila in this urgent fight, can you chip in $3 or more today to help us get these transformative investments in working people over the finish line? This really is a make-or-break week.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8584?refcode=em20211109-789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=789%2E420207%2ERn8mQt)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8584?refcode=em20211109-789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=789%2E420207%2ERn8mQt)**
Thanks as always for having Pramila’s back.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211109-789-footer&t=23&refcode2=789_420207_Rn8mQt&akid=789%2E420207%2ERn8mQt)**

clean_body: Medicare expansion, climate action, universal pre-K, and more. Peter, we just wanted to make sure that you saw our note from yesterday. We have just ONE week to ensure that the Build Back Better Act passes, so that we can deliver for working people, families, and our communities. Here’s what’s at stake (and what Pramila has secured in the Build Back Better Act): Universal preschool for all 3-year-olds and 4-year-olds Affordable, high-quality childcare Paid family and medical leave Home and community-based care Historic climate action Health care, Medicare expansion, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs Affordable housing An extension of the monthly Child Tax Credit Humane immigration reform Higher education and workforce development And MORE! Check out our email below for more about where things stand at this pivotal moment. \- Team Jayapal \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jayapal HQ Date: Mon, Nov 8, 2021 Subject: Update on Build Back Better Peter, a lot happened on Friday — so we wanted to catch you up to speed. Here's the deal: Late Friday, the House sent a historic $1.2 trillion infrastructure package to President Biden's desk to be signed into law AND also took a critical step towards passing the Build Back Better Act. What comes next: Pramila fought for and successfully negotiated a vote on the Build Back Better Act the week of November 14th — essentially giving us one week to build the pressure necessary to pass this transformational bill that invests in childcare, paid leave, pre-K, health care, climate action, housing, and so much more. Progressives are focused on delivering for working people, families, and our communities. That means investing in our roads and bridges — but it also means passing the Build Back Better Act. Thanks as always for having Pramila’s back. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Hunting, firearms, and Whitmer. Oh, my.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • PO Box 23 • Stevensville, MI 49127
body:
Whitmer's "safety" rhetoric is just a smokescreen for her real goal – to disarm Americans. That’s something we cannot tolerate. | | | |
---
| | | Peter:

This past weekend I took a brief break from the campaign trail to clear my head while enjoying the great outdoors with some friends on our annual hunting trip.
---
|
---
| Sitting in my blind got me thinking about _Governor Whitmer’s action last year that put over 6,000 Michigan residents in the firearms and ammunition industry out of work_. **She called them “non-essential” during the coronavirus pandemic and shut down their businesses.**

It was another of her shots (pun intended) at law-abiding gun owners.

She’s shown she’ll do whatever it takes to hurt us and deny us our rights.

Like so many of her decrees during 2020, **she used her powers to unconstitutionally violate the rights of our residents and put people out of work.** And she doubled-down on specifically targeting the firearms and ammunition business saying, “I would do it again. I absolutely stand by the decision that I made.”

Her attacks should come as no surprise though.

_Whitmer supports reinstating the failed 1994 “assault weapon” ban. _

Even the Justice Department in a 2004 report found that the ban’s effects on gun violence were “small at best and perhaps too small for reliable measurement.”

Criminals will get guns. Her naive, pie-in-the-sky belief that criminals will somehow obey her bans and restrictions is just ludicrous.

**In my 33-year career in law enforcement, I’ve actively worked to reduce violence in our cities. I can tell you there’s not a criminal I’ve arrested that hasn’t been violating numerous laws.** There is just no rational explanation for the Governor’s naiveté.

One of the rifles the 1994 law banned was the Colt AR-15. AR-15 style rifles are the most popular rifle in the country and they’re used by hundreds of thousands of hunters.

Yet Whitmer would like to ban these and other “scary” firearms.

Whitmer also supports other extreme measures like “red flag” laws that would deny due process to the accused. She talks the typical liberal line of “closing loopholes” which is code for restricting constitutional rights.

_Her safety rhetoric is just a smokescreen for her real goal – to disarm Americans_. That’s something we cannot tolerate.

**Let me be very clear: _I support our second amendment rights and will oppose any and every attempt to usurp those rights_.**

I’ve dealt with violent criminals my entire career. I’ve lost friends in the line of duty, and I understand the danger fellow officers face every day when they put on their uniform.

But banning “scary” guns is not the answer. It will only leave our citizens more vulnerable to the criminals who ignore the laws.

The media doesn’t talk about firearms that have been used defensively. That doesn’t fit the liberal narrative.

The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention has reported that nearly every major study on the issue has found that _defensive gun use by Americans happens between 500,000 and 3 million times per year_. Think about that. Americans defend themselves with firearms up to 3 million times in a year.

What happens when these firearms are banned and only criminals have guns?

That’s what Governor Whitmer and her radical allies want.

Is that what you want? To be defenseless in your home?

**It’s time to take a stand. It’s time to dump Whitmer.**

Join me. Make a contribution.
---

---
| Volunteer. Spread the word.

Dump Whitmer.

Sincerely, Michael Brown
_Republican for Governor_ PS I recently wrote an article that was published in _Woods and Water News_. clean_body: Whitmer's "safety" rhetoric is just a smokescreen for her real goal – to disarm Americans. That’s something we cannot tolerate. | | | | | | | Peter: This past weekend I took a brief break from the campaign trail to clear my head while enjoying the great outdoors with some friends on our annual hunting trip. | | Sitting in my blind got me thinking about Governor Whitmer’s action last year that put over 6,000 Michigan residents in the firearms and ammunition industry out of work. She called them “non-essential” during the coronavirus pandemic and shut down their businesses. It was another of her shots (pun intended) at law-abiding gun owners. She’s shown she’ll do whatever it takes to hurt us and deny us our rights. Like so many of her decrees during 2020, she used her powers to unconstitutionally violate the rights of our residents and put people out of work. And she doubled-down on specifically targeting the firearms and ammunition business saying, “I would do it again. I absolutely stand by the decision that I made.” Her attacks should come as no surprise though. Whitmer supports reinstating the failed 1994 “assault weapon” ban. Even the Justice Department in a 2004 report found that the ban’s effects on gun violence were “small at best and perhaps too small for reliable measurement.” Criminals will get guns. Her naive, pie-in-the-sky belief that criminals will somehow obey her bans and restrictions is just ludicrous. In my 33-year career in law enforcement, I’ve actively worked to reduce violence in our cities. I can tell you there’s not a criminal I’ve arrested that hasn’t been violating numerous laws. There is just no rational explanation for the Governor’s naiveté. One of the rifles the 1994 law banned was the Colt AR-15. AR-15 style rifles are the most popular rifle in the country and they’re used by hundreds of thousands of hunters. Yet Whitmer would like to ban these and other “scary” firearms. Whitmer also supports other extreme measures like “red flag” laws that would deny due process to the accused. She talks the typical liberal line of “closing loopholes” which is code for restricting constitutional rights. Her safety rhetoric is just a smokescreen for her real goal – to disarm Americans. That’s something we cannot tolerate. Let me be very clear: I support our second amendment rights and will oppose any and every attempt to usurp those rights. I’ve dealt with violent criminals my entire career. I’ve lost friends in the line of duty, and I understand the danger fellow officers face every day when they put on their uniform. But banning “scary” guns is not the answer. It will only leave our citizens more vulnerable to the criminals who ignore the laws. The media doesn’t talk about firearms that have been used defensively. That doesn’t fit the liberal narrative. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention has reported that nearly every major study on the issue has found that defensive gun use by Americans happens between 500,000 and 3 million times per year. Think about that. Americans defend themselves with firearms up to 3 million times in a year. What happens when these firearms are banned and only criminals have guns? That’s what Governor Whitmer and her radical allies want. Is that what you want? To be defenseless in your home? It’s time to take a stand. It’s time to dump Whitmer. Join me. Make a contribution. | "DONATE TODAY" | Volunteer. Spread the word. Dump Whitmer. Sincerely, Michael Brown Republican for Governor PS I recently wrote an article that was published in Woods and Water News. body:

| | Dear Friend, **We are one year away from our chance to save America from the radical left.** America is sick and tired of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's agenda of more spending, more inflation, and fewer freedoms for Americans. **But one year from now, America will elect new members of Congress. ** And I firmly believe voters from here in Florida, and all across the country, will stand up for our American values of family, faith, and freedom -- and take back the People’s house from the socialist left! ****
---
| [BRING BACK AMERICA FIRST](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=337932bca3&e=c2296cffff "BRING BACK AMERICA FIRST")

And we can’t count on phony Republicans to get that done. **We need a proven conservative leader who puts our principles before politics.** **That's why I'm asking for your help today. name: =?utf-8?Q?Townhall=20via=20Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: Make School About Education Again
body:
As a mother and a former schoolteacher. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again
Friend,

On Sunday, I published an article to Townhall titled “Make School About Education Again”. After the shockwave that was sent across the nation by the voters of Virginia, it is important we reflect and look back on how and why we won.

Many have rightly attributed much of this Republican success to the critical shift in national attention to education issues, for which Virginia has been ground zero in recent months.

As a single mother to a biracial daughter and a former schoolteacher, I’ve been on the frontlines in this fight.
And now, instead of traditional fights for better academics, today’s “mama and papa bears” are fighting multiple radical agendas that have been forced on our schools over the last few years. It’s time to change that.

Stand with ME by chipping in $20, $50, $100, or more if you are ready to kick Critical Race Theory to the curb. >> (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

CHIP IN $20 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

CHIP IN $50 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

CHIP IN $100 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

CHIP IN $250 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

STAND WITH ME (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

As parents, we don’t want to spend our time debating Critical Race Theory, arguing about mask or vaccine mandates and social experimentation, or worrying about whether our kids are safe inside of their schools. We want our children to learn reading, writing, science, math, and history.

We need to make school about education again.

Thank you,

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again
Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
VA-7 Congressional Candidate

STAND WITH ME (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/make-school-about-education-again?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211109_townhall_make-school-about-education-again)

READ THE FULL ARTICLE (https://townhall.com/columnists/tinaramirez/2021/11/06/make-school-about-education-again-n2598676)

============================================================

** Twitter (https://twitter.com/tinaramirezva?lang=en)

** Website (http://tinaramirez.com/)
Tina Ramirez for Congress |

name: Dave Godlewski
subject: A special day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
For those of you who don't know me (or it's been a while!), let me introduce myself, I'm Dave Godlewski — Sarah's dad. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473670/315629984/517372921?ms=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&refcode=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&source=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xkN4c0eqMSunEX4m%2B2cCwgedc08Z3EzAA9dZ41ll5f5OhtaYgmW%2BfAFzssNkU%2B6V0jqc3gIhsP7m6rzfkl2l1N5QKQzw8fKLN%2B2QInjVfG2iCTA37pa5JKBHuCd9TOr%2B3qOCV2aGRxdmKpmUoeMsO6nfOq4cbHK7wE2Wg%2FM0278%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRhMzcxNi1jNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iaqy4GLjg7OwuX0y1m2adF4J27Zt0gqrBTf-nBxStQY=&emci=cd8ab380-7f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a04a3716-c441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473671/315629985/517372921?ms=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&refcode=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&source=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xkN4c0eqMSunEX4m%2B2cCwgedc08Z3EzAA9dZ41ll5f5OhtaYgmW%2BfAFzssNkU%2B6V0jqc3gIhsP7m6rzfkl2l1N5QKQzw8fKLN%2B2QInjVfG2iCTA37pa5JKBHuCd9TOr%2B3qOCV2aGRxdmKpmUoeMsO6nfOq4cbHK7wE2Wg%2FM0278%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRhMzcxNi1jNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iaqy4GLjg7OwuX0y1m2adF4J27Zt0gqrBTf-nBxStQY=&emci=cd8ab380-7f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a04a3716-c441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)
---|---
Today is a great day because it's Sarah's birthday! I still remember the day Sarah was born, and as you know, time goes by quickly. I've watched Sarah, take on challenges starting from swimming a pool lap before she could walk, and jogging with me before 1st grade. Even her teachers quickly learned not to underestimate her when learning something new.

Sarah has always been my co-pilot growing up — from hauling wood to canoeing the Namekagon... to taking on a week of portaging in the boundary waters.

I've always been proud to be Sarah's dad and I want to make sure she knows this, especially on her birthday.

[**Will you join our family in celebrating Sarah by adding your name to the card we put together? It would mean so much to her.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473672/315629986/517372921?ms=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&refcode=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&source=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xkN4c0eqMSunEX4m%2B2cCwgedc08Z3EzAA9dZ41ll5f5OhtaYgmW%2BfAFzssNkU%2B6V0jqc3gIhsP7m6rzfkl2l1N5QKQzw8fKLN%2B2QInjVfG2iCTA37pa5JKBHuCd9TOr%2B3qOCV2aGRxdmKpmUoeMsO6nfOq4cbHK7wE2Wg%2FM0278%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRhMzcxNi1jNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iaqy4GLjg7OwuX0y1m2adF4J27Zt0gqrBTf-nBxStQY=&emci=cd8ab380-7f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a04a3716-c441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473673/315629987/517372921?ms=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&refcode=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&source=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xkN4c0eqMSunEX4m%2B2cCwgedc08Z3EzAA9dZ41ll5f5OhtaYgmW%2BfAFzssNkU%2B6V0jqc3gIhsP7m6rzfkl2l1N5QKQzw8fKLN%2B2QInjVfG2iCTA37pa5JKBHuCd9TOr%2B3qOCV2aGRxdmKpmUoeMsO6nfOq4cbHK7wE2Wg%2FM0278%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRhMzcxNi1jNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iaqy4GLjg7OwuX0y1m2adF4J27Zt0gqrBTf-nBxStQY=&emci=cd8ab380-7f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a04a3716-c441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)
Sarah has been hard at work traveling across Wisconsin and meeting with as many voters as possible. I want to make sure we can make this day extra special for her, so I helped her team put together a birthday card. Before we give it to her, we want to make sure her best supporters get a chance to sign it — that's you!

This campaign is about fighting for a better future for all of us. That’s why Sarah is committed to lowering the cost of prescription drugs, tackling the climate crisis, restoring voting rights, and so much more. She’s putting in the work to make sure we can flip this Senate seat from red to blue.

While Sarah is hard at work fighting for Wisconsin families, nothing would mean more to her than seeing your name on her birthday card.

[**Thanks for taking a minute to sign the card to wish Sarah a happy birthday!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473674/315629988/517372921?ms=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&refcode=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&source=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211109_dg_ecrd_gq_act___bday2_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xkN4c0eqMSunEX4m%2B2cCwgedc08Z3EzAA9dZ41ll5f5OhtaYgmW%2BfAFzssNkU%2B6V0jqc3gIhsP7m6rzfkl2l1N5QKQzw8fKLN%2B2QInjVfG2iCTA37pa5JKBHuCd9TOr%2B3qOCV2aGRxdmKpmUoeMsO6nfOq4cbHK7wE2Wg%2FM0278%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRhMzcxNi1jNDQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iaqy4GLjg7OwuX0y1m2adF4J27Zt0gqrBTf-nBxStQY=&emci=cd8ab380-7f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a04a3716-c441-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)
