clean_body: For those of you who don't know me (or it's been a while!), let me introduce myself, I'm Dave Godlewski — Sarah's dad. | | ---|--- Today is a great day because it's Sarah's birthday! I still remember the day Sarah was born, and as you know, time goes by quickly. I've watched Sarah, take on challenges starting from swimming a pool lap before she could walk, and jogging with me before 1st grade. Even her teachers quickly learned not to underestimate her when learning something new. Sarah has always been my co-pilot growing up — from hauling wood to canoeing the Namekagon... to taking on a week of portaging in the boundary waters. I've always been proud to be Sarah's dad and I want to make sure she knows this, especially on her birthday. Sarah has been hard at work traveling across Wisconsin and meeting with as many voters as possible. I want to make sure we can make this day extra special for her, so I helped her team put together a birthday card. Before we give it to her, we want to make sure her best supporters get a chance to sign it — that's you! This campaign is about fighting for a better future for all of us. That’s why Sarah is committed to lowering the cost of prescription drugs, tackling the climate crisis, restoring voting rights, and so much more. She’s putting in the work to make sure we can flip this Senate seat from red to blue. While Sarah is hard at work fighting for Wisconsin families, nothing would mean more to her than seeing your name on her birthday card. Dave Godlewski (Sarah's Dad) Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: Erica Smith
subject: “Staring into the abyss”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re fighting for every single vote — that’s how we win.
#
Have you seen this headline?
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25684?refcode=em20211109-621&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)
I’m a proud rural, dirt road Democrat running for U.S. Senate, and one thing our campaign is NOT doing after Virginia’s election is “staring into the abyss.”
**We can’t agonize. We must organize and leave no one behind.** There is no county, town, or neighborhood “too red” for our movement, and that’s why our campaign is knocking on doors in rural communities right now.
**We’re fighting for every single vote — that’s how we win. But I’m counting on your support to help us do it.**
[**Can you chip in $5 or anything you can to help fuel our rural organizing efforts, build the grassroots coalition we need to win this wide-open U.S. Senate seat, and prevent another election outcome like Virginia’s?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25684?refcode=em20211109-621&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25684?refcode=em20211109-621&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)**
I was born on a dirt road in a rural community in Eastern North Carolina. Growing up on the family farm was difficult, but so was growing up Black in the South. Like many families in our town, we had no A/C, and we lacked sufficient internet access.
My experience is exactly why I ran to represent rural communities like mine in the state senate, **and it’s why I won three times**.
Now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to deliver progressive change to all working families across North Carolina — because whether you live in a small town or a big city we’re all caught in the same rigged economy, in the same broken healthcare system, and facing the same climate crisis.
**The change we’re fighting for is possible.** But change starts with building relationships with North Carolinians who have been unheard, left behind, and counted out — and doing it early. To do that, we need enough resources right now.
[**If you’re with me, will you please consider donating to our campaign? By donating, you’ll help us fund our organizing program, spread our message across the Tar Heel state, and flip North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat blue.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25684?refcode=em20211109-621&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)
Together,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25684?refcode=em20211109-621&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211109-621-footer&t=24&refcode2=621_3698_tdtgqs&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=621%2E3698%2Etdtgqs)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentucky New Deal: A new deal for all of us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Did you hear the big news, Peter?

Over the weekend, our campaign announced a bold vision for a Kentucky New
Deal.

I’m running for U.S. Senate because I love Kentucky. I love the people of
our Commonwealth. And I believe that after decades of bad leadership,
poverty, and struggle, enough is enough.

I’m gonna share more about why we’re launching the Kentucky New Deal and
the history behind it — but before I do, can I ask you a favor?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12823?refcode=em20211109-1212&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1212%2E346206%2ExNbDsp ]My team and I want to be able to travel all across our Commonwealth to
talk about the Kentucky New Deal with Kentuckians — and meet them where
they’re at, from the hood to the holler. I’d be honored,
Peter, if you can chip in $5 or
anything you can afford so we can fund our travels and make these meetings
a reality. Can you chip in?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12823?refcode=em20211109-1212&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1212%2E346206%2ExNbDsp ]Contribute $5

Years ago, Americans were promised a New Deal. We were promised a future
without poverty, a future where every Kentuckian would have pathways to
prosperity and plenty.

We worked the mines to power the cities. We forged the steel to build the
bridges. We harvested the crops that fed our nation’s children.

In exchange, the deal was that we would be treated fairly. We would be
able to live full and gainful lives, we could feed our families, and we’d
have a fair path to prosperity.

But over the years, the promises of the New Deal have been gutted by
politicians like Rand Paul. And the deal we have left is rotten. It’s a
deal that exploits and harms Kentuckians who are already struggling,
unable to get ahead.

A deal where corrupt politicians and corporations get richer, but the rest
of us are forgotten. While Kentuckians suffer, they profited off their
stocks, blocked pandemic relief, chased conspiracies, weaponized hate, and
division. All for their own gain.

Kentucky deserves a new deal, on our terms — a bold new vision led by us
and for us about the things that matter most to us. We can end the cycle,
end the hate and division, end poverty as we know it with a new deal by
us, for us.

The Kentucky New Deal will be the biggest investment in the history of our
Commonwealth. But this isn’t about a handout. It’s about justice and
claiming what is ours — claiming what we deserve.

The Kentucky New Deal will center the people of Kentucky to build lasting
infrastructure, break down barriers to democracy, end generational
poverty, build new statewide coalitions, and so much more.

This Deal will finally address the deep, lasting challenges that have
crippled our Commonwealth, and meet people where they’re at.

The Kentucky New Deal is a way for us to show the nation that enough is
enough, and everyday people have had it with the lies, corruption, and
suffering.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12823?refcode=em20211109-1212&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1212%2E346206%2ExNbDsp ]Peter, I’m fired up and
ready to share this vision with Kentuckians everywhere, from the hood to
the holler. But I need your support to do this. If — and only if — you are
able, please chip in $5 to our campaign.

More soon,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211109-1212-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1212_346206_xNbDsp&akid=1212%2E346206%2ExNbDsp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1212%2E346206%2ExNbDsp

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473839/315632187/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTg1NDc2Yi1jNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrqwZhSeOKtzBELZQi5mItlHahrRHSo8zxnmo4J2xW0=&emci=1d85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)

| | Peter,

As a pediatrician, my top priority is always the health and safety of my patients, their families, and our whole community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473840/315632188/693098641?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTg1NDc2Yi1jNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrqwZhSeOKtzBELZQi5mItlHahrRHSo8zxnmo4J2xW0=&emci=1d85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102) As a health care provider, it is incredibly frustrating to watch the GOP politicize this pandemic, spread misinformation, and ultimately hinder public health experts’ ability to lead us out of this pandemic.

Hundreds of thousands of people have died, and yet the GOP continues to put our loved ones at risk rather than promote the vaccine and encourage our neighbors to mask up so we can end this crisis.

**[I need 1,000 supporters to add their names and send Republicans a message loud and clear: it’s time to stop spreading COVID misinformation >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473841/315632189/693098641?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTg1NDc2Yi1jNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrqwZhSeOKtzBELZQi5mItlHahrRHSo8zxnmo4J2xW0=&emci=1d85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38473842/315632190/693098641?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTg1NDc2Yi1jNjQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrqwZhSeOKtzBELZQi5mItlHahrRHSo8zxnmo4J2xW0=&emci=1d85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1e85476b-c641-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)****

Thank you,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

name: BARACK OBAMA ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: BEGGING you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | We're just one year away from Election Day.

And at this pivotal moment for our Democratic House Majority, President Obama has called grassroots Democrats everywhere to action:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwk4kxQ_)

President Obama is absolutely right.

**[If we're going to protect our House Democrats, we'll need every last grassroots supporter to join the fight before it's too late. That's why we're calling on 500 of our very best supporters --_including YOU_ \-- to help protect our House Majority and defeat House Republicans. Can you rush $3, $10, or even $25 to let us know that you stand with House Democrats nationwide?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr~6~)**
| [](https://links.e.dccc.)[MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)

---

We can't afford to let up now.

Because the last time Republicans held power...

_...They started the**LONGEST** government shutdown in American history,

...They tried to **REPEAL** the Affordable Care Act,

...And they **INCITED** a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol._

**But without the support of every last grassroots Democrat, we don 't stand a chance against Trump's House Republicans and their mega donors. **

****[That's why we MUST answer President Obama's call to action at this critical moment. Can we count on you to chip in $3 to elect House Democrats and hand Trump's House Republicans a STUNNING rebuke?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)****
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45913585&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTA3MjA3MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45913585&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTA3MjA3MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: Mike Franken
subject: Chuck Grassley isn’t a patriot. He’s a hypocrite.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zK3BDBbh3OafPXENdElBNmgZUpUTgcgGs_jmT09XaffczeyJZMtR8mVmI2-HX91e85xzrKN_y9DzrItenLt8xpl2LkfI_lRDMrwGXVbwsiJ98s4NsRVveGJqjiYEWWS95yKfvgAMO16LpQtPBBMUPCWxcfuP5CYcsal6MdmtgCDs/3gv/SDoKH4FJREe9K-Vc8V4bqw/h0/A4kPZylsG5SuaQ_j18M0F7fiVb--LuCacisqfrNopnk)
---
Hello,
I’m running against Chuck Grassley for Senate here in Iowa because when it comes to Donald Trump and democracy, we vehemently disagree.
I served our nation across the globe as a member of the US Navy, under every President since Carter. **But Trump’s election soured me. It was time to do something else, move on, make a difference in other ways.**
One learns how to read people as a military leader. It was clear that Donald Trump was going to be hurtful to the office of the presidency. **Trump and his inner circle were more nefarious than thoughtful for America. It was time to retire.**
When Donald Trump came to Iowa for a rally last month, Chuck Grassley got on stage and gave him a big bear hug within sight of Iowa’s golden dome capitol.
Days after the January 6th insurrection, Chuck Grassley said Trump “must take responsibility” for the attack that he provoked on our democracy.
**But now that he’s up for re-election, Chuck Grassley is suddenly singing a different tune.** Asked by a reporter if Trump had any responsibility for the insurrection, Grassley said, “We'll just have to wait and see...” _Is he the last to know?_
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHJ-Q-wrtefo-_RJSkLd8bNliZv5k1i6TiFCr4QAfyVqv6Ljzi8bQX87KFfTP-EJKOmRsAJ_ABIUX2t_L7-wkl0JYc7yaBTAwbNdXq1_8pz2-dH9N8vT32bf2odTSDTGRTSV3TKMQjHb_zRV_8iNnfMzWt9o1T8W2etePPvpjJZeCB3cMTyi-Q61usA8A92poiG8cNGq6_gYZ3M4TetaVLk-zGfmMUTBlLZtoFyf5hujw3AMH-nGgRfobitQDbUof7NctddPFc9S6mbSNudhNw6y6ezdUPl564zJasa8JsJxMul7cLNjCnsW3IsatTjNX1wYEN-Y8hpVKgYzbNnhHuK_EjEPH8WH8264OA4YY-9nS/3gv/SDoKH4FJREe9K-Vc8V4bqw/h1/7qJM4jiqYaXs5RR0DDRoXhoMbFWvi1HpGkcwyvaHI4Y)
Politicians of convenience like Chuck Grassley, who stand by as Donald Trump tells his Big Lie and undermines our democracy, aren’t patriots. They’re hypocrites.**They are nothing short of an affront on democracy.**
**I’m running for Senate to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority because Grassley is done. He is not the person to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street special interests.**
Mitch McConnell and his billionaire-funded Super PACs will spend millions trying to stop me because they know control of the Senate is at stake in my race. But with your help now, I can fight back, turn Iowa blue, and _expand_ our Senate majority.
[**Please, will you join my campaign today with a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHJ-Q-wrtefo-_RJSkLd8bNliZv5k1i6TiFCr4QAfyVqv6Ljzi8bQX87KFfTP-EJKOs2HySJlsZej9LJwoVv2P0A1E6Rk-9kupJ1tEpoTOOPEdsIuHOH3bKmhHqU496hGRBD3T4EnR7ja7tfwNnwTvZvvBl7IebuElXa6VjiBw3PHiqapCcxJ8dsvs4dBNvyJF1aP60z-H5fnhtE6B5ogIW3J9idTVcabObX30oxBX6TXPC2fwwkUZBt5RLuy2R3lKuATw7G4VlpwUktzKJJ_5maLctRK0GFmcpY-MFN2qQbWBQIwbF1m8isuqGhyKIPACvtYbsAVqEwlLUhghZm2xDv1iYyJNmF9p-lGL3KxBKbt/3gv/SDoKH4FJREe9K-Vc8V4bqw/h2/35aAG--4iTjPJPV7ir0MXO1NUTQZdyZXLHxkGVrao1A)
Any amount you can chip in to help me end Grassley’s 46-year career in Washington would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you,
Michael Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiKMa3u1TOqJlxSXRM-AJMU6oJO6fyrjmTO85km-GCkejjGszy2ph_vFAxc2WM2DHBZ7LSvN-yBxRwjZTxtuuxYv45XLph02a5aF46QxrORvBJs57fBIWh_7F4Mx7kdd4S4SUaK_gfVmLM4Q4WFSZjfk5657a4Wc-p4HVXqzvXYYEHyW7cVrQ5is1JmSRraDYV7avx9fk60t6fjFNTJ3yZ68XRdbCqu3FCXwuWGlsTBEM7jPgLeV-exA7-Eyh_ZL2gg/3gv/SDoKH4FJREe9K-Vc8V4bqw/h3/6t0stcjMGGvO7ZHOUxuV0jCB2bkRs5SLaLAeMtQr3UI) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPho3lNIr9nc2j_5V20nEmGL0R9NPb5zMsvFFcTG76IEjcbfBQtxtfh-l9uosEUjO09ZOjky-I-m9IK8C9lYVaQrx8EBPkrnOYay5Nc7y77g10fxthBKZG5dHb1lc-FflzZSbf_dHPTPuOXqx1n6tObDA6Hz854_wccTcMVBvzT0lUT9L932yycDGMcEiqtvknErXvjPFDOF_gk9ZK2k1ELizJ6VGFi6NzOgxW4f9rnTqc4qlGfQfmm_J_nJn4y1tBxnXxyTHlkY8i-0axOmxgEes/3gv/SDoKH4FJREe9K-Vc8V4bqw/h4/WiVGICI1TZeIcjKxAMaqk1QNdy7fFkei4-ZqDqo86aM) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7ShGmM77BCu1Cd5fercK8DKBRVhKuwb_oDomc_owsgr4Jc6u_FEIXxOb9BrnkPcUpecyGSYr5upZrMxrgt_oNzcmBRiZv_PJDeuSFP0EblbPUcBaOZX50uE6CpaJJSLqby-qyHlSJw0Ioh_If0vTmEAYEbUp-AMi-qEEe4TT_QEnsCGY6b6m6eTvy8fLFbtDarbAGMhJbnCzkLhemug8EzKGI20WZWjnC_jKhU9lrJULXjEsgQFM9xcPoTYFSaAoYk/3gv/SDoKH4FJREe9K-Vc8V4bqw/h5/e4-WhC5Lm8jpfSHHsc4fn1qeU6iWNXRLcBqCHfIG0H4)

clean_body: | | | | Hello, I’m running against Chuck Grassley for Senate here in Iowa because when it comes to Donald Trump and democracy, we vehemently disagree. I served our nation across the globe as a member of the US Navy, under every President since Carter. But Trump’s election soured me. It was time to do something else, move on, make a difference in other ways. One learns how to read people as a military leader. It was clear that Donald Trump was going to be hurtful to the office of the presidency. Trump and his inner circle were more nefarious than thoughtful for America. It was time to retire. When Donald Trump came to Iowa for a rally last month, Chuck Grassley got on stage and gave him a big bear hug within sight of Iowa’s golden dome capitol. Days after the January 6th insurrection, Chuck Grassley said Trump “must take responsibility” for the attack that he provoked on our democracy. But now that he’s up for re-election, Chuck Grassley is suddenly singing a different tune. Asked by a reporter if Trump had any responsibility for the insurrection, Grassley said, “We'll just have to wait and see...” Is he the last to know? Politicians of convenience like Chuck Grassley, who stand by as Donald Trump tells his Big Lie and undermines our democracy, aren’t patriots. They’re hypocrites.They are nothing short of an affront on democracy. I’m running for Senate to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority because Grassley is done. He is not the person to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street special interests. Mitch McConnell and his billionaire-funded Super PACs will spend millions trying to stop me because they know control of the Senate is at stake in my race. But with your help now, I can fight back, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Senate majority. Any amount you can chip in to help me end Grassley’s 46-year career in Washington would be greatly appreciated. Thank you, Michael Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. Franken for Iowa PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. The people of Louisiana are some of the strongest folks in the country and when we use that strength as one the possibilities are endless.

| How I Feel About Vaccine Mandates for School Children
---
| "I'm a strong supporter of parental choice. I believe you have a right to know what's going on in your child's school, the curriculum that's being used, and I believe that no one knows better about your child than you - the parent. I have never questioned the efficacy of the vaccine. I'm not anti-vaccine. I'm against the government putting their foot on my throat and telling me to like it. If you want to take the vaccine, take the vaccine. If you don't want to take the vaccine, don't take the vaccine. You should not be forced - and this should be especially true for perfectly healthy children who are not dying of COVID at the same rate as people 65 and older with compromised immune systems. That's a legitimate conversation we should be having."
\-- Kathy Barnette

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | November 9, 2021 | Issue 3 | | | | | | | ---|--- | == == == | | | == | | | | | How I Feel About Vaccine Mandates for School Children | "I'm a strong supporter of parental choice. I believe you have a right to know what's going on in your child's school, the curriculum that's being used, and I believe that no one knows better about your child than you - the parent. I have never questioned the efficacy of the vaccine. I'm not anti-vaccine. I'm against the government putting their foot on my throat and telling me to like it. If you want to take the vaccine, take the vaccine. If you don't want to take the vaccine, don't take the vaccine. You should not be forced - and this should be especially true for perfectly healthy children who are not dying of COVID at the same rate as people 65 and older with compromised immune systems. That's a legitimate conversation we should be having." \-- Kathy Barnette | | | | My reaction to Gov. Youngkin's win in Virginia!!! name: Jack Ballard
subject: We need better access to education
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
One of the greatest honors of my life has been working as a full-time lecturer at the University of Montana at Billings, which also happens to be wher | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=288ab0e061f24301867c110d7a9f807f&_e=Ph-y8BjFgdbDR7-3QUaVYcuCOejfLomG0IjbQHHmEHY9WDVRocvZ9M1AUH0WWS4mwInG8oyZUnTN-QM3XPSA45u0so5DtAzJJU3IfD1HjuiIA00ms85m1kHSReOFvuDD-TvmPnt0trqzpYdh168QrXGbjEAN3yLIqSJY9TK4__Q_-FV3eSrNmAgJ3BKYfdUj57-y5w7GwoEXmX8cHE-jUOuMq6MNzV0sA4ZrQk1FNf-PEPAFn5nPZITwgx7USFEZS-1u9_ayPfOe6lSblylUNhN879o7DCKd92g48bv4WPeo2cqF3drmSVti2Z0cZgX36y1sF97rDrauUUbqV6ksuV0W3qn0UKcV4p4nPjNQpYAyHO61crQ-sV5gHHlTB6gfq4QiaKmiAbV5j8Y0dBAUdX-Dq5tOOyzCAQC9MCrE1xVvEgRIvqKLLzakv6tDQUE88_ErK85ce__gFoXzu9IFfoY4tl8saVJc-y0BpYRkkKM%3D) One of the greatest honors of my life has been working as a full-time lecturer at the University of Montana at Billings, which also happens to be where I got my Masters in Education. So it’s no secret that education is a top priority to me. I’ve only been able to achieve as much as I have because of the educational opportunities that were afforded to me. I want to go to Washington to support rural education at the federal level. It’s the least we can do for our hardworking families. **[If you agree with me, then please chip in $10 or $20 to my campaign today.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=288ab0e061f24301867c110d7a9f807f&_e=Ph-y8BjFgdbDR7-3QUaVYcuCOejfLomG0IjbQHHmEHY9WDVRocvZ9M1AUH0WWS4mwInG8oyZUnTN-QM3XPSA45u0so5DtAzJJU3IfD1HjuiIA00ms85m1kHSReOFvuDD-TvmPnt0trqzpYdh168QrXGbjEAN3yLIqSJY9TK4__Q_-FV3eSrNmAgJ3BKYfdUj57-y5w7GwoEXmX8cHE-jUOuMq6MNzV0sA4ZrQk1FNf-PEPAFn5nPZITwgx7USFEZS-1u9_ayPfOe6lSblylUNhEhTxA9v-iBtWfFmh5xR7nIT79Jgi5WBGlGc4KwnKeb9kTcE5d9jDOm372Rs6g7546jmKecMGmJf4n4wsfdSjr-J5Sq7puccEmmk_FAvpGqEpV7ZIPFzGb4XUcKb_cWpBVPyhtPLp2oFv7zzpoqrlXECVfjDtGCQrVGpRD3ZdOuXHaUn7XFQm4ntFhid2yC9aqe0uXaYlqQ-5gWff7LCTw%3D)** Our future is completely reliant on the quality, accessibility, and affordability of education. Many of our rural communities face significant obstacles in obtaining quality education for their children. I’m running for Congress to solve that problem and ensure that everyone across our state has a fair shot. **[So please consider a donation of any amount to my campaign and let’s get this done together.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=288ab0e061f24301867c110d7a9f807f&_e=Ph-y8BjFgdbDR7-3QUaVYcuCOejfLomG0IjbQHHmEHY9WDVRocvZ9M1AUH0WWS4mwInG8oyZUnTN-QM3XPSA45u0so5DtAzJJU3IfD1HjuiIA00ms85m1kHSReOFvuDD-TvmPnt0trqzpYdh168QrXGbjEAN3yLIqSJY9TK4__Q_-FV3eSrNmAgJ3BKYfdUj57-y5w7GwoEXmX8cHE-jUOuMq6MNzV0sA4ZrQk1FNf-PEPAFn5nPZITwgx7USFEZS-1u9_ayPfOe6lSblylUNtPNaa5Ut63_AGbf61OO3CeTgKYN8ik_pjWzvbopWnytm1Mgz8BCI4j-_8hYRmmfS5BNcfDAFqm3j6pfOP56HsEzRcubYB1hL6VcAyi5alw2dmrZk3i6cPRrn1CvdDvNQi6vOiKZaOPJ2oy3hpsF4OiUFS75R48pxg1u5ikTDVWK5f02ByR4se1ec7H-ht2gcYyBqZcedAEfivqcZOAz0l8%3D)** Thank you. _\-- Jack_ Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-01 in Washington D.C. **[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=288ab0e061f24301867c110d7a9f807f&_e=Ph-y8BjFgdbDR7-3QUaVYcuCOejfLomG0IjbQHHmEHY9WDVRocvZ9M1AUH0WWS4mLYP9__9WyuZ5zyC_tStVAdNOOyuXsuu_-P8kmYzJrQHn4HCrWHCVbN95Hgf9i3Y6Q1JRPmtcxepCmM6Uc38wxKeBlRffoRYTGahi7D7uIn6GCr1VfE26ICQMOsIhF55qN6NSEUa-xm8MEXPSC4YRSxfWhnBlYnEeoi7aTuYQ852oGaTTqdMV-vazMCaPIk3yTolIY5aQYj_KBJYTxDCA8FfTrAQRe0kS8p_eU5hJcbopRY36N9IUKTzSY3x3I7RkT29zsnX9V65ENuLn21urJnFtjwjaFgdRrYDoMd0FtyzDbErFZ7SUQT4oz4bu86LyiAXY3obD7jiXCwRWqbRUickYGNTd1sdyGKh4d97MlQzJ4wjyBiq8cWDsLdSKF8GjXEneFqIbFlx6nFbVjKp5-KqObPEofhM0Qq_EN1MSfAVPoIBaFwNhJ-wtwPoIzYrR)**** ** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, I hope you’re doing well since the last time I checked in.
|
---
| | |
Friend, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.

First of all, I just want to thank you for your dedication to the conservative cause. It is because of grassroots patriots like you that Republicans are able to fight for conservative values. You understand what's at stake and you don't shy away from taking a stand when it's needed. That's why I wanted to come to you first with this offer.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

body:

Peter,

Election Day is exactly one year away - November 8, 2022.

My name is Alex Stovall and **I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. **I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why ...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

The Left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b51c2211b799409786a1959488055f10&_e=q8wFrBFffxw2MsHVi3KHMmMXzEkHgttsidMFz7Ht7F7KGQj5uPwPMo3UAbV_uOvh1AwV7YFYo2JCLja8haFWyhtATAVSZJ_3QPwbSu43JbEpDmp1F3GJBOY9pZVI0arCL1j8YA7w3XJCHZlXCLgaqulbkLEQRKyuFa-zlDS1iCvgOd8Ff8GIUTndkJl6VJIpyOe72QSMqxgKywUlp2jUODpaqN7miI7LHX3CKIDowL2DUuRRI3GsI64Ar2JD8Jhpn48vqzsTXPq8T1u9jsSW58LlSBDqxoUHO8sni_gR93y5bSwBxRfru65nYDgQl2GgVkqjocuWlkmS3L5DpV6sLvNxnpvfDhlfuFt_KK4c4TxDoVubAtSi_pWF1NyYSRG0)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b51c2211b799409786a1959488055f10&_e=q8wFrBFffxw2MsHVi3KHMmMXzEkHgttsidMFz7Ht7F7KGQj5uPwPMo3UAbV_uOvh1AwV7YFYo2JCLja8haFWyhtATAVSZJ_3QPwbSu43JbEpDmp1F3GJBOY9pZVI0arCL1j8YA7w3XJCHZlXCLgaqulbkLEQRKyuFa-zlDS1iCupKpYKEYGZnR8pOyuDMeFZKqwX07b1mOppa0790SdWtY_fxjhZNIYf2VCLP4_uI8OFWpawCAGHm3kvoPzizvJ5rg3L68qyXxt2Nuh8Zd3l3pWqEXgDQSXS8LbavlrWTMM1nTsw4gPrNpPB57M3Oju2pDBT1dUEH3zRwJcxN4DcSmSSfMZTAO6FIuJiL4VDdAdb4OF6TEpdZ34SqS1oZgH9)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b51c2211b799409786a1959488055f10&_e=q8wFrBFffxw2MsHVi3KHMmMXzEkHgttsidMFz7Ht7F7KGQj5uPwPMo3UAbV_uOvh1AwV7YFYo2JCLja8haFWyhtATAVSZJ_3QPwbSu43JbEpDmp1F3GJBOY9pZVI0arCL1j8YA7w3XJCHZlXCLgaqulbkLEQRKyuFa-zlDS1iCtmYj8f4bew-QLkmJyvNj3YXwvk0qyeTfEKZPlWy9ifKiWbaTFJ1HHsaXJ8q8fDzvU-boqcMm4i-ss5s-RGIAcZGDo1wGMObZNBHk5qrxlluUH0rCP_HzvGo0ruFrTp-Awtfkeuc1GolmFYCOsS2zEycpAqEcNyatjFkuClfVqhKz5ezuv-tAerlV2V8X5AzYcyXVNl5BF5u26rIGBW-LWa)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b51c2211b799409786a1959488055f10&_e=q8wFrBFffxw2MsHVi3KHMmMXzEkHgttsidMFz7Ht7F7KGQj5uPwPMo3UAbV_uOvh1AwV7YFYo2JCLja8haFWyhtATAVSZJ_3QPwbSu43JbEpDmp1F3GJBOY9pZVI0arCL1j8YA7w3XJCHZlXCLgaqulbkLEQRKyuFa-zlDS1iCtI4dF2zBRm3J7a1rhQopXXUtdmhOqt6yfUBmtAzsj84xFEcLZU6AE5fVTtbDm1NpI3nUHugE4b4qZBFDHM5PM8rr9bm5Af1azlATmMVOrD0UA4iJK-aM0dF9zzPHDLnTgsgcdzmM_Vej8eJZDVI_BDEwPcal6aU7nzK0pZCvy6g_kRTRTxPkhebcuGMvQnEn0mDFPoRCKD7Y1g1YT_EEy8)

For maximum impact, your donation will be split between Sen. Hassan's campaign and the DSCC. |
Team, this news changes everything -- and we need to seize the moment before it passes!
**We were seriously worried:** Early polls had shown Republican Gov. Chris Sununu narrowly ahead of Sen. Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire -- and if he’d flipped this seat, he could have handed control of the Senate back to Mitch McConnell.
But Sununu saw the strength of our grassroots team and REJECTED McConnell’s calls to run for Senate. **Now, Hassan’s strongest challenger is OUT of contention -- but this isn’t over yet, team.**
**After being embarrassed on the national stage, McConnell will work TWICE as hard to defeat Hassan and flip the Senate red -- and Trump's megadonors are ready to spend MILLIONS to help him. We need to show Trump and McConnell that we’re fighting back immediately -- or we could lose _everything_.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: One newspaper headline we never want to see
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We're hitting the pavement hard now to make sure our nightmare scenario never materializes. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Election Day is exactly one year away - November 8, 2022.

If you've been reading our emails over the past few weeks, then we're hopeful the reasons we got into the Senate race are becoming clear: **I have lived the American Dream and want to preserve it for you and your family.**

With the Senate majority at stake, every single vote is going to count. Reaching every friendly voter - and those who we'll have to work a little extra hard to win over - is going to be a monumental task, but we are confident we can get the job done to win this race.

Make no mistake, this is a call to action TODAY - not tomorrow or next Wednesday. We need you to stand with us on this important anniversary so that one year from now we don't see this disastrous headline anywhere:

All that we’ve worked so hard to accomplish will be on the ballot next November.
Together, we became the second state in the nation to pass a public health insurance option. Families are also on a roaring rebound from the economic impacts of the pandemic — _so much so that Nevada ranked #2 for job growth this past year!_
**And this is just the tip of the iceberg of what we can accomplish in our state.**
Although the progress we continue to make carries enormous weight, it cannot stand alone in the fight as my opponents continue to attack me and collect huge checks from Republican bosses. **_This is exactly why I need your support._**

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, It may seem hard to believe but, we’re officially less than one year away from Election Day. Every dollar we raise, every Nevadan we talk to, and every voter we bring into our movement will help us achieve our ultimate goal of winning this race. Before I go any further, I’m reaching out for your help with the first part that I mentioned. | | | All that we’ve worked so hard to accomplish will be on the ballot next November. Together, we became the second state in the nation to pass a public health insurance option. Families are also on a roaring rebound from the economic impacts of the pandemic — so much so that Nevada ranked #2 for job growth this past year! And this is just the tip of the iceberg of what we can accomplish in our state. Although the progress we continue to make carries enormous weight, it cannot stand alone in the fight as my opponents continue to attack me and collect huge checks from Republican bosses. This is exactly why I need your support. | | | | | | | | | | | | This race will be close but we can get ahead of it if we take action every day from here on out. Thanks for your support, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. We wanted to give you a chance to show us what matters the most to you.

name: Team WISGOP
subject: Veterans Day Candidate Training
body:
Join Derrick Van Orden this Thursday morning!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day_vt_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- We wanted to make sure you saw our upcoming **Virtual Veterans Day candidate training** with 3rd Congressional District Candidate and retired Navy SEAL Senior Chief, Derrick Van Orden. We will cover how to set up your campaign, work with local stakeholders, how to effectively message and so much more! Whether you're considering or committed to running for local office, or perhaps you're helping someone else run, we hope you'll join us from the comfort of your own home, and learn what it takes to run! **Zoom-In:** Thursday, November 11th, 9am - 10:30am
##### _*When you RSVP, you'll receive the zoom link and course materials._
| [](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_11_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day_vt_3&n=2 "RSVP HERE") [RSVP HERE](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_11_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day_vt_3&n=2)

|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States

body:
It's definitely not being taught in schools. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=39783d394cee4a6fa36eb184d8a9c767&_e=NsTUQGZ9wkBs-aNyozzDEF__f_NuHwC7z00nw_1ZKX7oX59q6gBoaAg8qj9LTsd8WlyJGScs5ZFd_9CxeS0fRb02fsp55lETv3ubcCwCaaEg6G8WV3e9sUnJ3Y0bjvsfi-rsrlqLqnuVXr8x3YgdhxEV4ohGd1p7c_XQh-rQLTpd3eF9PDxwh71DfFMZWx4wcSzf2UeBB0XTj-pLQgioL8ygGRR8maRFYM7s9z5uHK_rb7srVKfDg0ksKJd9P0KVjWxA77MxWGJggRKPmjI1W9DfIPucXyPkiCcsT8EiOA6N8PS2bwaWgsyOvtk8CWFeBjaXPA4MOp6v2V7EVNhZy8a5i2szvduDZiVM3K3odNPZLDSQgPQ_OgZ39iiOPDcAmmGYIwN75pMkgIEmZm0KubpjQs1si5B2XD58nYrhDN4COimdjZqhBhTimu19DWiB)

Peter,

The Left lost their minds last Tuesday. After months of gaslighting Virginians about what is going on in their schools and telling them that they shouldn't have any input into what their children are learning, **they lost the Virginia governors race.**

CNN and MSNBC can't stop; they keep saying a Republican only won in Virginia because the voters are racist.

Glenn Youngkin won because of Democrats' insane rhetoric. Parents don't want that radical race ideology in their schools. [**They made that clear in Virginia, and we'll make it clear in Arizona in 2022.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=39783d394cee4a6fa36eb184d8a9c767&_e=NsTUQGZ9wkBs-aNyozzDEF__f_NuHwC7z00nw_1ZKX7oX59q6gBoaAg8qj9LTsd8WlyJGScs5ZFd_9CxeS0fRb02fsp55lETv3ubcCwCaaEg6G8WV3e9sUnJ3Y0bjvsfi-rsrlqLqnuVXr8x3YgdhxEV4ohGd1p7c_XQh-rQLTpd3eF9PDxwh71DfFMZWx4wcSzf2UeBB0XTj-pLQgioL8ygGRR8maRFYM7s9z5uHK-Aoa1BMSyloReWBVWhVu-yTxFnAYl-bn-FJHm4jCaHCl7Di6rxmly8uw7sA-gLRyIXXqOU2zlhjctKVjHbHP7nQ8HblQMdmbOoZhkB1wcTEKZz5bSoaN3L63SuqB5hDenh7bCy76gyZFwYWLIJpZN65qFiFXxH7fBbE_IbbddbvyRedTTqlunpone3b0nkUAtdKDbcwUK6jeFW0FM3Vz-j)

**Peter - you should have anxiety about what schools are teaching kids.** We know that their curriculum is full of lesson plans teaching kids that some races or genders are morally superior to others. _Parents saw it firsthand in 2020 when their kids were locked out of their classrooms and forced to do Zoom school._

With you by our side Peter - [**we're going to take back our country. We're going to stop woke teachers and schools from turning our kids into losers.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=39783d394cee4a6fa36eb184d8a9c767&_e=NsTUQGZ9wkBs-aNyozzDEF__f_NuHwC7z00nw_1ZKX7oX59q6gBoaAg8qj9LTsd8WlyJGScs5ZFd_9CxeS0fRb02fsp55lETv3ubcCwCaaEg6G8WV3e9sUnJ3Y0bjvsfi-rsrlqLqnuVXr8x3YgdhxEV4ohGd1p7c_XQh-rQLTpd3eF9PDxwh71DfFMZWx4wcSzf2UeBB0XTj-pLQgioL8ygGRR8maRFYM7s9z5uHK_YNzaZjSLQl6rGai6k7kU7-WIubj1Yh5chzko8Wmd2cxxzoJ2aGWBkHjZ94pFaziQ-Dziefyc3pXK6BuUcURofuxOq2DTHIX0s6AdKeOtK82OYc50Wz5le_qfb01h2ST3tA11z2yNMPgXCipkhZPKUFRGdv6rOhzfH32REIvZEUpmiSQUgnkCRG89gPpp7qFzxcB8h2sw_hVhaF_xQkSF3)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Teacher strike in Scranton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m proud to stand in *full* solidarity with the Scranton Federation of Teachers.
#
Derek,
As you read this, hundreds of teachers are on strike in Scranton, PA for fair pay + affordable health care.
[**_If you’re able to, will you pitch in $5 or more to the American Federation of Teachers’ Strike Solidarity Fund? Every dollar goes directly to supporting the striking Scranton teachers and making sure they have what they need to win a fair contract._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37194?t=1&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)__
**[Support the Strike Fund »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37194?t=2&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)**
This morning, I had the deep honor of joining striking teachers + American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten on the picket line in Scranton.
I’m proud to stand in *full* solidarity with the Scranton Federation of Teachers,**and I hope you’ll join me in supporting their efforts for a fair contract so that they can get back to doing what they do best, which is educating the students of Scranton.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37194?t=3&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)
For five years, the Scranton Federation of Teachers union has been unable to reach an agreement with the district. As a result, teachers have been working without a contract or raise since 2017.
The district wants to pay for raises for teachers by cutting back healthcare benefits, which is unacceptable. **Workers should not have to choose between fair pay + affordable health care.**
All work has dignity. Teaching is a sacred responsibility + vital investment in our future. We must make teachers’ salaries both dignified and reflective of their outsized contribution to PA.
[**Please support the teachers on strike in Scranton by donating directly to the Strike Solidarity Fund here through the American Federation of Teachers (of which the Scranton Federation of Teachers is a local chapter).**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37194?t=4&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)
Unions are crucial to protecting the rights of workers, and we should *always* protect and support them. Thanks for standing with our teachers.
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211109-3402-footer&t=5&refcode2=3402_434096_gYmUYN&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3402%2E434096%2EgYmUYN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=105ce4322932445984504a7bbf6c0b8a&_t=GLMMbbaL73hEbtMV9T_05EfAGO68ZUVB-hXr9dk_emE_3f_N8KsnabKyY5GTa_Ooy7rXbubOqJhqkvDbKFVumiT3CHiFtx23Abjq4aaNxLMj6C60-OeSXYCeA6I2dC_A2AFgVFvtdtz-d1J5mzBKax3saQF6rwmjB2y7yonC6Xk%3D) | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=105ce4322932445984504a7bbf6c0b8a&_e=fZt2mwXOSccOd_1MhtAWsdbn6g5CPdVpDZINxtIYA0Przezq7srTQ63lD91hGVvpWqwDnPj0lSfQl88T4AATdKDTlV8YLm1reUAtH2KuKuRM8F2kqrjgzBuI5-ZSL5moN5it1_93p5DX0eF7NY8fzGrLpFZQCfmQqhW_39StvrXKXB0v8GhpXQPurfTXqo9IszoACZAox51JICFDFUdNc-FXi_DbeBdk7V1h1Kl6eUcU7v56B3x6bxK2jJk8drIfqFfjm9oAXFaC36Yk1Em-E7Gesh8A0_21PrzXcYtY8iEqx18sXIZDJWXm3bWHF67PNcf4rZAMxRVcSzL3NQwspypvXxonAqGls4mPN_VJR4j1FgVOv2Zfdbam2t1-aSSP6tBZBc1CkmfakiB4jkZO79bG00X_13ccbXxz63nvzRZNgvuoVP2rbfWIhHPrDeqbthjAu7rxk8u5ucyd09zBGfE0YGwNiQxmjryg6CuAzTIMYpVbotgy2lOCouvOYM1ZP3BE5s5rU4kvbphs_H7Vrux54eBSk0BG2dn48jCmV6xcEL2r0Adt5EDoiSXLCaneIp1ue5p8FGSO7CduvZ7xWp_myKVIXzwXCw3TPHkrPHJPN_dAGtQZY77WkFTRMdvmQXBhFYYfH_K55Lpl_e-f0w%3D%3D)

According to the _Military Times_ , in 1973, "nearly **three in every four** members of Congress had some type of military service." In 2021, that number has dropped to **one in every six** members.

Fellow Conservative,

If I know one thing it’s that you are likely on the receiving end of hundreds, if not thousands of emails every day. I appreciate you opening mine. Would you please take a few moments to scan the contents of this email and take my brief survey re: veterans serving in Congress? **I gave up my career in military intelligence to run for public office, so[you’d be doing me a huge favor by sparing 30 seconds or so right now](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=105ce4322932445984504a7bbf6c0b8a&_e=fZt2mwXOSccOd_1MhtAWsdbn6g5CPdVpDZINxtIYA0Przezq7srTQ63lD91hGVvpWqwDnPj0lSfQl88T4AATdKDTlV8YLm1reUAtH2KuKuRM8F2kqrjgzBuI5-ZSL5moN5it1_93p5DX0eF7NY8fzGrLpFZQCfmQqhW_39StvrXKXB0v8GhpXQPurfTXqo9IszoACZAox51JICFDFUdNc-FXi_DbeBdk7V1h1Kl6eUcU7v56B3x6bxK2jJk8drIfqFfjm9oAXFaC36Yk1Em-E7Gesh8A0_21PrzXcYtY8iEqx18sXIZDJWXm3bWHF67PNcf4rZAMxRVcSzL3NQwspypvXxonAqGls4mPN_VJR4j1FgVOv2Zfdbam2t1-aSSP6tBZBc1CkmfakiB4jkZO79bG00X_13ccbXxz63nvzRZNgvuoVP2rbfWIhHPrDeqbMpWP00lqjxU0kjumMVmaVsE3mjNz_Fh9TE9dncwyWpnrHm15lWXSgzzh-lnsAjt75_rnyEyV4U64G1YVDc8C0okv5Su-vOLMGkwtMjDJUm9CtnC8IjrSwhc6iBt4rnK3WtWuOb7TaPOV_dV9Bp1i61g0_bi9dkxtUfAGCNSAwIJeJN2h1Fr9IKsv0RYzIe0auf6wt1c2ZCr9FiFfE8cLhQ%3D%3D)**.

Whether or not you agree with the overarching mission active-duty military members participate in, I think that we can all agree that **it’s hard to disrespect a member of the military community or a veteran of the United States Armed Forces**.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=105ce4322932445984504a7bbf6c0b8a&_e=fZt2mwXOSccOd_1MhtAWsV0ZjHeb8voEWTkGfDFXzivEhTvHstiY8J9EScCZLoMbpn8uPbDHTv--lm-CEfYIJm10YOJ4MlCQbImCQvQhUDBXba7t0vA_J-BTiicRTTVyvhORym7MOT17nHHdx5Kwn7TJLGu8N08VuBRqoqztI0nMFDIegxd1EmvH76r35x1XJYhlFhtVpFNFd1J8ey49VyIj6xuJvieGXPo26lwOp9lRcMs9hzntuIBe-EpgYBZenrh1EZSX9TJ0L7ZaoCgNgddFx2vop9B6XACKHR-WYi18hta5wlQa2DnaOzC1S8m1dpPVvQDGR3v0eLlwhLuLLzwHp9RCQEmUaQYqwTZNFtnHh9R2qbvkHtYaL8ZBZiVSKeN-C01FzbL4RynpffhLYAioqRTalLLQiiEjfRAQnlIHyTV_HJK433HtnJLZVB0taELBqTeIJijiYIjHmOQWyyTDml6CieslL2ZU_qG0DyA%3D)

My name is John Castorani and for 9 years I served within the **Army’s Special Operations Command** , proudly representing the United States at home and around the globe. Perhaps you’ve opened up an email that I’ve sent prior to today. If that’s the case, then you may know that I’ve devoted my life to serving our nation – at home and on foreign battlefields.

| [**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS?** **››**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=105ce4322932445984504a7bbf6c0b8a&_e=fZt2mwXOSccOd_1MhtAWsdbn6g5CPdVpDZINxtIYA0Przezq7srTQ63lD91hGVvpWqwDnPj0lSfQl88T4AATdKDTlV8YLm1reUAtH2KuKuRM8F2kqrjgzBuI5-ZSL5moN5it1_93p5DX0eF7NY8fzGrLpFZQCfmQqhW_39StvrXKXB0v8GhpXQPurfTXqo9IszoACZAox51JICFDFUdNc-FXi_DbeBdk7V1h1Kl6eUcU7v56B3x6bxK2jJk8drIfqFfjm9oAXFaC36Yk1Em-E7Gesh8A0_21PrzXcYtY8iEqx18sXIZDJWXm3bWHF67PNcf4rZAMxRVcSzL3NQwspypvXxonAqGls4mPN_VJR4j1FgVOv2Zfdbam2t1-aSSP6tBZBc1CkmfakiB4jkZO79bG00X_13ccbXxz63nvzRZNgvuoVP2rbfWIhHPrDeqbigkw0Kcn7CUmep7zb4GeNeWIveXgBtycJXl04rCQhg_SsgAML1xD31XUIJdLE6APwBKb6QGXNLSmY1ur9jkk0XGLz71X_VKHIErdzDIhWeBpSToMWtW8zFtoHT9fMabF4LRFJ5YLQJP1jpukV2-YY15sx8YhySw5k9-5r8BvZi8uVP4tMInd3dIX8tkCLh_COTwFN1ljLT4P0kKdkJ0s_g%3D%3D)
---

**For six years, I hunted the radical Islamic terrorists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi, Libya. Along with fellow Special Operators service members, I helped hold the people who killed an American ambassador accountable**. One could say that we cleaned up the mess Hillary Clinton created when she refused to take the infamous 4 a.m. call on September 11th, 2012.

I know from first-hand experience fighting Islamic State, al Qaeda and other extremist elements that American military personnel are among the most agile and strategic-minded people around. So **why there are only 38 combat veterans currently serving in Congress – the lowest number since WWII?**

I find this alarming. It used to be the case that serving in the military was a prerequisite for those seeking public office.

**I’m curious to know if you share the opinion that Republicans must do more to ensure we’re putting resources behind men and women who have served old glory in the armed forces as they seek election to Congress.**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Don’t believe the pundits, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1387%2E3611125%2EVX8Lis ][IMG]

Folks,

I have a general principle when it comes to political predictions: don’t
believe the pundits.

I hear political talking heads in Washington say that Ohio is likely to
vote Republican in the 2022 Senate race. But I know they’re wrong. They
don’t know our state -- but we do. I’ve won not one, but three Senate
races here.

Tim’s front-runner GOP opponent, Josh Mandel, tried and failed twice to
unseat me. This team has what it takes to beat him a third time around,
but the polls are close. Josh is the only Republican currently beating Tim
in the polls.

Now look, Tim and I have been campaigning on the ground all across Ohio
these past few weeks. And we’ve seen the enthusiasm to elect Tim and give
Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the country.

But to overcome Josh’s attacks and the GOP’s mountains of cash, we’ll need
to match the grassroots operation we had in 2018. That’s why I’m
personally reaching out to you today:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5872?t=1007&akid=1387%2E3611125%2EVX8Lis ]Can I count on you to chip in to Tim’s campaign right now to give Ohio
the strongest pro-worker Senators in the nation? This is 2022’s most
important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5872?t=1008&akid=1387%2E3611125%2EVX8Lis ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5873?t=1009&akid=1387%2E3611125%2EVX8Lis ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5872?t=1013&akid=1387%2E3611125%2EVX8Lis ]Other Amount

I won my competitive race thanks to grassroots supporters like you
stepping up in critical times like these. As Tim says, never bet against
Ohio.

With gratitude,

Sherrod

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: DeWine Isn’t a Leader, He’s a Loser
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | Friend,
DeWine isn’t a leader. He’s a LOSER.
**One of DeWine’s many Covid mandates included banning dancing.** Someone should remind him that he’s the governor of Ohio - not the town from “Footloose.”
_DeWine isn’t trying to keep you safe. He’s trying to control you. _
Not sure what he thought Ohioans even had to dance about. He took your job, your business, and then forced you and your children to wear masks.
DeWine never lost a paycheck during the pandemic. He didn’t lose his business or have to depend on unemployment. He didn’t even follow his own mask mandate. He was too busy dancing on your constitutional rights. DeWine is trying to force children to wear masks and then brainwash them with Critical Race Theory. He’s also staying silent while Ohio parents are being labeled“domestic terrorists.”
It’s time we send him a message: **DEWINE, YOU’RE FIRED. **
To make DeWine a one-term governor, I need your help. Please consider donating to our **No More DeWine Fund** today.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Reaching out to you
body:
Fellow conservative, I’m going to cut right to the chase: America is at a critical crossroads.

_**Are we going to be a failed socialist state?** _

**[Or will we carry out President Trump’s America first vision of opportunity and freedom?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f395d7ba41b24d858814a4b0dae7a640&_e=rj0VDFil1Wt7DnpMzCkKMUwKeFdcwM1KZ2e62YQezkhPAiYzTqtCcMeFVYYWDLYLJwsZNiGxOhmx-AUWiJ3BWuQZC2nzWN4rE1eXHXcLoYjE85p3EctikbNUK6OSwtHgP7Uz86THnito2m0UX5j6G7qd-mLgJp8erCAlNTeAASDcr7KETK0pu97PuRYGNr4mXH8giGdMDk2YP7JylK7cX_50-KA2M8MN36L4JY-s8x-ImNdNACZdfKc1ilUz6Nm_mTGwEtKOmwNFneT2ZLo6J8F2XJK3R0n2r6Sb_-aZhHT_k3cpKfKcZKS6id9KQ06TjftG2TWoBV5zL7y1W4zRwHGR8W35LhVWoZJgeTSkCeP2dyng0jAS0cUkkmNOkaEYtBO0CFX2KyOnV7IFn4aiUjrJU1f7v28gIQhkabhTboQ%3D)**

The Democrats have made themselves clear - they want to destroy the very fibers of our great country and replace them with woke nonsense.

**I made a contract with America to defeat the radical Left almost 30 years ago, and I haven’t given up on it yet.**

Now, it’s time to rally behind President Trump and his A-team to save America, but we can’t defend our great Democracy without your support.

**Join me today so we can SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left and make our country great once again.** [**SAVE AMERICA**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f395d7ba41b24d858814a4b0dae7a640&_e=rj0VDFil1Wt7DnpMzCkKMUwKeFdcwM1KZ2e62YQezkhPAiYzTqtCcMeFVYYWDLYLJwsZNiGxOhmx-AUWiJ3BWuQZC2nzWN4rE1eXHXcLoYjE85p3EctikbNUK6OSwtHgP7Uz86THnito2m0UX5j6G7qd-mLgJp8erCAlNTeAASDcr7KETK0pu97PuRYGNr4mZdk9qzQGnLPS2SifbTtWo2oRB4WVEOzawIe38XWBD5uSIfX2tMhluSu59-BuGSipfLW1kQny2ow7RjRXTxc7hJ_1OcSsp1wH-jSsPvenDwroHjSLwnjCFYyEW01-R2LnrFp0hstPeryynkZa77DRSrX7mTaX-lpiWKZdyxFBeM4mgdwo0R3DHsSPzfulZOFW3Gn_NsGEmGdzqWqh-N9ZNlL7dRyO0mlFc_eJ5E6Ae0M%3D) Thank you, Newt Gingrich [**TAKE A STAND NOW >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f395d7ba41b24d858814a4b0dae7a640&_e=rj0VDFil1Wt7DnpMzCkKMUwKeFdcwM1KZ2e62YQezkhPAiYzTqtCcMeFVYYWDLYLJwsZNiGxOhmx-AUWiJ3BWuQZC2nzWN4rE1eXHXcLoYjE85p3EctikbNUK6OSwtHgP7Uz86THnito2m0UX5j6G7qd-mLgJp8erCAlNTeAASDcr7KETK0pu97PuRYGNr4mhKAn_kUSd4i0r06jumKEuPEr6_wyh4OPTNZU1RAWLu7w3rnkT4P4Le6Xr1AXBaYS0feQLisT9I64RRrU1NEt7w69bTGTFpz0y8KyNqK99vx9gbYene179r0qmK-xMRh9gnwWBt19-sp8FxFuGrTRoGZnhGOPdedK-vG0-IbRXI9t6oQCF2b6HOdb5HVSsHoeqjDsPwjEWGWwjtEY7y-tNMXPHmZkjXmCp3Q82NgJf4w%3D) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | Congressman Troy Carter and the rest of the Congressional Black Caucus played a pivotal role in securing billions in infrastructure funding and millions for the people of Louisiana this weekend.

**"The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is a transformational moment for Louisiana and America,"** said Congressman Carter. **"I am so proud that my colleagues came together on a bipartisan basis to pass this long-term investment in the foundation of our nation."**

According to the _Military Times_ , in 1973, "nearly **three in every four** members of Congress had some type of military service." In 2021, that number has dropped to **one in every six** members.

Fellow Conservative,

If I know one thing it’s that you are likely on the receiving end of hundreds, if not thousands of emails every day. I appreciate you opening mine. Would you please take a few moments to scan the contents of this email and take my brief survey re: veterans serving in Congress? **I gave up my career in military intelligence to run for public office, so[you’d be doing me a huge favor by sparing 30 seconds or so right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2615d73e91349eda5bf9e311205aa15&_e=1AJrDnFZO9E2hqLNNZy-KRZOD6a4iAN86tCwMeIQepMzqDg24-MIsKZ412wK_Q6b-c5CWcDJdfpJawylmKpbuyIZqSkwNsuSLGGnLRcH1rfxsUe_5KieC_rc1iWE1_9Enl9po43m2NO87FElaKb3F8cwnOaVTH_WSVxDU57IIwKgcWpMUlGQnslm5un_dmAQtthS8pudZFJCb-iKWVBkfpxEgWvTqELnKuAv5HaZ4zch8KtoO7MGqDpwWR3lYmDYbUnl5KWESNpwZs7zH8vT2BhGhEHtCRCcDp9vRBnMXd82md1rtDgnduAhKRh-ZnNeLZ3y9vxTWmZh76YdsB1TQ4Qr8q4wiGzxMz0NEamU7yJR4eYQBiK2Z0PWpl-HkpvFmT2iS4rrW97ODFlcOMjArweUvKBb7zWrKCUu1iEg-YecxutXzDRD3Msg_3MQ61tJ7IOGAfLXpWOPHqO4xH3JVXqq3CZrPYgZWg0ALLpjTvoZ6EYLmdBPs-dKEOBzxFAxMxwyN4JUXnQrnY48SQOdrMZRdyWvZfNu-6KD-ti37bOw0YMVojRSqyxQehnRZh6Z7Tr6buETBSdAHunGGLaIxqRzTLhlGOHdsDs1JEqrgJssf9pVXb3b3tHBaBOTYwEU73lxlYJOf71GfjJpRIz8OA%3D%3D)**.

Whether or not you agree with the overarching mission active-duty military members participate in, I think that we can all agree that **it’s hard to disrespect a member of the military community or a veteran of the United States Armed Forces**.

My name is John Castorani and for 9 years I served within the **Army’s Special Operations Command** , proudly representing the United States at home and around the globe. Perhaps you’ve opened up an email that I’ve sent prior to today. If that’s the case, then you may know that I’ve devoted my life to serving our nation – at home and on foreign battlefields.

| [**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS?** **››**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2615d73e91349eda5bf9e311205aa15&_e=1AJrDnFZO9E2hqLNNZy-KRZOD6a4iAN86tCwMeIQepMzqDg24-MIsKZ412wK_Q6b-c5CWcDJdfpJawylmKpbuyIZqSkwNsuSLGGnLRcH1rfxsUe_5KieC_rc1iWE1_9Enl9po43m2NO87FElaKb3F8cwnOaVTH_WSVxDU57IIwKgcWpMUlGQnslm5un_dmAQtthS8pudZFJCb-iKWVBkfpxEgWvTqELnKuAv5HaZ4zch8KtoO7MGqDpwWR3lYmDYbUnl5KWESNpwZs7zH8vT2BhGhEHtCRCcDp9vRBnMXd82md1rtDgnduAhKRh-ZnNeLZ3y9vxTWmZh76YdsB1TQ4Qr8q4wiGzxMz0NEamU7yJR4eYQBiK2Z0PWpl-HkpvFmT2iS4rrW97ODFlcOMjArweUvKBb7zWrKCUu1iEg-YecxutXzDRD3Msg_3MQ61tJA-oLIDjkAD-FlhPUxBHcX2FaYIJDryw8-4CMWkxUCD5FZ516OOvs2ZPv_nMYzw2snoIuEHZGHON8KWFMLCSn6r40eHPglizkAaisraI0tw53uM9pc5Gx9ELQwVCnChf_mATsS1uLJbXsFjwBN9xMKit1AB26VnYXcdrpwKTbqkp-NQJcSxBTA2Bq3OlwprPhxi2y8cvUd5wd7PT-5D6DYg%3D%3D)

**For six years, I hunted the radical Islamic terrorists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi, Libya. Along with fellow Special Operators service members, I helped hold the people who killed an American ambassador accountable**. One could say that we cleaned up the mess Hillary Clinton created when she refused to take the infamous 4 a.m. call on September 11th, 2012.

I know from first-hand experience fighting Islamic State, al Qaeda and other extremist elements that American military personnel are among the most agile and strategic-minded people around. So **why there are only 38 combat veterans currently serving in Congress – the lowest number since WWII?**

I find this alarming. It used to be the case that serving in the military was a prerequisite for those seeking public office.

**I’m curious to know if you share the opinion that Republicans must do more to ensure we’re putting resources behind men and women who have served old glory in the armed forces as they seek election to Congress.**

[**Will you let me know by taking a quick 3 question survey right now?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2615d73e91349eda5bf9e311205aa15&_e=1AJrDnFZO9E2hqLNNZy-KRZOD6a4iAN86tCwMeIQepMzqDg24-MIsKZ412wK_Q6b-c5CWcDJdfpJawylmKpbuyIZqSkwNsuSLGGnLRcH1rfxsUe_5KieC_rc1iWE1_9Enl9po43m2NO87FElaKb3F8cwnOaVTH_WSVxDU57IIwKgcWpMUlGQnslm5un_dmAQtthS8pudZFJCb-iKWVBkfpxEgWvTqELnKuAv5HaZ4zch8KtoO7MGqDpwWR3lYmDYbUnl5KWESNpwZs7zH8vT2BhGhEHtCRCcDp9vRBnMXd82md1rtDgnduAhKRh-ZnNeLZ3y9vxTWmZh76YdsB1TQ4Qr8q4wiGzxMz0NEamU7yJR4eYQBiK2Z0PWpl-HkpvFmT2iS4rrW97ODFlcOMjArweUvKBb7zWrKCUu1iEg-YecxutXzDRD3Msg_3MQ61tJX3PpnYRhSdHpdR2wIaHbSohttIBeJGsxD6bz329nKbedWRQ9kxROzeP9vS-xJ1dMhu0k4wqA08Cl81m_9gHc-SzP-RRZfgcIksY1ZfNjPqjRME465hwpthlcFX6d48iVaRN-mHef1RaTffLJblVN3WoRS7ApOnj8o3VMYYSQrISFcCbSBbIiPQ8eyzDac_84GBsl_CceV0koGzQtqsNvBg%3D%3D)

**Veterans know how to get things done. Give us a mission and a timeline and we’ll see anything through to the end.**

Veterans make the best members of Congress not only because they’ve served in our armed forces, rather because in the armed forces vets learn that regardless of your creed, ethnicity, race or religion, in the military it’s essential to come together and accomplish the mission... it’s the oath every veteran swore to uphold to our Constitution - in order to form a more perfect union.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e2615d73e91349eda5bf9e311205aa15&_e=1AJrDnFZO9E2hqLNNZy-KQst-SB3uaY-PRXoawBUqgWnCzPvpYzUxWO68shgAUMN4ENEG-C7SufQYmr0kPVra9p_VF3ck8sv36UL4UaZNByued9kAIpJ5GA9-fV_JHmZFe7OM4s6T_AhfnbDwARLhPmdEMbVi55y5i7buYmYXnGBfwPSzTtTQMEkqa9nq0CLEUDJRuTgOUJFLbxd1vLYXMiN38IHbAEdlt07r5D2SQgQKEUgLBf0AvZ8OqfFMUQG22iT0rQC3W_zAjutNe_QAASNODFZJyRkH0Q2C9pktm5teUZ52ZHeKU43Sltf_zaPMvZgDgt4bfybIoMWLDv6ANLPZ1uZLa4l63j3MH48icW81pgrwjvQV6hvuL2NfbUnsH3BSNmoWEIZy1f94Y0iIzJ38iAPHXZGN5VoqmbPye_YXTXA_Nd8jVcLk_VofOxuf4-UOd2CgHlxiPSb-qoIJ3gRxHl9MXw_jvHbAAS0evs%3D)

**Can anyone say that about career politicians?**

When I was assigned to the Special Operations Regional Task Force in North Africa, tasked with hunting down the planners of the Benghazi attack - **it didn't matter what political party you affiliated with, what religion you practiced or the color of your skin** ; we came together and successfully captured those bastards who killed four of our own, including Ambassador Chris Stevens. We secured justice for the victims of the premeditated terror that Hillary Clinton and the Obama administration refused to seek!

name: JOE BIDEN ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: President Biden: "hellbent"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Trump and his Republicans have launched an unprecedented attack to unseat 70 House Democrats -- and they only need to flip FIVE seats to take back the House Majority. We 're urgently calling for 250 more grassroots contributions before our midnight deadline in just FIVE hours. Can you rush in $3 to protect our House Majority? >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)**

We need you to know three critical things:

1\. Republicans have unveiled their plan to unseat 70 House Democrats.

2\. They only need to flip FIVE seats to win back the Majority.

**3\. So President Biden has called on EVERY grassroots Democrat to fight back:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwkjg-)

When our president asks us for help, we wouldn't dare let him down.

President Biden is urgently counting on us to SAVE the House and his bold agenda from Republican destruction.

**[That's why we're calling for another 250 gifts before our midnight deadline to answer his call and thwart Republican plans to destroy our House Majority. Can we count on your $3 before our deadline expires in just FIVE hours to protect our House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvAr-)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

DCCC

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45914888&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTA4MDkyNgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45914888&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTA4MDkyNgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
